turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello haan boliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi, good evening. Pragya se baat ho rahi hai meri?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Pragya main Anshvi baat kar rahi hoon shiksha.com ki counselling team se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan boliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapki inquiry thi related to B D S program, to aap plan kar rahe hain iske liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan maine kiya tha, search kiya tha B D S se related colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To mujhe jaanna tha ki fee structure kya hoga agar management quota ke through main jaana chahun to?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan main aapko bata deti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap mujhe qualification bata sakte ho apni?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Twelfth pass.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Twelfth mein kitne percentage hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Twelfth mein matlab P C B ka batana hai ya overall batana hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Overall bata dijiye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Overall to eighty two percent hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay and P C B?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: P C B ka seventy percent hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Koi entrance exam diya aapne?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NEET ya any other exam?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi main dungi is saal dungi NEET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki NEET ke basis pe hi aapko koi bhi college milega to milega, theek hai because exam to dikhana hi padega aapko.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay to NEET mein kitne?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Cut off list aapko main bata dungi matlab aapko share kar dungi but pehle main aapko colleges ki details bata deti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To kaunsi location ke colleges dekh rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kahin bhi, kahin bhi, India mein kahin bhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bas Kerala nahi hona chahiye baaki koi bhi state chalega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To options hai like Kalinga hai, Kalinga Institute of Dental Science which is in Bhubaneswar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, four point five ka rating hai college ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And Bachelor of Dental Surgery, B D S, jisme total fees rahega twenty six lakh five years ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Twenty nine? Okay twenty six lakh five years ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Correct.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And agar main placements ki baat karu then highest salary offer ki gayi hai fifty three lakh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And twelfth mein fifty percent required and NEET is compulsory, NEET aapko dena padega, NEET ke basis pe hi admission ho sakta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay. To ma'am kuch NEET ke bhi marks honge na, NEET mein itna laana hai itna kuch ya fir sirf qualify karna hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi, NEET ka jo cut off list hai main aapko share kar dungi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jitni bhi ranks hai accordingly main aapko share kar dungi, aap khud se check kar sakte hai because har quota ka alag hota hai, general, O B C, S C, S T to aap apne accordingly check kar payenge, okay?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay. Ma'am par meri utni achhi taiyari nahi hai NEET ki.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To agar main sirf qualify bhi karu to fir qualify karne pe mujhe koi aisa college hai jo main qualify kar lu NEET aur mujhe B D S mil jaye?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan matlab wo college se hi aapko ek baar puchna padega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main is cheez pe commit nahi kar sakti, yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So college ke jo counsellors hote hai particular that college to wo aapko zyada achhe se explain kar payega ki kaunsa aapko matlab NEET mein agar nahi clear hota ya sirf attempt hi hota hai then you are eligible or not.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo depend karta hai unpe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, to aise hi S O A hai, S O A Bhubaneswar, unka bhi twenty seven lakh hai approx.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Again NEET is required and twelfth mein fifty percent required, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Fifty?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Fifty percent.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So, okay ma'am. Haan matlab NEET to aapko dena padega, pehle aap NEET ko prepare kar lo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai and other jo colleges ki main list share kar rahi hoon aap ek baar go through kar lo and jo bhi shortlist karte ho aap college ko call karke confirm kar sakte hai ki you are eligible or not or ya fir attempted pe jo bhi aapki queries hai aap unse ek baar clear kar lo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, fir iske alawa agar koi bhi requirement rahegi to aap mujhe call back kar sakte hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay ma'am, aap mujhe share kar do cut off list, main dekh leti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, aapka yahi number hai WhatsApp pe?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske alawa koi alternative number use karte hai aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi ma'am yahi wala hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai fir main isi pe hi share kar rahi hoon, koi bhi query rahe to aap call back kar lijiyega, okay?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay ma'am, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay Pragya, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello. Hello, main Shivam baat kar raha hoon, shiksha.com se education counsellor.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Meri baat Jaikam se ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaikam main Shivam baat kar raha hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To like aapne Shiksha ki website pe inquiry generate kari thi, B.Tech courses ke regarding aap colleges dekh rahe the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To yeh free of cost counselling hai, aap apne liye college plan kar rahe hain ya family mein kisi ke liye dekh rahe hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Beta hai sir mera.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha aap apne bete ke liye dekh rahe hain. To aap hi unke liye college choose kar rahe hain ya khud se wo colleges choose kar rahe hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir bacche ko zyada pata hai, main sir itna samajhta bhi nahi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo hai nahi is time.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi baat nahi sir, main na ek kaam karta hoon, yeh same number WhatsApp pe hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To main WhatsApp pe aapko message kar deta hoon, aap mujhe message pe hi back kar dijiyega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur jaise hi wo aaye aur aapko lage ki aap like yeh hum all India ke saare colleges ke liye counselling provide karate hain, aapke budget mein jo best college hota hai usme admission lene mein help karte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji. To aap mujhse connect kijiyega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Same WhatsApp wale number pe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir kahan se bol rahe hain aap?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main shiksha.com se baat kar raha hoon.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir BITS Pilani dila do hume to.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye BITS Pilani ke liye to matlab aapka budget bhi hona chahiye, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo to sir kar lenge, wo to.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur uske baad student bhi matlab us layak hona chahiye. BITS Pilani na apna exam leta hai, BITSAT karke exam hota hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Pehle aap application form fill karte hain, phir unka BITSAT ka exam hota hai. BITSAT ke exam ke merit ke basis pe seat allotment hoti hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To bacche ka kya 12th ka score aa gaya hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir abhi nahi aaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur like inka JEE ka exam score to aa gaya hoga, usme kitna hai? JEE mein kya percentile hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir wo to 67 ya kuch aisa hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 67 hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur to like na BITS ki jagah pe na aap kuch aur colleges dekhiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki BITS ka dekhiye JEE ka percentile bhi 94-95 jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? 94-95 percent ke kareeb jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur doosri cheez ki bacche ko aisi jagah pe admission lena chahiye jo uske profile ke hisab se best college hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Matlab aap samjhiye ki agar baccha top 5 percent baccho mein rahega padhai mein to wahan pe accha perform karega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hai na? Uska average, average jo matlab salary package hai wo top salary package ke category mein rahega wahan pe, confident rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ab aisi jagah pe admission agar aap le bhi lete hain aur bacche ke profile ke hisab se zyada high-fi study wala college hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wahan bacche ko further dikkat aati hai, hai na? Back lagta hai, saare bacche padhne mein acche hain. Pehle to chances hi kam hain BITSAT ka milna, chances kam hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir Jaipur, Jaipur aas paas dila do sir ya fir hume, aisa.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To Jaipur mein aap Manipal kyun nahi dekh rahe hain? Manipal accha option hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To sir usme ho jayega is hisab se, is percentile?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Percentile ke basis pe nahi, Manipal ka bhi apna ek exam hota hai MET. Hai na? Manipal ke do aur branches hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To iski low, low us pe wo le lete hain kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, matlab unka main jo hai wo Maharashtra aur Bangalore mein hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To inka Jaipur wala jo hai wo third branch hai, accha branch hai but like aapko is matlab is profile pe agar 10th mein inka kya percentage ka chance-wance hai, kuch idea hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo to sir 78 hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 78 aa gaya result ya aap apne se bata rahe hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi 10th ki bol rahe hain na aap?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi, 12th ki main pooch raha hoon.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 12th abhi CBSE se hain sir, result nahi aaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To kya chances hain kitne aa jayenge? Kuch bata raha tha inhone?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir 75 ke to upar upar aane ki umeed hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan to matlab dekhiye abhi aapka main bataun to aise aapko nahi pata chalega sir, hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jo bhi chaar paanch best colleges hain sir, unke application form aap fill karke chaliye, jo bhi lagta hai ki aapke budget mein yeh sabse hum best colleges yeh yeh choose kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo wo colleges choose kijiye, theek hai? Ek do average colleges choose kar lijiye, maan lijiye ki agar usme nahi ho pata hai to isme ho jaye bacche ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And uske baad unka exam dilaiye, theek hai? Jo bhi best college unko mil payega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye chaar paanch hazaar rupaye ka yeh investment hai application form fill karna.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Lekin kam se kam bacche ko computer science acche college.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.text: Main call rakhungi, wo NIET ka form aap bhar do, kyunki dekho ek college ke bharose hum nahi reh sakte Pihu, right? To agar hamare paas aur bhi options mein rahega to wo hamare future ke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam yeh wala jo, jo aap college bata rahe ho, yeh kahan par hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh Noida sector mein hai beta.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, ek baar aap application form fill kar lo, meri baat suno. Application form fill kar lo taaki hamare paas option mein rahega wo college bhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo form fill kar loge na to hamare paas option mein rahega ki in future agar hamara plan banta hai ya hamara nahi ho raha hai to hamare paas ek college hai jiske liye humne application daal rakha hai.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi issue nahi hai, aap aaram se colleges ke baare mein dekhna, NIET ka aap fill kar dena, aur bhi main bhejungi wo bhi achhe se padh lena, jo bhi aapke liye comfortable lage aapko, usi ke liye aap application file karna, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, bye bye, take care.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Placement sahi hai isme?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Placement, haan. Basically placement isliye sahi hai ki unke khud ke hi hospitals hain, to isliye placements hain achhe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Inke tie-up kaun kaun se hospital se hain?

turns.text: Inke tie-up pehle to inka khud ka hi hai.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, aur baaki inka jaise ki ye Park Hospital hai, JP Hospital hai, hai na? Aur aapka ye Orbit hai, Surya Hospital hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Iski location kahan hai? Mujhe ek baar bataoge aap? Confirm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko bata deti hu, ek second. Main iska address batati hu aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye hai aapka Rohini West, aapko agar metro se jaoge aap to Rohini West aapka nearest metro hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kings Mall, Sector 10 me padega aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Main iska address aapko bhej dungi, don't worry.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji, ji, aap WhatsApp kar dena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bilkul, aur jitne isse related jitne bhi colleges ki ek list main bana ke aapko bhej deti hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, haan, ji. Aap mujhe ek list bhej do, main phir visit kar lunga inme.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji, haan ji, bilkul. Aap bata dena, aapko kis college ko visit karna hai, to phir main us college ka address bhi bhej dungi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji, ji, ji, ji, ji.

turns.text: 94 percentile?

turns.text: Haan wo taiyari to kar raha hai lekin Advanced to aise hai ke keh bhi nahi sakte ke niklega ya nahi niklega, wo bhi baat hai na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.text: EWS na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Aur aap belong kahan se karte hain aap?

turns.text: Hum Haryana se karte hain sir, Sirsa se.

turns.text: Achha achha achha, Haryana se.

turns.text: To colleges bhi aap Haryana wagera mein hi dekh rahe hain ya phir location ka koi issue nahi hai aapko?

turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Delhi bhi dekh sakte hain, Haryana bhi dekh sakte hain. Koi baat nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Dekhiye wo jo achha college, aise.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha college, aise.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bilkul bilkul. Main aapko bata deta hoon, dekhiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Pehli cheez to yeh ke jo aapki counselling hogi JEE ki start, wo aapki hogi June mein.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan wo to June mein hogi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. To wo June mein jab aapki wo counselling start hogi to usmein aap saare campuses aap apne priority ke according aap select kar lena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Doosri cheez, aapka aaya hai 94 percentile na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. To dekhiye 94 percentile par, I think aapko na CS nahi milega. Baaki other branches to mil jayengi aapko.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Lekin jaise ke other branches, jaise ke ab state ke bharate hain, Haryana ke andar state mein bharate hain ya jaise IPU mein bharate hain to bhi nahi milta kya sir, yeh pooch raha tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye uska na percentile bahut high jaata hai. Main aapko bataun.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Manav, aapne jo mujhe screenshot bheje hai na, usme jo third wala screenshot hai na, jisme dekho B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering 2026 likha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uspe jaake aapko click karna hai, uspe jaake aap apply now karoge na to wo wala form aapko fill karna hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo sara baaki jo hai na wo global B.Tech ke liye hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap form sahi hai aapka but aapko apply is wale pe karna hai jo maine aapko screenshot bheja hai us pe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Matlab aap same link se jo aapke paas hai us pe apply kar sakte ho but aapko choose ye karna hai B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering 2026.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And 1500 rupees ka iska application form hai, okay?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, ye aap pay karenge 1500, fir aapka form me aapko details I think aapko saare daal diye college ke jo required details the?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, shuruwat me to keval name wagera liya, email and password.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Password set nahi kiya tha. Email, number aur bas yahi page fill karne pe ye page khul raha tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan to isme fir wahi hoga, aapka firstly ye application form fees lenge, fir aapka 10th 12th ka marks, aapke parents ka details, ye sab.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then aapki 10th ki marksheet, aapki passport size photo and aapka signature white page pe, wo sab upload hoga to aapka form fir complete hoga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: It is not like ye sab turant to zaroorat nahi hoga na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, turant zaroorat nahi hoga. Aap pehle matlab aap agar fill bhi kar doge na to wo college aapse coordinate kar lega itne pe to.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai. Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. So aap isko itna isko matlab aap isme at least ye daal aap jaise 1500 ka apna application form fill kar doge na, 1500 pay kar doge to aapka application in process aa jayega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To uske paas aapke paas ample amount of time hoga complete karne ka, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki aap documents upload page tak pahunchna, fir aapko koi problem nahi hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki kyunki basic details to aap waise bhi daal sakte ho na. Aapko apne 10th 12th ka percentage pata hoga, 12th ka aaya nahi hai, but pata to hoga. Aapke parents ka details bhi aapko pata hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapke ghar ka address, ye sab to aapko pata hi hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Itna to aap fill karke rakh hi sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ye to basic details hai. Haan, nahi wo to main documents ke liye bol raha tha. Documents abhi mere paas hai nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan, koi problem nahi hai and aisa nahi hai ki aapko original documents hi upload karne hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise aapke 10th 12th me aapki online marksheet bhi aati hai na, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aapke paas wo bhi hoga na, wo bhi upload kar sakte hain and abhi mostly colleges me kya aata hai na jaise aapke paas passport size photo available nahi hai, to wo na aapki recent selfie bhi le lete hain, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan wo to edit kar sakta hoon main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, to wo bhi karke kar sakte ho, usme koi problem nahi aayega, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kaafi saare mein form mein 10th ka school wala date sheet maang raha tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Result wala.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi, aisa nahi hota hai. Aap normal marksheet bhi upload kyunki maine bahut saare students ka application form fill kara hai, okay?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To I know bahut saare students ka jaise abhi online marksheet aaya hota hai, unke paas original nahi hota hai to online marksheet se bhi work ho jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki usme roll number aapka mentioned hota hai na. Roll number aur school code mentioned hota hai to usse wo college detect kar leta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki college ke paas saare tools hote hain ye sab information get out karne ke, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap isko bhar lo, koi bhi problem aata hai, mujhse screenshot bhej ke pooch lena, main aapko guide kar dungi, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki ek baar main check kar leti hoon, agar aapko eligible hoge to ye jo 1500 rupees hai, ispe aapko shayad 200 rupees ka na cashback bhi mil jayega payment karne ke baad, okay?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar eligible hoge to main bata dungi, nahi hoga to fir wo 1500 hi rahega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay. Haan haan, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright? So aap bhar lo, koi bhi problem aata hai to mujhe bata dena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha, wo eligibility aap kab tak bataiyega?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaun si eligibility batao?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo 200 ka off wala.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho wo na kya hota hai, wo cashback hota hai and cashback aap samajh sakte ho, cashback tab aata hai jab hum kisi cheez ka payment kar dete hain, hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. To wo aap jab payment kar loge na 1500 ka to aap mujhe uska 1500 ka screenshot bhejna.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main upload karke apne system me dekhungi, agar aap eligible hoge to main aapko saath ke saath bata dungi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur within seven days aapko aa jayega. Nahi bhi hoge to to wo bhi main aapko confirm kar dungi, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright? So aap ye bhar lo, koi problem aaye to mujhse pooch lena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, bye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bye.

[01:04 - 01:10] User: Nahi, shuruwat me to keval name wagera liya, email and password.
[01:10 - 01:18] User: Password set nahi kiya tha. Email, number aur bas yahi page fill karne pe ye page khul raha tha.
[01:18 - 01:27] Counsellor: Haan to isme fir wahi hoga, aapka firstly ye application form fees lenge, fir aapka 10th 12th ka marks, aapke parents ka details, ye sab.
[01:27 - 01:38] Counsellor: Then aapki 10th ki marksheet, aapki passport size photo and aapka signature white page pe, wo sab upload hoga to aapka form fir complete hoga.
[01:38 - 01:40] User: It is not like ye sab turant to zaroorat nahi hoga na?
[01:41 - 01:48] Counsellor: Nahi, turant zaroorat nahi hoga. Aap pehle matlab aap agar fill bhi kar doge na to wo college aapse coordinate kar lega itne pe to.
[01:48 - 01:50] User: Theek hai. Hmm hmm.
[01:50 - 02:03] Counsellor: Haan. So aap isko itna isko matlab aap isme at least ye daal aap jaise 1500 ka apna application form fill kar doge na, 1500 pay kar doge to aapka application in process aa jayega.
[02:03 - 02:07] Counsellor: To uske paas aapke paas ample amount of time hoga complete karne ka, theek hai?
[02:07 - 02:13] Counsellor: Baaki aap documents upload page tak pahunchna, fir aapko koi problem nahi hoga.
[02:13 - 02:23] Counsellor: Baaki kyunki basic details to aap waise bhi daal sakte ho na. Aapko apne 10th 12th ka percentage pata hoga, 12th ka aaya nahi hai, but pata to hoga. Aapke parents ka details bhi aapko pata hoga.
[02:23 - 02:26] Counsellor: Aapke ghar ka address, ye sab to aapko pata hi hai na?
[02:26 - 02:28] Counsellor: Itna to aap fill karke rakh hi sakte ho.
[02:28 - 02:33] User: Ye to basic details hai. Haan, nahi wo to main documents ke liye bol raha tha. Documents abhi mere paas hai nahi.
[02:33 - 02:39] Counsellor: Haan haan, koi problem nahi hai and aisa nahi hai ki aapko original documents hi upload karne hain.
[02:39 - 02:44] Counsellor: Jaise aapke 10th 12th me aapki online marksheet bhi aati hai na, right?
[02:44 - 02:45] User: Haan haan.
[02:45 - 02:56] Counsellor: Agar aapke paas wo bhi hoga na, wo bhi upload kar sakte hain and abhi mostly colleges me kya aata hai na jaise aapke paas passport size photo available nahi hai, to wo na aapki recent selfie bhi le lete hain, theek hai?
[02:56 - 02:58] User: Haan wo to edit kar sakta hoon main.
[02:58 - 03:02] Counsellor: Haan, to wo bhi karke kar sakte ho, usme koi problem nahi aayega, theek hai?
[03:02 - 03:03] User: Achha.
[03:03 - 03:04] Counsellor: Haan.
[03:04 - 03:08] User: Kaafi saare mein form mein 10th ka school wala date sheet maang raha tha.
[03:08 - 03:09] User: Result wala.
[03:09 - 03:17] Counsellor: Nahi nahi, aisa nahi hota hai. Aap normal marksheet bhi upload kyunki maine bahut saare students ka application form fill kara hai, okay?
[03:17 - 03:26] Counsellor: To I know bahut saare students ka jaise abhi online marksheet aaya hota hai, unke paas original nahi hota hai to online marksheet se bhi work ho jaata hai.
[03:26 - 03:34] Counsellor: Kyunki usme roll number aapka mentioned hota hai na. Roll number aur school code mentioned hota hai to usse wo college detect kar leta hai.
[03:34 - 03:38] Counsellor: Kyunki college ke paas saare tools hote hain ye sab information get out karne ke, theek hai?
[03:38 - 03:39] User: Hmm.
[03:39 - 03:40] Counsellor: Alright?
[03:40 - 03:46] Counsellor: To aap isko bhar lo, koi bhi problem aata hai, mujhse screenshot bhej ke pooch lena, main aapko guide kar dungi, theek hai?
[03:46 - 03:47] User: Okay, okay ma'am.
[03:48 - 04:00] Counsellor: Baaki ek baar main check kar leti hoon, agar aapko eligible hoge to ye jo 1500 rupees hai, ispe aapko shayad 200 rupees ka na cashback bhi mil jayega payment karne ke baad, okay?
[04:00 - 04:04] Counsellor: Agar eligible hoge to main bata dungi, nahi hoga to fir wo 1500 hi rahega.
[04:04 - 04:06] User: Okay. Haan haan, theek hai.
[04:06 - 04:11] Counsellor: Alright? So aap bhar lo, koi bhi problem aata hai to mujhe bata dena, theek hai?
[04:11 - 04:14] User: Achha, wo eligibility aap kab tak bataiyega?
[04:14 - 04:16] Counsellor: Kaun si eligibility batao?
[04:16 - 04:19] User: Wo 200 ka off wala.
[04:19 - 04:28] Counsellor: Dekho wo na kya hota hai, wo cashback hota hai and cashback aap samajh sakte ho, cashback tab aata hai jab hum kisi cheez ka payment kar dete hain, hai na?
[04:28 - 04:29] User: Haan haan.
[04:29 - 04:36] Counsellor: Haan. To wo aap jab payment kar loge na 1500 ka to aap mujhe uska 1500 ka screenshot bhejna.
[04:36 - 04:42] Counsellor: Main upload karke apne system me dekhungi, agar aap eligible hoge to main aapko saath ke saath bata dungi.
[04:42 - 04:48] Counsellor: Aur within seven days aapko aa jayega. Nahi bhi hoge to to wo bhi main aapko confirm kar dungi, theek hai?
[04:48 - 04:49] User: Okay, okay ma'am.
[04:50 - 04:54] Counsellor: Alright? So aap ye bhar lo, koi problem aaye to mujhse pooch lena, theek hai?
[04:54 - 04:55] User: Hmm hmm.
[04:55 - 04:56] Counsellor: Alright?
[04:56 - 04:57] User: Okay.
[04:57 - 04:58] Counsellor: Okay, bye.
[04:58 - 04:59] User: Bye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dilkhush se baat ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kispe? Dilkhush se baat ho rahi hai? Haan boliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Purnima baat kar rahi thi Dilkhush, aapse discussion hua tha mera colleges ke regarding last week.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: B.Tech ke liye dekh rahe the na aap? To mujhe confirm karna tha, abhi kisi college pe admission liya hai aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi abhi maine kisi me nahi liya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, koi information required hai abhi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Jaise matlab?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: College se related?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi 12th pass out hu main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan 12th pass out hai to aap B.Tech ke liye plan kar rahe the na? Delhi NCR location mein dekh rahe the colleges, matlab 5 lakhs ke under.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan Delhi NCR Noida.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan haan. To abhi aapne apply nahi kiya kisi bhi college me? Kyunki ab to JEE ka bhi result aa chuka hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki dekho CS branch ke liye dekh rahe the na aap? To jaise almost saare hi exams ho gaye hai almost, to colleges ke bhi application jo hai wo start ho chuke hai na already. To aap, aap na apna application apply kar sakte ho colleges ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki aisa hota hai ki most of the time kya hota hai ki application na close ho jaate hai college ke ya fir seats full ho jaati hai CS ki.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To at least aap application apply karke rakh sakte ho Dilkhush. Jis bhi college me aap interested ho NCR location ke agar koi shortlist kiya hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To abhi maine to koi college dekha nahi udhar ka but.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaunse colleges dekhe abhi aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Maine matlab maine paper diya hua hai MHT CET ka paper diya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaunse college ka paper deke aaye ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: College ka nahi diya, wo Maharashtra colleges ke liye hai na private and government ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap rehne wale kahan se ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan main MP ka rehne wala hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha aap MP ka rehne wale ho, aapne Maharashtra CET ke liye diya hua hai exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To basically kya hota hai jaise Maharashtra CET ke liye aapne dekha, ke liye agar aap dekh rahe ho na to usme na bahut kam ratio hota hai jaise jinka domicile wahan ka nahi hai, usme hardly 10 ya 5% seats hoti hai dusre students ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap apne location pe ya other location pe bhi colleges ke liye apply kar sakte ho kyunki Maharashtra CET me jab tak aapka 90 above score nahi aayega tab tak achhe colleges nahi le paoge aap.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaafi achha score karna padega kyunki aap matlab other location se belong karte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To at least aap do chaar, ek do options aap rakho agar NCR me interested ho to NCR location ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap mujhe bata sakte ho ki agar NCR me dekh rahe ho ya fir kisi other location me dekh rahe ho to main aapko wo bhi share kar dungi kyunki hamesha na two options zarur rakhne chahiye, baad me koi regret na rahe ki main to particular college ke liye dekh raha tha but wahan hua hi nahi, to ab mere paas koi option nahi hai bilkul.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan to aap mere ko ye details WhatsApp kar sakte ho colleges ki?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main abhi aapko detail WhatsApp kar deti hu. Aap mujhe ek baar dobara apna location confirm kar do ki kis location ke liye aap interested ho. Fir se main aapko share kar dungi. Koi priority ho location wise to aap wo mujhe bata sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi aisa location ka koi maine wo fix nahi kar rakha hai, kahin par bhi le sakta hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki aapne na Kashi Institute bhi dekha tha. Kashi Institute ke liye bhi maine aapko detail share ki thi, Jaipur location ke liye bhi share ki thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aapne us time bola tha ki aisa kuch nahi hai but bas aap budget me hi dekh rahe the 4 to 5 lakhs ke around, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To main abhi aapko aur bhi colleges share kar rahi hu jaise KCC hai, ye NCR location me kaafi achha college hai. Invertis hai ye aapka Lucknow side me.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye aap dekh sakte ho aur fir agar aap Noida side me dekh rahe ho to GNIOT dekh sakte ho, kaafi achha option hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 5 to 7 lakhs ke around iska fee structure hai aur agar Mumbai, Mumbai me specially aap interested ho na Mumbai location ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wahan ke liye bhi main aapko particular colleges share kar deti hu Mumbai location ke liye. Jisme aap na ek do options apne liye rakh sakte ho jo ki achhe options hai colleges ke.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar rank ke through aa jaata hai to well and good hai, fir usse achha to koi option hai hi nahi ki agar aap matlab aapke rank ke through aa jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Otherwise jo baaki colleges hai agar Mumbai location ke liye aap dekh rahe ho, Pune location side ke liye dekh rahe ho, to unme aap apply kar sakte ho jo ki reasonable hai. Otherwise kyunki agar aap Pune side me jaoge to jo bhi achhe colleges hai na wo around 7, 8, 9 lakhs ke around hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wo aap option aap dekh sakte ho means Delhi NCR side jo aapke fee budget me hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur, haan haan, kar dena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko WhatsApp kar rahi hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Aap ek baar check karo aur agar aapko koi bhi aur college, aap apne side se bhi thoda research karo kyunki dekho basically kya hai admission ke liye to aapko hi jaana hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To aapko jo best lage aap uske according choose karna.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Main aapko share kar rahi hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes mam.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ya Mustafa main aapko bata rahi hu ki agar aap United aur D S U ka fill karte ho to zyada better hai as compared to Sharda, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: In dono ki ratings aur baaki ki cheeze jo hai wo better hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To aap in dono ka application form daal ke mujhe share kar do taaki main profiling ke liye aage bhej du aapko college se call aa jaye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To mam form abhi bhar du matlab NEET se pehle?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan abhi bhar do koi issue nahi hai kyunki baad me NEET ke baad to sabhi bacche daal rahe honge, aap agar abhi apna offer letter wagera leke rakh loge to aapke liye easy ho jayega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Application to aap daal sakte ho, seat abhi aap block mat karana wo NEET ke baad karwa lena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mam main chah raha hu seat abhi lock ho jaye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mam main to yahi chah raha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Accha theek hai to form fill kar do, college se call aa jayegi to aap block kara lena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To mam wo log ye nahi bolenge ki tumne NEET nahi diya tum pehle karwa rahe ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi aap.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi aisa kuch nahi bolenge aur aapne ek drop bhi to shayad liya hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes mam drop liya hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan to last year aap, haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Last year aapne M B B S diya tha, NEET diya tha?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi mam maine NEET nahi diya tha mam, bas last 12th tha mera last time mam.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Accha accha koi issue nahi hai aap unse keh dena ki main M B B S abhi appear kar raha hu aur appearing karke application daal do, hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai to fir mam matlab admission ka kya system rahega mam wahi sabse zyada.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo aapko connect karenge, aap mujhe ek baari admission team aapko connect back kar legi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi isme jaise United me aapka jo hai wo matlab sab me at least aapne NEET qualify kiya ho, inka interview conduct kiya jayega aur usi ke base pe hoga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To jab wo aapko connect back karegi admission team jaise hi aap form fill karke mere saath share karoge to kal ya parso aapke paas calls receive ho jayengi admission team se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To jaise hi call receive hoti hai to us case me aap apni team ko bol dena ki admission team ko ki main NEET is baar de raha hu, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: NEET appearing agar form me puchta hai to appearing daal dena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To fir mam aap rahengi call pe agar main invite karu jaise aapko?

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello, yeh Chhitij se baat ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji main Chhitij ka father bol raha hoon, aap kahan se bol rahe ho?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan sir, main Shiksha.com se baat kar rahi hoon, abhi aap free ho, aapne call back ke liye bola tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji, bataye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, toh abhi aapne sir kuch colleges humne us din discuss kiye the jaise CU, LPU, Kalinga, SOA, Amity, toh aapne inki details.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bilkul nahi, woh batana.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya sir?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Delhi ke aas paas, Noida.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha Delhi NCR location ke liye dekh rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan bas wahi dekh rahe hain, Noida.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Delhi NCR mein maine aapko pehle KCC bataya tha, aapne KCC ke application forms wagera dale hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: KCC?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: KCC Institute of Technology and Management karke hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Note kar kar le rahe, ek jagah note kar le.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: College ka naam toh note kar le hum.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya ho gaya sir, main details share karun aapko wapas se agar aapko nahi mila hai toh?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, nahi mila.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, main share kar de rahi hoon aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap aur batao, other kaunse college hai? Noida mein hi chahiye bas.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Noida ke liye hi bata rahi hoon sir, KCC dekh sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap Amity Noida dekh sakte ho, yeh colleges aapke paas available hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Amity walon se baat ho gayi thi, unke yahan woh trade nahi hai electrical wali.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Unke yahan baat ho gayi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, GNIOT hai, NIET hai, bahut saare colleges available hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapko sirf Amity, hmm bolo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aap bhej sakte ho list?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya sir, maine aapko details aapke aapko forward kiye hain WhatsApp pe, aap check out karo ek bari.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji, woh sabhi collegeon ka list hoga usme, hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Noida ke.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji sir, maine abhi aapko kuch limited colleges ke share kiye hain details.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, hum unhi se koshish karte hain, sampark karke apna dekhte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh kya doubts chahiye, aap batao toh main aapko nahi clear kar paun toh aap colleges connect kar lena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Electrical engineering with electrical vehicle, woh wala chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Electrical engineering with electrical vehicle?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, uske liye jo bhi options available hain woh main check karke aapko wapas se uski list bhej deti hoon, abhi maine jo bheja hai woh sirf electrical engineering ke liye bheja hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar electrical vehicle ke related kuch options available hai toh main aapko share kar deti hoon, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Electrical engineering ke saath mein additional course hote hain yeh.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Electrical, electrical engineering ke saath mein jo additional courses wale college hai, unki list de dijiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, done.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello, good afternoon, speaking with Ananya?

turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ananya main Sagar Saini baat kar raha hoon Shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aapne interest show kiya tha for B.Sc program, B.Sc pursue karne ka plan kar rahe hain Ananya aap?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haanji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, so Ananya yeh ek counselling call hai where we help you selecting best colleges aapke profile ke according, aapke preference ke according, okay?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes, toh abhi 12th ke exams complete ho chuke hain aapke?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually mera drop year tha NEET ka and it is not going to work out so I was looking for B.Sc options.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay got it, got it.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And which program you are targeting for?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Biotech.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: B.Sc Biotech.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And what was your score in 12th?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Seventy nine percent.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Seventy nine percent.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And any preference of location you are having where you want to target for the colleges?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Indore.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Indore na, okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Got it, so I can suggest you some good college in Indore as well.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And have you shortlisted any of the college that you want to target?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I was thinking about Medicaps University.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Medicaps University na, haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So Medicaps is also a good option that we can target for in Indore, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And if we talk about the selection of Medicaps, so Medicaps have their own entrance exam for the student.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Right, so on that basis they will, haan yes, perfect.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Correct, so on that basis they award you the scholarship and selection is also on that basis as well.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right, so Biotech is also available, it will be a three years degree and per year fees is around one lakh rupees without scholarship, so per semester is fifty thousand.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And overall if I give you review of university, so it's a NAAC A grade university, UGC approved university.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And they are having 3.8 rating out of five, established in 2000 itself, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So overall it is a good campus, right, mixed crowd you will be having.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right, majorly from the MP students are there and some student from like Delhi NCR also target for Medicaps or Indore as Sage Indore as well.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So Medicaps we can target for, their application is also live.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So first step is we will file the application, give the entrance exam and then accordingly we will get the scholarship and selection as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually I will be free after third May, before that I am not available for counselling or doing any type of registrations.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay okay, got it, got it.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So, and a few of my friends are also there.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And they were telling me ki MU-SAT is not mandatory for admission, I mean direct admissions are also there on the basis of 12th on my 12th percentage.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, few of your friends are already studying in the same campus?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah yeah.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So that you can also do, so even the process remains the same, right, you will file the online application.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Then directly if you get shortlisted, so you can directly go for the admission process without giving the entrance exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan, so that option you can also take, but the process remains the same.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And I was also confused about if they offer B.Sc Honors or standard B.Sc because I want to do B.Sc Honors.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: B.Sc Honors you want to do na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So they have B.Sc in Biotech.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right, Honors they have in Forensic Science.

turns.text: Okay, they do not have Honors no? I want to do plain B.Sc in Biotech, not Honors.

turns.text: You want to do plain B.Sc na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Plain, or you want to do Honors degree?

turns.speaker: User

[00:18 - 00:19] Counsellor: Hello.

[00:28 - 00:28] Counsellor: Ji.
[00:29 - 00:33] User: Aapne interest show kiya tha for B.Sc program, B.Sc pursue karne ka plan kar rahe hain Ananya aap?
[00:34 - 00:34] Counsellor: Haanji.
[00:35 - 00:41] User: Okay, so Ananya yeh ek counselling call hai where we help you selecting best colleges aapke profile ke according, aapke preference ke according, okay?

[00:43 - 00:45] User: Yes, toh abhi 12th ke exams complete ho chuke hain aapke?

[01:53 - 01:59] User: And overall if I give you review of university, so it's a NAAC A grade university, UGC approved university.
[02:00 - 02:04] User: And they are having 3.8 rating out of five, established in 2000 itself, right?
[02:05 - 02:08] User: So overall it is a good campus, right, mixed crowd you will be having.
[02:09 - 02:19] User: Right, majorly from the MP students are there and some student from like Delhi NCR also target for Medicaps or Indore as Sage Indore as well.
[02:20 - 02:23] User: So Medicaps we can target for, their application is also live.
[02:23 - 02:30] User: So first step is we will file the application, give the entrance exam and then accordingly we will get the scholarship and selection as well.
[02:31 - 02:38] Counsellor: Actually I will be free after third May, before that I am not available for counselling or doing any type of registrations.
[02:38 - 02:39] User: Hmm hmm.
[02:40 - 02:41] Counsellor: Okay okay, got it, got it.
[02:42 - 02:42] User: Hmm hmm.

[02:46 - 02:47] User: Okay.

[03:00 - 03:01] Counsellor: Yeah yeah.
[03:01 - 03:01] User: Haan haan.

[03:06 - 03:12] User: Then directly if you get shortlisted, so you can directly go for the admission process without giving the entrance exam.
[03:13 - 03:14] Counsellor: Okay.

[03:47 - 03:48] User: No no, plain B.Sc.

[03:55 - 03:56] Counsellor: Yes yes yes, that option you can take.

[04:24 - 04:24] Counsellor: Okay okay.

[04:28 - 04:28] Counsellor: Yeah yeah.

[04:34 - 04:35] Counsellor: Yeah.

[04:38 - 04:39] Counsellor: Sure sure, thank you.

turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes hi, good evening. Can I talk to Ayush?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Boliye aap.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mam main Tanya baat kar rahi hu team counselling shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ek second, ek second, ek second.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan bataiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi Ayush, this is Tanya. I am calling you from the team counselling shiksha.com.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually aapne na mujhe kafi saare colleges ka ek inquiry share kiya hua tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Maine aapko nahi kiya tha, main us pe dekh raha tha bahut saare.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha to yahan pe na aapne actually request call back pe click kar diya hai to aapko koi koi inquiry ke regarding matlab kuch puchna hai kisi college ya kisi cheez se related?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Koi sa bhi puch sakte ho?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan koi bhi aapne yahan pe bahut saare colleges search kiye hue hain. Amity Gwalior hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Amity Gwalior hi aa raha hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity Gwalior hai, Prestige bhi hai, G.L. Bajaj hai yahan pe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: G.L. Bajaj kiya hua. Ye Amity Gwalior jo hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To iska mujhe C.S.E. ka average package aap bata dijiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: C.S.E. ka average package, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek second.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, aapne apply kiya hua hai kya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi abhi apply matlab karne ki soch rahe hain, abhi bahut saare dekh rahe hain na to aap pehle iska bata dijiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap kahan kahan pe plan kar rahe ho aap iske alawa aur?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ek apna ye kya bolte hain aur S.G.S.I.T.S. karke hai iska Indore ka aur ek hai apna ye I.I.T. karke hai ek Indore ka aur bas yahi sab hai aur ek do aur dekhne hain abhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I.E.S. hai na Indore mein to?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi ek I.I.T. karke hai uska S.G.S.I.T.S. ke just baad hi aata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: J.E.E. bhi diya tha aapne abhi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan, J.E.E. diya tha na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kitna percentile aaya J.E.E. mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ninety three point three seven six percentile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: General category?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm, general hu main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nice.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright, so dekho agar iske main is saal ke current twenty twenty five ke placement ki baat karu B.Tech C.S.E. ka to inka jo on reported inhone mention kiya hua hai apna average package that is nine lakh sixty thousand, nine point six L.P.A.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Highest inhone apna mention kiya hua hai thirty five point nine L.P.A.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Matlab nau lakh, nau lakh saath hazaar, nau lakh saath hazaar inke C.S.E. ka average package hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes, inhone ye mention kiya hua hai jiske liye inhone apne resources bhi diye hue hain aur.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ab mujhe ek baat bataiye jaise ye sirf C.S.E. ka hai ya poora poora mila ke hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho, vaise overall hi count hota hai placement lekin jo highest hota hai na wo C.S.E. mein hi jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan wo to jaanta hu main C.S.E. mein hi jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur main ye puch raha tha ki jaise usme abhi main student reviews usme padh raha tha aapki website pe hi to student reviews mein matlab maine jitne bhi padhe abhi C.S.E. wale jitne bhi bachchon ke jo bhi nikal pass out ho chuke hain ya college mein hi hain to unne average likha hai ki matlab paanch se chheh L.P.A. mil jaata hai ya sattar percent bachchon ko baaki tees percent ko das, ten L.P.A. ke aas paas milta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur highest to jo jaata hai so jaata hi hai. To ye baat sahi hai ya aap jo bata rahi hain wo baat sahi hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi to maine aapko ye by verification kahan bataya hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Maine aapko normal inka jo twenty twenty five ka L.P.A. gaya hua hai wahi to bataya hai nine point six.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Average L.P.A. jo calculate hota hai na wo overall pe hota hai hamesha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab civil, biotech aur ye sab wale bhi?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, jo overall placement gaya hai usme highest ka bhi total calculated hota hai aur jo normal sabke placements hue hue hain normal packages ke wo bhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sabka sum ka total nikal ke fir average nikalta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usme aap log individually, individually aap log ye nahi bata sakte matlab kitne bachchon ko itne lakh gaya, kitne bachchon ko itne lakh gaya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho nine point six inhone average diya hua hai iska matlab seventy to seventy five percent student isi range mein fall kiya hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But wo shayad saat bhi ho sakta hai aur wo saade nau bhi ho sakta hai lekin average wahi nikalta hai jo sabse zyada hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To mostly seventy to seventy five student itna hi hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ab highest mein to inhone yahan pe thirty five, thirty six mention kiya hua hai jo ki gaya hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki inhone yahan pe apne resources bhi diye hue hain ki ye ek student data hai aur unhone wahan pe mention kiye hue hain details students ke ki in students ko mila hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Companies ke names bhi mention kiye hue hain to aap wo reality check dekh sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: C.S.E. mein kaun kaun si yahan pe companies aati hain?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: C.S.E. mein inke big jo recruiters hain wo hain Amazon, Cisco, Accenture, Capgemini, I.B.M., T.C.S., Cognizant aur inhone vaise Microsoft bhi mention kiya hua hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Chalo fir to theek hai university koi bekar nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan Amity ka to brand name bahut accha hai. Amity ka jo brand reputation hai na all over India wo bahut accha hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo to jaante hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur chaliye theek hai. Fees ke liye to khair maine baat kar li thi direct college mein hi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kis fees ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan to wo log mera kaafi had tak off karne ko taiyar hain percentile kyunki mera theek thak hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan wo to wo kar denge aur unka jo application hai uska koi cost to hai nahi, free of cost applications hain unke.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap wo karke unse offer letter to le hi sakte ho at least ye dekh sakte ho ki kitna tak aur final kar rahe hain wo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, baaki aur colleges mein try kar lo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab main licensing abhi main kar raha hu, ek do colleges mein aur main try kar raha hu jo matlab jitne kam mein karwa de aur jinka average jitna accha ho wo dekh raha hu main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aur kaun se colleges jo aapne mujhe bataya S.G.T.I.?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi S.G.S.I.T.S. government hai na jo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Dikkat ye hai ki mere ko jo government college mil rahe hain unme branches bahut acchi nahi mil rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usme matlab mechanical mil rahi hai aur ya fir electrical mil rahi hai. E.C.E. bhi acchi branch hai but wahi hai ki thoda matlab usme packages to itne acche nahi jaate hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aisa nahi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: C.S.E. to khair sabko hi chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: E.C.E. ke bhi bahut acche career growths hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Analyst hote hain E.C.E. wale kaafi log.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Analyst ka bahut accha package jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Development wale jo bhi bacche hain jo developers hain wo chahte hain ki wo analyst ke form mein chale jaaye matlab analyst ke usme chale jaaye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo wahi hai ki dekho jis profile mein aapko zyada interest hoga na aapko usme zyada advantages nazar aayenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But E.C.E. bhi accha hai agar aapko kahin milta hai na to aap wo kar sakte ho try.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab main koshish karunga S.D.E. ya fir S.D.W.E. ke form mein jaau kahin pe bhi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Dekhunga ab to college jaake pata chalega abhi to abhi kya hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan aap matlab kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aapko lagta hai to aap at least Amity ke liye proceed kar sakte ho admission process ke saath ki aap unse final unka offer letter ek baar le lo apne paas aur baaki colleges mein try karte raho back to back apni taraf se second option mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Fir jahan se zyada accha option milega agar unme mil gaya government colleges mein to best hai agar nahi milega to fir Amity matlab jo best option hoga usme chale jaana.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm, ye kar sakte ho kyunki unke Amity University Gwalior campus ka koi charges nahi hai kisi cheez ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha, baaki jo Noida campus hai aur ek do aur campus hai unke application ke cost hain process follow karne ke charges hain but Gwalior wale ka koi cost nahi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm, sahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap ye kar sakte ho, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko na message drop kar deti hu Ayush WhatsApp pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kuch puchna hoga ya kuch bhi data chahiye hoga aapko to mujhe contact kar lena main aapko share kar dungi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, Shiksha ke vaise mere ko aate rehte hain messages.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha, wo Shiksha ka na aapko jo normal auto generated messages hain na wo aate honge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan nahi wo brochure wagera bhi bhejte rehte hain bahut saare uske.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chaliye theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright, all the best, thank you, bye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you madam, thank you.

[02:08 - 02:09] Counsellor: J.E.E. bhi diya tha aapne abhi?
[02:10 - 02:11] User: Haan haan, J.E.E. diya tha na.
[02:11 - 02:13] Counsellor: Kitna percentile aaya J.E.E. mein?
[02:13 - 02:15] User: Ninety three point three seven six percentile.
[02:15 - 02:17] Counsellor: General category?
[02:17 - 02:18] User: Hmm, general hu main.
[02:19 - 02:19] Counsellor: Nice.
[02:20 - 02:32] Counsellor: Alright, so dekho agar iske main is saal ke current twenty twenty five ke placement ki baat karu B.Tech C.S.E. ka to inka jo on reported inhone mention kiya hua hai apna average package that is nine lakh sixty thousand, nine point six L.P.A.
[02:32 - 02:36] Counsellor: Highest inhone apna mention kiya hua hai thirty five point nine L.P.A.
[02:37 - 02:37] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[02:37 - 02:43] User: Matlab nau lakh, nau lakh saath hazaar, nau lakh saath hazaar inke C.S.E. ka average package hai?
[02:43 - 02:48] Counsellor: Yes, inhone ye mention kiya hua hai jiske liye inhone apne resources bhi diye hue hain aur.
[02:48 - 02:52] User: Ab mujhe ek baat bataiye jaise ye sirf C.S.E. ka hai ya poora poora mila ke hai?
[02:52 - 02:58] Counsellor: Dekho, vaise overall hi count hota hai placement lekin jo highest hota hai na wo C.S.E. mein hi jaata hai.
[02:58 - 03:00] User: Haan wo to jaanta hu main C.S.E. mein hi jaata hai.
[03:00 - 03:26] User: Aur main ye puch raha tha ki jaise usme abhi main student reviews usme padh raha tha aapki website pe hi to student reviews mein matlab maine jitne bhi padhe abhi C.S.E. wale jitne bhi bachchon ke jo bhi nikal pass out ho chuke hain ya college mein hi hain to unne average likha hai ki matlab paanch se chheh L.P.A. mil jaata hai ya sattar percent bachchon ko baaki tees percent ko das, ten L.P.A. ke aas paas milta hai.
[03:26 - 03:29] Counsellor: Hmm hmm.
[03:29 - 03:32] User: Aur highest to jo jaata hai so jaata hi hai. To ye baat sahi hai ya aap jo bata rahi hain wo baat sahi hai?
[03:32 - 03:35] Counsellor: Nahi to maine aapko ye by verification kahan bataya hai?
[03:36 - 03:41] Counsellor: Maine aapko normal inka jo twenty twenty five ka L.P.A. gaya hua hai wahi to bataya hai nine point six.
[03:41 - 03:46] Counsellor: Average L.P.A. jo calculate hota hai na wo overall pe hota hai hamesha.
[03:46 - 03:48] User: Haan matlab civil, biotech aur ye sab wale bhi?
[03:48 - 03:58] Counsellor: Nahi, jo overall placement gaya hai usme highest ka bhi total calculated hota hai aur jo normal sabke placements hue hue hain normal packages ke wo bhi.
[03:58 - 04:01] Counsellor: Sabka sum ka total nikal ke fir average nikalta hai.
[04:02 - 04:02] User: Theek hai.
[04:02 - 04:03] Counsellor: Accha.
[04:03 - 04:10] User: Usme aap log individually, individually aap log ye nahi bata sakte matlab kitne bachchon ko itne lakh gaya, kitne bachchon ko itne lakh gaya?
[04:10 - 04:16] Counsellor: Dekho nine point six inhone average diya hua hai iska matlab seventy to seventy five percent student isi range mein fall kiya hoga.
[04:17 - 04:23] Counsellor: But wo shayad saat bhi ho sakta hai aur wo saade nau bhi ho sakta hai lekin average wahi nikalta hai jo sabse zyada hota hai.
[04:23 - 04:26] Counsellor: To mostly seventy to seventy five student itna hi hoga.
[04:26 - 04:31] Counsellor: Ab highest mein to inhone yahan pe thirty five, thirty six mention kiya hua hai jo ki gaya hoga.
[04:31 - 04:38] Counsellor: Kyunki inhone yahan pe apne resources bhi diye hue hain ki ye ek student data hai aur unhone wahan pe mention kiye hue hain details students ke ki in students ko mila hai.
[04:39 - 04:40] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[04:40 - 04:44] Counsellor: Companies ke names bhi mention kiye hue hain to aap wo reality check dekh sakte ho.
[04:45 - 04:47] User: C.S.E. mein kaun kaun si yahan pe companies aati hain?
[04:47 - 04:56] Counsellor: C.S.E. mein inke big jo recruiters hain wo hain Amazon, Cisco, Accenture, Capgemini, I.B.M., T.C.S., Cognizant aur inhone vaise Microsoft bhi mention kiya hua hai.
[04:57 - 05:00] User: Chalo fir to theek hai university koi bekar nahi hai.
[05:00 - 05:06] Counsellor: Haan Amity ka to brand name bahut accha hai. Amity ka jo brand reputation hai na all over India wo bahut accha hai.
[05:06 - 05:07] User: Wo to jaante hain.
[05:08 - 05:12] User: Aur chaliye theek hai. Fees ke liye to khair maine baat kar li thi direct college mein hi.
[05:12 - 05:13] Counsellor: Kis fees ke liye?
[05:13 - 05:17] User: Haan to wo log mera kaafi had tak off karne ko taiyar hain percentile kyunki mera theek thak hai.
[05:18 - 05:23] Counsellor: Haan wo to wo kar denge aur unka jo application hai uska koi cost to hai nahi, free of cost applications hain unke.
[05:23 - 05:28] Counsellor: To aap wo karke unse offer letter to le hi sakte ho at least ye dekh sakte ho ki kitna tak aur final kar rahe hain wo.
[05:28 - 05:29] User: Haan.
[05:29 - 05:32] Counsellor: Haan, baaki aur colleges mein try kar lo.
[05:32 - 05:39] User: Haan matlab main licensing abhi main kar raha hu, ek do colleges mein aur main try kar raha hu jo matlab jitne kam mein karwa de aur jinka average jitna accha ho wo dekh raha hu main.
[05:40 - 05:42] Counsellor: To aur kaun se colleges jo aapne mujhe bataya S.G.T.I.?
[05:43 - 05:46] User: Nahi S.G.S.I.T.S. government hai na jo.
[05:46 - 05:47] Counsellor: Haan.
[05:47 - 05:51] User: Dikkat ye hai ki mere ko jo government college mil rahe hain unme branches bahut acchi nahi mil rahi hai.
[05:51 - 05:52] Counsellor: Accha.
[05:52 - 06:02] User: Usme matlab mechanical mil rahi hai aur ya fir electrical mil rahi hai. E.C.E. bhi acchi branch hai but wahi hai ki thoda matlab usme packages to itne acche nahi jaate hain.
[06:02 - 06:04] Counsellor: Aisa nahi hai.
[06:04 - 06:05] User: C.S.E. to khair sabko hi chahiye.
[06:05 - 06:07] Counsellor: E.C.E. ke bhi bahut acche career growths hain.
[06:08 - 06:10] Counsellor: Analyst hote hain E.C.E. wale kaafi log.
[06:10 - 06:12] Counsellor: Analyst ka bahut accha package jaata hai.
[06:12 - 06:19] Counsellor: Development wale jo bhi bacche hain jo developers hain wo chahte hain ki wo analyst ke form mein chale jaaye matlab analyst ke usme chale jaaye.
[06:19 - 06:24] Counsellor: Wo wahi hai ki dekho jis profile mein aapko zyada interest hoga na aapko usme zyada advantages nazar aayenge.
[06:24 - 06:27] Counsellor: But E.C.E. bhi accha hai agar aapko kahin milta hai na to aap wo kar sakte ho try.
[06:28 - 06:33] User: Haan matlab main koshish karunga S.D.E. ya fir S.D.W.E. ke form mein jaau kahin pe bhi.
[06:34 - 06:36] User: Dekhunga ab to college jaake pata chalega abhi to abhi kya hi hai.
[06:37 - 06:38] Counsellor: Haan aap matlab kar sakte ho.
[06:38 - 06:49] Counsellor: Agar aapko lagta hai to aap at least Amity ke liye proceed kar sakte ho admission process ke saath ki aap unse final unka offer letter ek baar le lo apne paas aur baaki colleges mein try karte raho back to back apni taraf se second option mein.
[06:50 - 06:58] Counsellor: Fir jahan se zyada accha option milega agar unme mil gaya government colleges mein to best hai agar nahi milega to fir Amity matlab jo best option hoga usme chale jaana.
[06:58 - 06:59] User: Hai na?
[06:59 - 07:05] Counsellor: Hmm, ye kar sakte ho kyunki unke Amity University Gwalior campus ka koi charges nahi hai kisi cheez ka.
[07:05 - 07:13] Counsellor: Accha, baaki jo Noida campus hai aur ek do aur campus hai unke application ke cost hain process follow karne ke charges hain but Gwalior wale ka koi cost nahi hai.
[07:14 - 07:15] User: Hmm hmm, sahi hai.
[07:15 - 07:17] Counsellor: To aap ye kar sakte ho, theek hai?
[07:17 - 07:20] Counsellor: Main aapko na message drop kar deti hu Ayush WhatsApp pe.
[07:20 - 07:25] Counsellor: Kuch puchna hoga ya kuch bhi data chahiye hoga aapko to mujhe contact kar lena main aapko share kar dungi.
[07:26 - 07:28] User: Theek hai, Shiksha ke vaise mere ko aate rehte hain messages.
[07:28 - 07:33] Counsellor: Accha, wo Shiksha ka na aapko jo normal auto generated messages hain na wo aate honge.
[07:33 - 07:36] User: Haan nahi wo brochure wagera bhi bhejte rehte hain bahut saare uske.
[07:37 - 07:38] Counsellor: Chaliye theek hai.
[07:38 - 07:40] Counsellor: Alright, all the best, thank you, bye.
[07:40 - 07:42] User: Thank you madam, thank you.

turns.text: B.Pharma, regular hi karna hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, kya preferred location rahega, kahan se karna chahte ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bhopal ya Indore se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bhopal ya Indore se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske alawa aur kisi location ke liye comfortable nahi ho?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Out of Madhya Pradesh comfortable ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi Bhopal aur Indore hi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bas Bhopal Indore, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapka 12th isi saal diya tha aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Isi saal barahvi ki pariksha di hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi result to aaya nahi hai, 10th mein kitna tha aapka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Result aa gaya na kal to.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 12th ka result aa gaya hai, okay, kitna tha 12th mein?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 78, aur dasvi mein kitna tha?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 81, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And abhi tak koi college mein apply kiye ya explore kiye hai aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, ek do college mein kiya tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaunse colleges mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: LNCT aur IPS Academy.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay fine, and koi entrance exam bhi diya hai ya dene ka plan hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi abhi nahi, nahi diya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Plan nahi hai, theek hai chaliye no problem.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki koi budget lekar bhi chal rahe ho kya fees mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan budget to hai, haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya budget rahega?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Budget 60-70 hazaar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek saal ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So haan ek LNCT University to ek option hai, baaki ek Sage University bhi ek option hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sage ka fees jo jaata hai wo chaar se paanch lakh ke kareeb jaata hai chaar saal ke liye aur Sage khud ka entrance exam conduct karta hai SAGEE.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kaunse college mein?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sage, Sage University Indore.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sage University.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, ek aapka RKDF University bhi hai Bhopal mein, yahan pe 3 lakh ke around fees hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek aapka Medicaps University hai, 6 lakhs tak, 6 lakh tak ka iska fees jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek aapka Shyam Global University hai, yahan pe bhi 3 lakh tak ka fees jaata hai, ek Oriental University hai, yahan pe bhi 4 lakh tak fees jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek Prestige bhi ek option hai, yahan pe 3 lakh tak fees jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, ek Swami Vivekanand University hai, 3 lakh tak fees jaata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity University Gwalior ke liye to chaliye aap comfortable nahi hai, warna wahan par 5.5 lakh ke around fees jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki main aapko na list bhej deti hoon ek baar colleges ka to aap ek baar go through kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko college ka na list bhej deti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap apne preferences ke hisaab se na shortlist kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And agar aapko kuch aur bhi colleges ka detailed information chahiye hoga na, to aap mujhe same number pe reach out kar sakte hain, main aapko share kar doongi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, baaki aapka koi alternate number ya email ID hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Like mere paas aapki na ek email ID hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Anurag Mishra 0987@gmail.com.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yahi hai email ID aapki?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske alawa bhi koi hai aapke paas?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi yahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chaliye theek hai, baaki aapke kisi friend ko bhi requirement rehta hai to aap mera number share kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, chaliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, no problem, thank you, have a great day.

turns.speaker: User
