full_text:
[00:15 - 00:16] User: Hello.
[00:16 - 00:17] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:17 - 00:18] User: Haan.
[00:18 - 00:20] Counsellor: Yeah hi good evening, Dhara se baat ho rahi hai meri?
[00:21 - 00:21] User: Haan.
[00:22 - 00:25] Counsellor: Hi main Anuj baat kar raha hoon shiksha.com se.
[00:25 - 00:26] User: Sorry?
[00:26 - 00:30] Counsellor: Dhara aap, main Anuj baat kar raha hoon shiksha.com se.
[00:30 - 00:31] User: Haan boliye.
[00:31 - 00:34] Counsellor: Dhara aap college search kar rahe hain apne liye?
[00:36 - 00:38] User: Haan for my son I was looking for.
[00:39 - 00:41] Counsellor: Okay ma'am, aap apne son ke liye dekh rahe hain.
[00:42 - 00:43] User: For my son.
[00:43 - 00:45] Counsellor: Okay ma'am.
[00:46 - 00:48] Counsellor: Okay okay ma'am. And ma'am kahan se belong karte hain aap?
[00:49 - 00:50] User: Mumbai.
[00:52 - 00:53] Counsellor: Mumbai se, okay.
[00:53 - 00:55] Counsellor: And ma'am colleges kis location pe dekh rahe hain?
[00:56 - 00:59] User: Mumbai mein hi chahiye mujhe, looking for colleges here only.
[01:01 - 01:02] User: In Mumbai.
[01:02 - 01:08] Counsellor: Okay. Aur abhi ma'am bachche ne like 12th mein abhi appear hai like unka result awaiting hai ya fir aa chuka hai?
[01:08 - 01:12] User: Nahi uska aaya nahi hai abhi tak but he is yet to give his NATA also.
[01:13 - 01:16] User: We are looking for B.Arch colleges in Mumbai.
[01:17 - 01:19] Counsellor: Okay B.Arch ke liye dekh rahe hain Mumbai mein.
[01:19 - 01:20] User: Haan.
[01:20 - 01:23] Counsellor: Okay. And ma'am koi competitive exam hai jo bachche ne abhi diya hai?
[01:24 - 01:27] User: Nahi abhi NATA uska hua nahi hai, May mein hai.
[01:27 - 01:28] Counsellor: Achha achha May mein hai.
[01:29 - 01:36] Counsellor: And iske alawa ma'am kisi college ke liye aapne register kiya ho ya fir koi aapka jo preferred college ho jismein aap dekh rahe ho uske liye?
[01:37 - 01:43] User: Nahi registered to nahi kiya but chaar paanch colleges thoda soch ke rakha hai so depending on the marks na.
[01:44 - 01:49] Counsellor: Okay. Actually ma'am main dekh raha hoon jaise Jindal ke liye aap dekh rahe the, Jindal School of Design and Architecture hai uske liye.
[01:50 - 01:55] User: Nahi I was just going through the syllabus and all. I am looking forward to colleges in Mumbai itself.
[01:56 - 01:57] Counsellor: Okay ma'am.
[01:58 - 02:06] Counsellor: To ma'am main aapko Mumbai ke colleges like jo top colleges hain jinke placements ya fir like agar aap accreditations wagera ki baat karein to jo ki bahut achhe hain.
[02:06 - 02:13] Counsellor: To unke bihaaf pe main kuch colleges aapko suggest karna chahunga like jo aapke liye comfortable rahenge like agar aap dekh rahe hain bachche ke liye to.
[02:14 - 02:18] User: Haan to mujhe if you could tell me colleges of Mumbai na that would be better.
[02:19 - 02:20] Counsellor: Sure.
[02:20 - 02:24] Counsellor: Okay ma'am abhi aap comfortable hain like baat karne ke liye to main aapko suggest bhi karta rehta like.
[02:25 - 02:26] User: Haan bol sakte hain.
[02:27 - 02:30] Counsellor: Okay ma'am to main ek minute mujhe lagega main check kar leta hoon like.
[02:43 - 02:45] Counsellor: Like B.Arch ke liye dekh rahe hain right ma'am?
[02:45 - 02:46] User: Right.
[02:56 - 02:57] User: Finish your food.
[03:06 - 03:10] Counsellor: And ma'am bachche ka ma'am 10th mein kya score hai bachche ka, kya like wo kya hai?
[03:10 - 03:12] User: 10th mein? Haan.
[03:12 - 03:14] User: 87, 87.
[03:14 - 03:16] Counsellor: Okay ma'am 87.
[04:11 - 04:14] Counsellor: And ma'am NATA ka koi like update hai bachche ka kab hone wala hai?
[04:15 - 04:17] User: NATA ka I am sorry what did you say?
[04:18 - 04:22] Counsellor: Ma'am bas NATA ke baare mein pooch raha tha like kaisa chal raha hai bachche ka kya preparation hai abhi?
[04:23 - 04:29] User: Haan matlab his preparation is going on but abhi his exam is on 8th of May.
[04:29 - 04:31] User: He is appearing on 8th.
[04:43 - 04:49] Counsellor: And ma'am koi budget issue leke like koi budget criteria leke chal rahe hain aap ki kitni fees tak ka college hona chahiye aisa kuch?
[04:49 - 04:51] User: Nahi.
[05:02 - 05:09] Counsellor: Ma'am Mumbai mein dekhiye ma'am Mumbai mein kuch colleges aapko suggest karunga jaise Amity University hai Mumbai mein jahan pe bachche ke liye course available hai.
[05:09 - 05:11] User: Where is that campus?
[05:11 - 05:13] Counsellor: Kya ma'am? Uska campus kahan hai?
[05:13 - 05:13] User: Amity ka?
[05:14 - 05:15] Counsellor: Ma'am Panvel mein hai uska.
[05:16 - 05:17] User: Achha.
[05:17 - 05:28] Counsellor: Haan. Aur ma'am Panvel mein Pillai ka bhi hai, Pillai College of Architecture jo ki Panvel mein hi hai aapka. And haan.
[05:28 - 05:37] Counsellor: Achhe colleges hain ye jo main aapko bata raha hoon like jo high in demands hain like Mumbai mein agar aap dekhenge accreditation hai ya fir placement records ke according hai to inka achha hai ma'am.
[05:39 - 05:40] User: Okay.
[05:42 - 05:44] Counsellor: Iske alawa bhi main aur colleges check kar leta hoon.
[05:46 - 05:49] User: There is Rachna Sharada also right?
[05:50 - 05:51] Counsellor: Yeah ma'am main check kar leta hoon.
[05:52 - 05:56] Counsellor: And ma'am Pune mein comfortable hain aap ya fir Mumbai hi chalega like?
[05:57 - 06:04] User: Nahi I am looking only for Mumbai right now. Agar score nahi hoga theek to fir we will think it over.
[06:05 - 06:06] Counsellor: Okay.
[06:13 - 06:19] Counsellor: Aur ma'am aapne I think abhi apply bhi nahi kiya hai ma'am because that aapko apply karna zaroori hota hai kisi bhi college ke liye.
[06:19 - 06:20] User: Kiska?
[06:20 - 06:26] Counsellor: Kisi bhi college ke liye ma'am jo bhi aap shortlist kar rahe hain application kyunki abhi application chal rahe hain saare colleges ke.
[06:26 - 06:27] User: Achha.
[06:27 - 06:29] Counsellor: Haan to bachche ka jo exam ka result.
[06:29 - 06:33] User: Score ke bina kaise application hota hai? Without knowing your score?
[06:34 - 06:36] User: Without knowing your score how do you apply?
[06:38 - 06:45] Counsellor: Ma'am jo application like hota hai kisi particular course ke liye kyunki abhi jo like admission ki proceedings wagera hoti hain colleges start kar dete hain.
[06:46 - 07:01] Counsellor: To bachche ka jo final result aane ke baad admission uska tab us time pe fir like perform hota hai hota hai lekin jo selection process hota hai like kuch university hoti hain jo inter-university exam karati hain wo khud ke exam conduct karati hain bachche ko lene ke liye.
[07:02 - 07:02] User: Okay.
[07:03 - 07:06] Counsellor: Aur kuch NATA ki ranking ke bihaaf pe karati hain. Right ma'am?
[07:06 - 07:07] User: Haan haan.
[07:07 - 07:11] Counsellor: To ye saari abhi proceeding wagera chalti hain to unke liye application mandatory hota hai.
[07:12 - 07:15] Counsellor: Aur application ma'am ye bhi hota hai ki eligibility ke liye hota hai bachche ke liye.
[07:15 - 07:20] Counsellor: Bachcha agar koi college university shortlist kar raha hai to uske liye wo apply karke rakhna hi rakhna hai use.
[07:21 - 07:22] User: Achha.
[07:22 - 07:30] Counsellor: Haan. Kyunki at the end like jab tak result aate hain hamare saare result declare hote hain almost saare colleges apna intake complete kar lete hain.
[07:30 - 07:34] Counsellor: To fir us samay pe thoda seat ko leke dikkat hoti hai fir bachchon ko.
[07:35 - 07:38] User: Achha. So you are suggesting that applications need to be filled in now?
[07:39 - 07:43] Counsellor: Of course ma'am kyunki abhi jitne bhi campuses hain sabke application open hain.
[07:44 - 07:44] User: Okay.
[07:45 - 07:52] Counsellor: Jaise Amity University hai uska bhi hai abhi jo aapka maine aapko bataya tha Pillai ka bhi hai to wo bhi active hai.
[07:53 - 08:02] Counsellor: Aur ma'am kuch to jaise LPU wagera hai agar aap other state ke liye dekhte hain LPU hai ya fir aapka Chandigarh University hai unke to deadline bhi like extend ho chuki hai.
[08:02 - 08:03] User: Achha.
[08:03 - 08:09] Counsellor: Haan. Unke unhone admission wagera bhi beech mein like application close bhi kiye the but abhi reopen kiye hain unhone dobara se.
[08:10 - 08:10] User: Okay.
[08:11 - 08:13] Counsellor: To ye isliye zaroori hota hai ma'am apply karna.
[08:14 - 08:15] User: Theek hai main dekhti hoon.
[08:16 - 08:26] Counsellor: Haan main aapko details share kar deta hoon aap ek baar go through kariye and application aap kar rahe hain to koi bhi guidance chahiye main aapko like guide kar dunga ki aapko kis tarah se apply karna hai aap mujhse pooch sakte hain.
[08:27 - 08:27] User: Okay.
[08:28 - 08:32] Counsellor: Aur abhi ma'am ek cheez main kuch batana chah raha tha.
[08:33 - 08:33] User: Haan.
[08:33 - 08:40] Counsellor: Like jaise abhi Amity University jo Mumbai hai uska jo application hai abhi non-chargeable hai like abhi free of cost apply ho raha hai.
[08:40 - 08:44] Counsellor: To aap uske liye proceed kar sakte hain koi bhi charge nahi de rahe bas bachche ko apply karna hai.
[08:45 - 08:46] User: Hmm hmm.
[08:46 - 08:59] Counsellor: Haan. NATA haan usme NATA aur NTA dono hi exam accepted unki cut off ke bihaaf pe bachche ka selection hota hai apply karna hai baki jab result jab bachche ka aa jata hai to uske bihaaf pe selection hota hai bachche ka.
[08:59 - 09:00] User: Okay.
[09:00 - 09:00] Counsellor: Okay.
[09:01 - 09:07] Counsellor: Same scenario Pillai ke saath hai uska bhi ye hai ma'am NATA and JEE Mains ke through bachche ka admission hota hai.
[09:08 - 09:08] User: Haan haan.
[09:09 - 09:10] Counsellor: Unke bihaaf pe to ye exam dena zaroori hota hai.
[09:11 - 09:15] Counsellor: NATA diya hai bachche ne to wo good enough hai selection ke liye.
[09:17 - 09:17] User: Theek hai theek hai.
[09:18 - 09:18] Counsellor: Okay ma'am.
[09:19 - 09:20] User: Okay. Thank you so much.
[09:21 - 09:24] Counsellor: And ma'am Pune mein comfortable hain aap? Pune ke main kuch colleges wagera aapko suggest karna chahunga.
[09:25 - 09:31] User: Nahi actually I am from Pune so I know colleges in Pune but right now he is not very keen to go to Pune.
[09:31 - 09:33] User: Let's see. Theek hai?
[09:34 - 09:37] Counsellor: Yeah sure ma'am. Main aapko inke details share kar deta hoon aap ek baar go through kar lijiye.
[09:37 - 09:38] User: Theek hai. Thanks.
[09:39 - 09:40] Counsellor: Okay ma'am.

turns.text: Plus yeh aapka SRM ho gaya ya VITs ho gaya, lagbhag matlab inse thoda sa down hai lekin matlab isi quality ka hai uska education.

turns.text: To jo Delhi NCR mein bachcha JEE wagera ke base pe apply karta hai aur agar woh Delhi NCR college dekh raha hai na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

[08:22 - 08:31] Counsellor: Haan matlab yeh maan ke chalo ki kuch kuch colleges mein kya hota hai na agar aap thoda sa theek thak category dekho to pandrah se bees ke beech mein matlab usually college jaate hain.
[08:31 - 08:32] User: Hmm hmm hmm.
[08:32 - 08:36] Counsellor: Ab wahi hai ki fees Thapar bhi aapka mehenga college hai, expensive hai, aisa nahi hai.
[08:36 - 08:40] Counsellor: JP bhi aap agar try karoge to JP bhi wahi pandrah solah lakh hai.
[08:40 - 08:41] User: Haan wahi.
[08:42 - 08:43] Counsellor: Tuition fees.
[08:44 - 08:49] Counsellor: To wahi cheez hai, matlab yeh hota hai ki ismein aapka investment return ho jaata hai actually na, kyunki college yeh achhe hain na.
[08:49 - 08:52] User: Haan achhe college lete hain to, ab SRM ka naam hai.
[08:53 - 08:55] User: VIT Vellore ka naam hai, BITS Pilani ka naam hai.
[08:55 - 08:56] Counsellor: Ji ji ji ji.
[08:56 - 09:00] User: Ab aap JP, JP ka bhi naam to suna hai maine, Thapar ka bhi.
[09:00 - 09:08] User: To inmein kya hai placement theek mil jayega ya fir kahin ka interview bhi dene jayega to kam se kam is naam se kuch farak to padta hi hai.
[09:08 - 09:17] Counsellor: Inke bachchon ko dikkat nahi aati, thoda sa jo waise college hote hain na basic college, usmein maybe thoda sa dikkat ho lekin ismein agar bachcha mehnat achhi karta hai to ismein dikkat nahi hoti.
[09:17 - 09:18] User: Hmm hmm.
[09:18 - 09:22] Counsellor: Aur dekho char saal bachche ko dene to obviously baat hai mehnat to karni hai, hai na?
[09:22 - 09:26] User: Haan mehnat to karega hi khair, woh jab itna paisa kharch karwa raha hai to.
[09:26 - 09:27] Counsellor: Haan ji.
[09:28 - 09:30] Counsellor: Baaki aap dekho ismein option leke dekho Thapar.
[09:30 - 09:33] User: Nahi Ashish ji aapse sampark karunga jab finalize karunga tab.
[09:33 - 09:34] Counsellor: Theek hai, theek hai, theek hai.
[09:34 - 09:35] User: Haan.
[09:35 - 09:36] User: Theek hai.
[09:37 - 09:39] Counsellor: [PAUSE]

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.text: Aapke father ke number se?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To phir Kashvi, ek cheez mujhe batao aap ki jaise hum apply kar rahe hain abhi college ke liye. Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.text: Aur agar abhi aap apply bhi karoge to usme aapka beneficial hai, kahin na kahin aapke paas option zyada honge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaipur mein ek college aur bhi hai, UEM karke. Aapko pata hai UEM college Jaipur mein? University of Engineering and Management.

turns.speaker: User

turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ab jaise Amity mein aapka free of cost hai, uski koi charges nahi hai. To same aise agar aap Jaipur ke liye bhi apply karoge to usme bhi koi charge nahi hai Jaipur campus ke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: UEM ka. To test agar aapko dena hai to aap abhi apply karwa dete hain aapka, batao.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha, dekhte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Agar karna hoga to phir karte hain iska.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bata dena mereko, phir main aapko guide kar dunga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, hi, good afternoon.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hi, good afternoon.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mujhe zara woh puchna tha ki BA Psychology ke liye pehle se pre-university form bharna padta hai kya after result woh forms hote hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi application to aapko pehle hi karna hota hai, woh must bhi hai. Agar aap pehle application karoge to baad mein aapko tabhi option milega na.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan to lekin abhi maine university ka kiya to kal woh form fill up karte waqt aadha matlab aadha form hua tha. Aadha abhi jab main teen char baar try kar rahi hu to submit ka option hi nahi ho raha hai, matlab aage hi nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaunse college ka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeh University, Mumbai University ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To actually mujhe na pata nahi chal raha hai ke result aane ke baad jaise 10th mein ek centralized admission procedure tha, to 12th mein bhi waise hi hota hai ya personal colleges ka alag alag form bharna padta hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi iske baad to aapko personal college ke hi form bharna padta hai alag alag separate. Aapne bhare bhi hai na shayad Amity wagera bhara tha aapne na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeh to matlab BSc ke liye kiye hai na. BA ke liye agar karna hai to, to bhi same procedure hota hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan same hota hai apply.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mumbai University ke yeh jo kuch colleges hai abhi to yeh Mumbai University ke under aate hai na, to yeh Mumbai University ka bhi form bharna hai ya inka alag alag bhi bharna hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi woh to aap Mumbai University ka form bharoge to wahan se aapko option mil jayega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Woh to aap MU ka form bhar lena. Baaki aapne aur kahan kahan apply kiya hai abhi colleges aap bata sakte hai mujhe?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi mujhe Somaiya mein ek entrance exam hai aur Amity ka kiya hai maine. Kyunki Amity thoda sa, ek to thoda doubt yeh hai mujhe hostel ka issue, lekin phir bhi try kar rahe hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur kyunki woh thoda near by hai Mumbai se to samjho kabhi weekend hai wagera to travelling karne mein aasani hogi aise.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur Mumbai mein to sirf do teen option hamare counsellor ne bataye the ke NMIMS hai aur yeh Somaiya aur Amity ke baare mein bataya tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur BA ke liye hai lekin woh mujhe pata nahi chal raha hai abhi BA ka kyunki main log soch rahe hai agar BSc Psychology nahi hua to BA Psychology ke liye try karte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Aapko maine do aur university batayi thi Pune ki, Vishwakarma aur.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan lekin woh Pune wagera hai na to phir yeh hostel wagera to bahut long distance hota hai phir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur jo DS University hai, maine aapko bataya tha ek aur.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: DS University karke maine aapko bataya tha, D S University.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Woh bhi Pune mein hi hai na woh sab.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan to isliye nahi. Yeh Amity bhi main yeh soch rahi hu ki matlab agar samjho kyunki hamare matlab hostel ka life kaisa hota hai kya, agar usko aana hoga ya travelling bhi kar sakti hai woh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity aapke paas mein padta hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thoda ek ghante ka aise train travelling hoga Panvel tak.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek ghante, matlab bachha manage kar sakta hai utna, hai na? Aap yeh keh rahe ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan. Agar samjho aise hua ki hostel ka nahi ho raha hai ya kuch financial hai issue wagera.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

[00:04 - 00:06] User: Hi, good afternoon.
[00:07 - 00:17] User: Mujhe zara woh puchna tha ki BA Psychology ke liye pehle se pre-university form bharna padta hai kya after result woh forms hote hai?
[00:17 - 00:23] Counsellor: Nahi application to aapko pehle hi karna hota hai, woh must bhi hai. Agar aap pehle application karoge to baad mein aapko tabhi option milega na.
[00:24 - 00:38] User: Haan to lekin abhi maine university ka kiya to kal woh form fill up karte waqt aadha matlab aadha form hua tha. Aadha abhi jab main teen char baar try kar rahi hu to submit ka option hi nahi ho raha hai, matlab aage hi nahi.
[00:38 - 00:39] Counsellor: Kaunse college ka?
[00:39 - 00:42] User: Yeh University, Mumbai University ka.
[00:43 - 00:58] User: To actually mujhe na pata nahi chal raha hai ke result aane ke baad jaise 10th mein ek centralized admission procedure tha, to 12th mein bhi waise hi hota hai ya personal colleges ka alag alag form bharna padta hai?
[00:58 - 01:05] Counsellor: Nahi iske baad to aapko personal college ke hi form bharna padta hai alag alag separate. Aapne bhare bhi hai na shayad Amity wagera bhara tha aapne na?
[01:05 - 01:12] User: Yeh to matlab BSc ke liye kiye hai na. BA ke liye agar karna hai to, to bhi same procedure hota hai?

[01:50 - 01:58] User: Aur kyunki woh thoda near by hai Mumbai se to samjho kabhi weekend hai wagera to travelling karne mein aasani hogi aise.
[01:58 - 01:59] Counsellor: Achha.

[02:16 - 02:20] Counsellor: But wo aapne waha pe campus me kya select kiya tha? Waha to aapne Vellore select kiya hoga, Vellore, Bhopal and all.
[02:20 - 02:24] User: Campus to baad me select hua na jab counselling start hogi abhi to kal exam hoga.
[02:24 - 02:31] Counsellor: Nahi nahi to wo aapka sirf India ke liye hi eligible hai. Mauritius ka jo hai wo admission process hi different hai.
[02:31 - 02:32] User: Okay.
[02:32 - 02:34] Counsellor: Main aapko bata deta hu ek second ruko.
[02:34 - 02:46] Counsellor: [PAUSE]
[02:47 - 02:51] Counsellor: Isme aapki jo fees hai wo bhi different hai, saari cheezein different hai usme aapki.
[02:51 - 02:53] User: Okay.
[02:53 - 02:59] Counsellor: Theek hai usme aapka website bhi alag hai uski.
[03:00 - 03:04] Counsellor: Usme dekho VITEEE aapka hai theek hai.
[03:05 - 03:11] Counsellor: Uski jo tuition fees hai wo around 5000 British pound per year hai.
[03:11 - 03:15] Counsellor: Ye aapka ho gaya 5-5.5 lakh ke something.
[03:15 - 03:16] User: Haan.
[03:16 - 03:20] Counsellor: To per year se aap calculate karoge around 30 lakhs ke something jayega wo aapka.
[03:20 - 03:21] User: Haan.
[03:21 - 03:26] Counsellor: Fir usme aapka visa and processing me bahut saare documentation hai.
[03:26 - 03:30] Counsellor: Aur usme aapke intake bhi Feb aur August me aate hain theek hai.
[03:31 - 03:33] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[03:33 - 03:40] Counsellor: [PAUSE] Theek hai samajh gaya.
[03:40 - 03:43] Counsellor: Usme thoda sa aapke chances thode se kam rehte hain.
[03:44 - 03:51] Counsellor: Vaise VITEEE ka exam to aap de sakte ho but yahi hai ke waha pe na bahut saari cheezein different hoti hain. Waha pe aapko student visa leke jaana padega fir.
[03:51 - 03:58] User: Haan. Wo to fir ek wo to fir aap ye samajh lijiye na wo to aapka ek tarike se ye ho gaya ke study abroad program ho gaya aapka.
[03:58 - 04:02] Counsellor: Haan. Matlab aap bahar country me jaake study kar rahe ho apne foreign study jisko hum bolte hain.
[04:02 - 04:03] User: Haan haan haan.
[04:03 - 04:07] Counsellor: Hai na wo to uske liye to fir bahut saari universities alag alag hain agar aisa kuch dekh rahe ho to.
[04:07 - 04:08] User: Okay.
[04:08 - 04:10] Counsellor: Hai na?
[04:10 - 04:13] Counsellor: Aur aapne Manipal ka kiya tha fill fir?
[04:13 - 04:16] User: Nahi uske andar mera baitha nahi mood sa.
[04:16 - 04:17] Counsellor: Matlab?
[04:17 - 04:21] User: Matlab like pehle hi bahut exam ho rakhe hain abhi.
[04:21 - 04:25] Counsellor: Matlab Manipal aapka achha campus hai aapne dekha nahi hai I think theek se.
[04:25 - 04:30] User: Vaise still mereko fir bhi itna wo nahi.
[04:30 - 04:34] Counsellor: In fact aap VIT aur Manipal ka comparison kiya tha aapne?
[04:34 - 04:35] User: Nahi ye nahi kiya.
[04:35 - 04:38] Counsellor: Ek baar karna chahiye tha na aapko. VIT Manipal ka comparison karo.
[04:38 - 04:41] Counsellor: Aur kaun kaun se apply kiye hain aapne?
[04:41 - 04:42] User: COMEDK.
[04:42 - 04:46] Counsellor: COMEDK to aapka theek hai wo to alag hai. Main university specific puch raha hu.
[04:47 - 04:48] Counsellor: COMEDK ke liye.
[04:48 - 04:50] User: Kiska? NIIT.
[04:50 - 04:52] Counsellor: NIIT theek hai.
[04:52 - 04:54] User: Laxmi Narain walo ka. Theek hai theek hai.
[04:54 - 04:59] Counsellor: Ek baar comparison karo. Comparison karoge aap tabhi to pata chalega aapko.
[04:59 - 05:01] User: Haan. Wo to dekh lunga main.
[05:01 - 05:05] Counsellor: Comparison karo kyunki uski na dates khatam ho jayengi fir wo problem aayegi usme.
[05:05 - 05:07] User: Okay.
[05:07 - 05:11] Counsellor: Theek hai. Ek baar comparison karo. Comparison karne me thodi na kuch jaa raha hai.
[05:11 - 05:12] User: Haan.
[05:12 - 05:21] Counsellor: Theek hai. Comparison karo kyunki MIT wo Manipal ka kya hai na Manipal ya MET jisko bolte hain hum uska jo entrance test hota hai usme aapko na exposure bahut achha milega.
[05:21 - 05:26] Counsellor: Kyunki uski ranking agar aap dekhoge na to third rank pe hai wo India me.
[05:26 - 05:27] User: Okay.
[05:27 - 05:31] Counsellor: Ab ranking hai to obviously kuch na kuch to hoga na.
[05:31 - 05:32] User: Haan.
[05:32 - 05:41] Counsellor: Aap VIT agar aap VIT consider kar rahe ho Manipal nahi kar rahe ho kyunki agar VIT me achha perform nahi kiya ho sakta hai aapne Manipal me perform kar diya achha to fees to lamsam dono ki same hi hai.
[05:41 - 05:43] User: Okay.
[05:43 - 05:51] Counsellor: Manipal ki bhi aapki around 11 aur 15, 15 to nahi hai I think 11-13 ke something hi hai. 11 aur 13 lakh ke something four years ki tuition fees.
[05:51 - 05:54] User: [PAUSE] Okay.
[05:54 - 05:58] Counsellor: Lekin Manipal ka karo to aap Bangalore campus hi karna. Bangalore campus uska main hai.
[05:58 - 05:59] User: Theek hai.
[05:59 - 06:01] Counsellor: Hai na? To wo aap kar sakte ho.
[06:02 - 06:04] Counsellor: Ye maine aapko last time bhi bola tha ye cheez to.
[06:04 - 06:05] User: Haan haan haan.
[06:05 - 06:09] Counsellor: Kyunki agar aap VIT nahi kar rahe ho consider to fir Manipal karne ki zarurat nahi hai.
[06:09 - 06:11] User: Achha okay.
[06:11 - 06:13] Counsellor: Haan kyunki VIT Manipal same hi category ke hain.
[06:13 - 06:22] Counsellor: Agar aapka VIT me nahi milta hai aapko branch kyunki ho sakta hai VIT me kya hai na aapka jo exam hai ab wo like aapka aa hi gaya aapka chaar din baad examination start hona hai.
[06:22 - 06:25] Counsellor: Aur jo Manipal ka exam hona hai wo aapka hona hai May me.
[06:25 - 06:26] User: Haan.
[06:26 - 06:29] Counsellor: Uski dates hain aapki 23rd 24th ke something.
[06:29 - 06:30] User: Haan.
[06:30 - 06:33] Counsellor: Hai na? To wo aapka May me hona hai.
[06:33 - 06:40] Counsellor: Aur dusri cheez aapki uski jo slot booking aayegi wo 9-10 ke something aayegi.
[06:40 - 06:46] Counsellor: To ek achha option rahega aapke liye. Aap thoda sa dekho comparison karo dono ka.
[06:46 - 06:49] User: [PAUSE] Theek hai.
[06:49 - 06:50] Counsellor: Theek hai dono ka comparison karo aap.
[06:50 - 06:53] Counsellor: Baaki koi doubt aaye to mujhe connect kar lena okay?
[06:53 - 06:54] User: Okay sir.
[06:54 - 06:55] Counsellor: Okay.
[06:55 - 06:59] Counsellor: [PAUSE]

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello, good evening sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, good evening sir, good evening.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji, good evening sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, good evening sir, good evening sir. Kaise hain aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bas sir, theek thaak.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir ek maine thodi query puchni thi jaise agar isko PEC mein jo neeche wale special rounds hote hain, usme admission mile mechanical mein, latest stage pe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur agar achha paper hua iska BITSAT ke andar to BITSAT mein se pehle mil jaye mechanical, to humein kaunsi option dekhni chahiye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Should we shift to again to PEC ya BITSAT hi zyada better hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye agar aapko PEC ka option mil raha hai aur aapko jo specialization chahiye wo specialization aapko mil rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap fir aap PEC ke side hi jaaiyega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha, reason sir?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Reason sir behind it because wo ek to pehli cheez aapki government university hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, cheap hai, theek hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dusri cheez to wahan par thoda sa bachchon ko exposure thoda zyada milega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Although BITS Pilani thoda sa brand value consider karta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To like agar second option aap dekh lenge na, to second option aapko BITS Pilani rakh lena chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki dekhiye jo aapki jo PEC ki jo counselling rahegi na usme abhi kya hai kuch surety nahi hai aapke paas.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ke aapko kaunsi, wo to last, last mein bhi shayad hi chance hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bahut rare chance hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wahi, ab usme surety nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aisa nahi hai ki usme aap apply mat karna. Apply karna proper, saari counsellings mein apply karna, saare rounds mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But by chance agar nahi hota hai kisi bhi XYZ reason se, tab hamare paas safer side ke liye kuch options hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To maine abhi student ka sirf Thapar ka application fill karwaya hai aur ek JP ka maine unko bataya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To kya hai dono hi abhi pending hain, wo Thapar ka to ho gaya unka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usme Thapar, JP ka bhi ho gaya.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: JP ka bhi ho gaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi, JP abhi pending hai aapka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, wo pending hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur JP, JP mein abhi kya hai na, dekhiye Thapar mein bhi abhi thoda sa pending hai. Thapar ki fees to ho gayi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Thapar mein aapka jo hai student ke documents abhi pending hain. Aap unka passport size photo, signature aur parents ke signature. Ye teen cheezein pending hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur JP mein abhi kya pending hai? JP mein aapki jo hai preferences to select karwa di thi maine. Usme na aapki account details aayengi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To in case agar aap in future jaake jaise agar admission ke liye aap jaate hain wahan pe JP mein aur aap baad mein chal ke jaise suppose aapne admission le liya aur baad mein aap agar refund karana chahte hain apni fees, to wo account details wahan pe maangi jaati hain. To usi, usi account mein aapka refund aata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ek to wo pending hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur usme bhi JP mein bhi aapka jo hai photo, signature aur parents ke signature pending hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur ek university maine student ko aur suggest ki thi, NIIT.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, jiska aapne mere se wo liya tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, NIIT mein ye hai, maine just check kiya, to pehli cheez student eligible hai aapke scholarship ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To around one lakh rupee ke something usko saal ki scholarship milegi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar wo apne percentage aur CGPA aur ya fir apne attendance, ye cheezein maintain karke chalta hai har semester mein, har year mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To jo ek lakh ki jo scholarship hai na, uske liye wo eligible ho jayega har saal mein. Yaani ki usko poore B.Tech mein apne chaar saal tak, chaar lakh tak ki scholarship mil sakti hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek to ye tha usme. Aur dusra na uska jo intake hai wo bahut kam hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To intake wise, intake means jo seat size rakhte hain na wo bahut kam rakhte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Taaki ek faculty, haan ek faculty ke upar thode se kam students aayenge na, to har students pe jo hai equally dhyan diya ja sakta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur ye kahan pe hai sir ye?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye aapki Neemrana, Rajasthan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Neemrana, Rajasthan, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur iska sir package kitne ka hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iska package aapka wahi hai 12 LPA ke something hai iska highest package, sorry average package.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. But isme sabse zyada important cheez ye hai ke iska intake kam hai na to students ka jo placement ratio hai wo bahut achha hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji. Aur sir tuition, tuition fees kitni hai iski? Matlab total jo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iski jo fees hai I think, main ek baar check kar leta hu. I think 14-15 ke something hai four years ki.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? But us pe jaise agar bachcha scholarship ke liye eligible ho jaata hai na har saal mein, to us pe chaar lakh ka to aapko easily scholarship mil hi jayegi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur dusri cheez, isme na bachche ka exam bhi hoga NIIT ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To agar exam mein achha score karta hai student, to us exam ke base pe agar bachche ki scholarship lagti hai to wo aapki extra scholarship ho jayegi is ek lakh ke alawa.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, okay ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ye isme bachche ko benefit mil raha hai. To ye sabse aap apna last option aap rakh sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ke in case agar aapka, aapke hisaab se achha hai waise ye university.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, iske hisaab, matlab aapke student ke hisaab se sahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki unki field jo robotics and AI hai aur isme bhi aapka mechanical available hai nahi. Inka jo main rehta hai wo artificial intelligence, robotics, cyber security, cloud computing, ye saari specialization rehti hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur dusra aapka electrical and communication. Jo ECE hota hai wo aapki main rehti hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To isme just ye do cheezein pending hain aapki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur baaki dekhiye aapke paas BITS ka option hai hi, Manipal ka option hai hi aapke paas.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Teesra Thapar ho jayega, JP ho jayega aur NIIT ho jayega. I think more than enough hai itna.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To sir ye BITS to jaise iske 88 percentile hai aur sirf 180 aaye the BITS ke andar.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To BITS mein to mere hisaab se 250 ke aas paas chahiye honge tab jaake shayad ho payega iska.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi abhi jo second attempt hai wo bhi to de raha hai na student?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji wo second dega tabhi hai na ji. Usme agar score karega 250 ke aas paas tab hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wahi maine student ko bhi, maine student ko bhi yahi bataya tha ke thoda sa apna ab exam pe focus karo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Options aapke paas hain available. Thapar mein aur JP mein to koi examination hona nahi hai aapka, wo to simple merit based hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wahan pe bhi aapke 50-50 chances hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Even mechanical mein to Thapar mein mechanical mein aapke zyada chances hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki Thapar mein aapka na CS ka cut off zyada jaata hai, mechanical aur ECE inka thoda sa kam hi jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, mechanical, electrical mein to shayad mera, mera cousin tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Electrical mein ho jayega iska.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan nahi main wahi bata raha hu. Percentage wise agar aap dekhoge na to Thapar mein chances kaafi achhe hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To ye do, ye itne option I think enough hain aapke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske baad to fir ek baar BITS ka exam ho jayega na, uska result aa jayega, Manipal ka exam ho jayega, uska result aa jayega. Agar un dono mein bhi chance nahi banta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Tab fir hum baad mein dekh sakte hain aur bhi options.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi fir usme to sir Thapar hai hi. Matlab aapke hisaab se ye hai ki agar by chance ye BITSAT kar leta hai aur PEC mein later wale rounds mein agar mil jaata hai to humein PEC mein jaana chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: PEC aapko fir select karna chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main priority to dekhiye apni wahi rakhiye government universities ki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar counselling mein koi university milti hai aapko, achhi university.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise PEC ho gaya ya fir koi other university aapko mil jaati hai ya koi JOSAA counselling mein to aap dekhiye NIT bhi bharenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar NIT koi milti hai aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki mechanical jo aapki branch hai na, mechanical mein thoda sa cut off kam jaata hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki saare bachche aaj ke time pe na CS ki taraf hi bhaag rahe hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ye ek plus point aapke saath to ye hai pehla to.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To baaki ek baar aap bachche se connect kar lijiye. Maine unko bata diya hai saara ID password unko bhej diya hai. To wo apne dono form apne complete kar lenge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir. Thank you ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Okay sir.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai. So kind of you sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, thank you sir, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

[01:32 - 01:36] Counsellor: To maine abhi student ka sirf Thapar ka application fill karwaya hai aur ek JP ka maine unko bataya hai.
[01:37 - 01:40] Counsellor: To kya hai dono hi abhi pending hain, wo Thapar ka to ho gaya unka.
[01:41 - 01:42] User: Usme Thapar, JP ka bhi ho gaya.
[01:42 - 01:43] User: JP ka bhi ho gaya.
[01:43 - 01:45] Counsellor: Nahi nahi, JP abhi pending hai aapka.
[01:45 - 01:46] User: Okay, wo pending hai.
[01:46 - 01:51] Counsellor: Aur JP, JP mein abhi kya hai na, dekhiye Thapar mein bhi abhi thoda sa pending hai. Thapar ki fees to ho gayi hai.
[01:51 - 01:59] Counsellor: Thapar mein aapka jo hai student ke documents abhi pending hain. Aap unka passport size photo, signature aur parents ke signature. Ye teen cheezein pending hain.
[02:00 - 02:00] User: Theek hai sir.
[02:01 - 02:08] Counsellor: Aur JP mein abhi kya pending hai? JP mein aapki jo hai preferences to select karwa di thi maine. Usme na aapki account details aayengi.
[02:08 - 02:23] Counsellor: To in case agar aap in future jaake jaise agar admission ke liye aap jaate hain wahan pe JP mein aur aap baad mein chal ke jaise suppose aapne admission le liya aur baad mein aap agar refund karana chahte hain apni fees, to wo account details wahan pe maangi jaati hain. To usi, usi account mein aapka refund aata hai.
[02:24 - 02:25] Counsellor: To ek to wo pending hai.
[02:26 - 02:30] Counsellor: Aur usme bhi JP mein bhi aapka jo hai photo, signature aur parents ke signature pending hain.
[02:31 - 02:31] User: Theek hai ji.
[02:32 - 02:35] Counsellor: Aur ek university maine student ko aur suggest ki thi, NIIT.
[02:35 - 02:37] User: Theek hai, jiska aapne mere se wo liya tha.
[02:37 - 02:43] Counsellor: Haan, NIIT mein ye hai, maine just check kiya, to pehli cheez student eligible hai aapke scholarship ke liye.
[02:44 - 02:48] Counsellor: To around one lakh rupee ke something usko saal ki scholarship milegi.
[02:49 - 02:49] User: Theek hai ji.
[02:50 - 02:58] Counsellor: Aur agar wo apne percentage aur CGPA aur ya fir apne attendance, ye cheezein maintain karke chalta hai har semester mein, har year mein.
[02:58 - 03:05] Counsellor: To jo ek lakh ki jo scholarship hai na, uske liye wo eligible ho jayega har saal mein. Yaani ki usko poore B.Tech mein apne chaar saal tak, chaar lakh tak ki scholarship mil sakti hai.
[03:06 - 03:06] User: Theek hai ji.
[03:07 - 03:11] Counsellor: Ek to ye tha usme. Aur dusra na uska jo intake hai wo bahut kam hai.
[03:13 - 03:16] Counsellor: To intake wise, intake means jo seat size rakhte hain na wo bahut kam rakhte hain.
[03:16 - 03:23] Counsellor: Taaki ek faculty, haan ek faculty ke upar thode se kam students aayenge na, to har students pe jo hai equally dhyan diya ja sakta hai.
[03:24 - 03:24] User: Theek hai ji.
[03:25 - 03:25] User: Aur ye kahan pe hai sir ye?
[03:25 - 03:28] Counsellor: Ye aapki Neemrana, Rajasthan.
[03:28 - 03:30] User: Neemrana, Rajasthan, theek hai.
[03:30 - 03:30] Counsellor: Haan.
[03:31 - 03:32] User: Aur iska sir package kitne ka hai?
[03:32 - 03:36] Counsellor: Iska package aapka wahi hai 12 LPA ke something hai iska highest package, sorry average package.
[03:37 - 03:37] User: Theek hai ji.
[03:38 - 03:44] Counsellor: Haan. But isme sabse zyada important cheez ye hai ke iska intake kam hai na to students ka jo placement ratio hai wo bahut achha hai.
[03:45 - 03:48] User: Theek hai ji. Aur sir tuition, tuition fees kitni hai iski? Matlab total jo.
[03:48 - 03:54] Counsellor: Iski jo fees hai I think, main ek baar check kar leta hu. I think 14-15 ke something hai four years ki.
[03:55 - 03:55] User: Theek hai ji.
[03:56 - 04:02] Counsellor: Theek hai? But us pe jaise agar bachcha scholarship ke liye eligible ho jaata hai na har saal mein, to us pe chaar lakh ka to aapko easily scholarship mil hi jayegi.
[04:03 - 04:06] Counsellor: Aur dusri cheez, isme na bachche ka exam bhi hoga NIIT ka.
[04:07 - 04:15] Counsellor: To agar exam mein achha score karta hai student, to us exam ke base pe agar bachche ki scholarship lagti hai to wo aapki extra scholarship ho jayegi is ek lakh ke alawa.
[04:15 - 04:16] User: Okay, okay ji.
[04:17 - 04:21] Counsellor: To ye isme bachche ko benefit mil raha hai. To ye sabse aap apna last option aap rakh sakte ho.
[04:21 - 04:25] User: Ke in case agar aapka, aapke hisaab se achha hai waise ye university.
[04:25 - 04:28] Counsellor: Haan, iske hisaab, matlab aapke student ke hisaab se sahi hai.
[04:28 - 04:39] Counsellor: Kyunki unki field jo robotics and AI hai aur isme bhi aapka mechanical available hai nahi. Inka jo main rehta hai wo artificial intelligence, robotics, cyber security, cloud computing, ye saari specialization rehti hain.
[04:40 - 04:40] User: Theek hai ji.
[04:40 - 04:45] Counsellor: Aur dusra aapka electrical and communication. Jo ECE hota hai wo aapki main rehti hai.
[04:46 - 04:46] User: Theek hai ji.
[04:47 - 04:50] Counsellor: To isme just ye do cheezein pending hain aapki.
[04:51 - 04:55] Counsellor: Aur baaki dekhiye aapke paas BITS ka option hai hi, Manipal ka option hai hi aapke paas.
[04:55 - 04:59] Counsellor: Teesra Thapar ho jayega, JP ho jayega aur NIIT ho jayega. I think more than enough hai itna.
[05:00 - 05:00] User: Theek hai.
[05:01 - 05:06] User: To sir ye BITS to jaise iske 88 percentile hai aur sirf 180 aaye the BITS ke andar.
[05:06 - 05:10] User: To BITS mein to mere hisaab se 250 ke aas paas chahiye honge tab jaake shayad ho payega iska.
[05:10 - 05:12] Counsellor: Nahi abhi jo second attempt hai wo bhi to de raha hai na student?
[05:13 - 05:17] User: Haan ji wo second dega tabhi hai na ji. Usme agar score karega 250 ke aas paas tab hai.
[05:17 - 05:18] Counsellor: Haan.
[05:18 - 05:22] Counsellor: To wahi maine student ko bhi, maine student ko bhi yahi bataya tha ke thoda sa apna ab exam pe focus karo.
[05:23 - 05:29] Counsellor: Theek hai? Options aapke paas hain available. Thapar mein aur JP mein to koi examination hona nahi hai aapka, wo to simple merit based hai.
[05:30 - 05:32] Counsellor: To wahan pe bhi aapke 50-50 chances hain.
[05:33 - 05:36] Counsellor: Even mechanical mein to Thapar mein mechanical mein aapke zyada chances hain.
[05:37 - 05:42] Counsellor: Kyunki Thapar mein aapka na CS ka cut off zyada jaata hai, mechanical aur ECE inka thoda sa kam hi jaata hai.
[05:43 - 05:46] User: Nahi, mechanical, electrical mein to shayad mera, mera cousin tha.
[05:48 - 05:49] User: Electrical mein ho jayega iska.
[05:49 - 05:50] Counsellor: Haan.
[05:50 - 05:50] User: Haan ji.
[05:51 - 05:55] Counsellor: Haan nahi main wahi bata raha hu. Percentage wise agar aap dekhoge na to Thapar mein chances kaafi achhe hain.
[05:56 - 05:56] User: Theek hai ji.
[05:56 - 05:59] Counsellor: Theek hai? To ye do, ye itne option I think enough hain aapke liye.
[06:00 - 06:00] User: Theek hai ji.
[06:01 - 06:08] Counsellor: Iske baad to fir ek baar BITS ka exam ho jayega na, uska result aa jayega, Manipal ka exam ho jayega, uska result aa jayega. Agar un dono mein bhi chance nahi banta hai.
[06:09 - 06:11] Counsellor: Tab fir hum baad mein dekh sakte hain aur bhi options.
[06:11 - 06:19] User: Nahi fir usme to sir Thapar hai hi. Matlab aapke hisaab se ye hai ki agar by chance ye BITSAT kar leta hai aur PEC mein later wale rounds mein agar mil jaata hai to humein PEC mein jaana chahiye.
[06:20 - 06:20] Counsellor: Haan.
[06:21 - 06:21] User: Theek hai.
[06:21 - 06:22] Counsellor: PEC aapko fir select karna chahiye.
[06:22 - 06:25] Counsellor: Main priority to dekhiye apni wahi rakhiye government universities ki.
[06:26 - 06:30] Counsellor: Agar counselling mein koi university milti hai aapko, achhi university.
[06:30 - 06:37] Counsellor: Jaise PEC ho gaya ya fir koi other university aapko mil jaati hai ya koi JOSAA counselling mein to aap dekhiye NIT bhi bharenge.
[06:38 - 06:40] Counsellor: Agar NIT koi milti hai aapko.
[06:42 - 06:46] Counsellor: Kyunki mechanical jo aapki branch hai na, mechanical mein thoda sa cut off kam jaata hai.
[06:47 - 06:47] User: Achha ji.
[06:48 - 06:50] Counsellor: Kyunki saare bachche aaj ke time pe na CS ki taraf hi bhaag rahe hain.
[06:51 - 06:51] User: Theek hai ji.
[06:52 - 06:54] Counsellor: To ye ek plus point aapke saath to ye hai pehla to.
[06:55 - 06:55] User: Theek hai ji.
[06:56 - 07:03] Counsellor: Theek hai? To baaki ek baar aap bachche se connect kar lijiye. Maine unko bata diya hai saara ID password unko bhej diya hai. To wo apne dono form apne complete kar lenge.
[07:03 - 07:04] User: Theek hai sir. Thank you ji.
[07:04 - 07:05] Counsellor: Theek hai? Okay sir.
[07:06 - 07:07] User: Theek hai. So kind of you sir.
[07:07 - 07:08] Counsellor: Okay, thank you sir, thank you.
[07:08 - 07:09] User: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So I hope agar aapne explore kiya toh fee structure, kya placement package jaata hai, yeh saari cheezein aapne explore ki hongi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske regarding kahin bhi aapko confusion hai toh aap discuss kar sakte hain because Shiksha.com jo portal hai comparison portal hai, multiple universities available hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap apne according kya aapki priority hai, woh aap apne according shortlist kar sakte hain, filter laga sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya like, obviously baat hai na student ki priority hoti hai placement se related, kya package hai and budget wise.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So uske according saare aapke show kar rahe honge. Main aapko share kar dungi in teeno university ka, aap khud bhi ek baar explore kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan I see.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So main aapko ek baar detail share kar rahi hoon teeno university ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Meanwhile aap ek kaam karna, student ka aap mujhe email ID and contact number share kar dena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jo bhi obviously baat hai agar unko process karna hoga toh woh apna hi prefer karenge choose karna, right? Detail.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: User

[06:16 - 06:19] Counsellor: Jaise ki aap M I T W P U bhi aapne check kiya hi hai pehle.
[06:19 - 06:20] User: Wo to bahut zyada fee hai.
[06:20 - 06:22] Counsellor: Haan bahut zyada fee hai na, nahi ek aapka waha par bhi college hai.
[06:23 - 06:27] Counsellor: Pimpri Chinchwad karke, Pimpri Chinchwad University.
[06:27 - 06:28] Counsellor: Wo bhi aap like.
[06:28 - 06:29] User: Pimpri na?
[06:29 - 06:34] Counsellor: Haan wo bhi aap dekh sakte hain, wo bhi ek achha option hai, wo aapka saat aath lakh rupaye ke budget mein hi hai.

[06:38 - 06:40] Counsellor: Uska main dekh leta hu ek baari aapke liye.

[06:49 - 06:54] Counsellor: Pimpri Chinchwad ka dekhiye, isme jo placements hain.
[06:54 - 06:56] User: Haan, main aapko bata deta hu.
[06:56 - 06:59] Counsellor: Dekhiye last year jo highest package tha wo to sixty one lakh rupees tha.
[07:00 - 07:04] Counsellor: Aur eighty, eighty five percent batch place hua tha, theek hai?
[07:04 - 07:11] Counsellor: Jisme average placement jo gaya tha inka was five point five lakh rupees.
[07:12 - 07:13] User: Oh.
[07:13 - 07:14] Counsellor: Median salary.
[07:16 - 07:19] Counsellor: Aur iska jo fee structure hai jo aap puch rahe hain mujhse.
[07:19 - 07:23] Counsellor: Iska like application fees bhi hai, hazar barah sau ka application fees bhi hai isme.
[07:24 - 07:29] Counsellor: Aur agar aap B.Tech C S C karte hain to chheh lakh rupaye four years ka fee structure hai iska Pimpri ka.
[07:30 - 07:37] Counsellor: Aur degree aayegi aapki University of Pune, Savitribai Phule Pune University.
[07:39 - 07:45] Counsellor: Ye bhi maine aapko like share kar diya hai WhatsApp pe taaki aap study kar paye iske baare mein.
[07:47 - 07:55] Counsellor: Aap pehle hum ye kar lete hain kuch campuses waise wale apply kar lete hain aur ye jo aap Ranchi bol rahe hain wo aur ek Pimpri apply kar lete hain.
[07:55 - 07:58] Counsellor: Achhe ek hamare paas colleges apply ho jayenge.
[07:58 - 08:03] Counsellor: Fir like hum fir hum wait kar sakte hain twelfth ke results ka aur uske baad hum decision lenge.
[08:03 - 08:12] Counsellor: Abhi hum kisi bhi college ko ye commit nahi karenge ki hamara admission aap kara dijiye kyunki abhi humein ye dekhna hai ki hamara agar percentage ninety ke aas paas aa jaata hai, aa bhi sakta hai.
[08:12 - 08:14] Counsellor: To hum scholarship demand karenge college se.
[08:14 - 08:15] User: Achha.
[08:15 - 08:16] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[08:16 - 08:17] User: Theek.
[08:18 - 08:23] Counsellor: To ek baari aap mujhe details share kijiye aur document share kijiye main yaha se aapka application bharna shuru karta hu.
[08:24 - 08:27] User: Matlab jo abhi free hai wo wala bhar rahe hain na?
[08:27 - 08:29] Counsellor: Abhi for the timing wo bhar deta hu.
[08:29 - 08:37] Counsellor: Waise dekhiye pan India mein na matlab ki poore India mein saat campuses abhi for the timing application jo hai uske waived off hain.
[08:37 - 08:38] User: Achha.
[08:39 - 08:42] Counsellor: To main teen char jo achhe hain unko hi apply karunga aapke liye.
[08:42 - 08:43] User: Haan.
[08:43 - 08:44] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[08:44 - 08:51] Counsellor: Aur Amity Ranchi ka jab aap like succeed karna chahenge aapko like pandrah sau rupaye application fees hai jaise ki maine aapko bataya.
[08:51 - 08:54] Counsellor: To wo aap jab mujhe bolenge tab main wo wala bhi kar dunga.
[08:55 - 08:58] User: Haan wo to kar denge application fee to pay ho jayega.
[08:58 - 09:01] Counsellor: Haan to aap mujhe details bhejiye main start karta hu yaha se aapke liye.
[09:02 - 09:07] Counsellor: Fir usme time bhi lagta hai na isko like ek application ko apply karne mein fifteen twenty minutes lagte hain.
[09:07 - 09:12] Counsellor: Haan pehli wali hi apply karna bas to time lega baaki wali bahut easily ho jayengi.
[09:13 - 09:14] User: Theek hai main aapko share kar deta hu.
[09:15 - 09:18] Counsellor: Haan aap kijiye maine WhatsApp pe share kiya hai aapko us pe details bhej dijiye.
[09:18 - 09:19] User: Aadhaar bhi chahiye?
[09:19 - 09:24] Counsellor: Aadhaar chahiye, aapka tenth ka marksheet, ek photograph aur bas.
[09:24 - 09:31] Counsellor: Aur document mein yahi chahiye, details maine aapko ek format mein share kiya hai, usi format mein please mujhe share karna same format.
[09:31 - 09:32] User: Theek.
[09:32 - 09:34] Counsellor: Theek hai, main aapko bhej raha hu.
[09:34 - 09:37] User: [UNINTELLIGIBLE].

Aapko placement, fee structure, saari cheezein dikh jayengi, theek hai?

[09:31 - 09:36] User: Theek hai, okay sir aap send kar dijiye, main saara cheez check karke phir uske baad aapko call karta hoon.
[09:36 - 09:38] Counsellor: Theek hai, maine aapko share kar diya hai list.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello, yeah hi, Karan Kumar se baat ho raha hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi Karan, main Orko bol raha tha shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually aapne B.Tech computer science ke liye search kar rahe the colleges, plan kar rahe hai aap for the admission?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mujhe college mil gaya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kahan pe liya hai aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Patna.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Patna mein kaunsi college mein? Amity Patna mein liya hai aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity Patna mein kya process kara hai abhi tak aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bas wahi counselling ka to bole hai ki theek hai, aaiye Patna mein to baat wahin pe office mein bulaya gaya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To basically dekho Amity Patna mein aap lena chah rahe ho to Amity Patna mein aapko pehle registration karna padega, 1500 ka registration hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske bihaf pe aapka profiling hoga, profiling ke bihaf mein aapka process hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapko yeh bataya nahi gaya tha 1500 rupaye ka application ke baare mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wahan jayenge batayenge process kaise kya karna hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, to kab tak visit karoge aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Das din mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Das din mein visit karoge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Tab tak ke liye aap registration fill up karke chalo kyunki abhi colleges mein bahut rush chal raha hai for the admission purpose, aap pehle se registration karke chalo, Amity Patna Google pe search karna aap, uska official site mein open hoga, open hoke aap application fill up kar paoge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Uska.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai aur Amity Patna mein abhi registration karke chaloge to wahan pe jaake aapko entertain bhi karega, college ke baare mein aur bhi cheezein bataya jayega aur aap us din aap sab kuch agree karte ho to aapko 10,000 deke aap seat lock kara lena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But aap 1500 rupaye ka registration karke rakhte ho to aapke paas jo scholarship hoga usme zyada benefit dekhne ko milta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai dekhenge jaise better lagega waise karenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan to kab tak fill up karoge aap registration?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ab iska to nahi bata sakte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap interested ho na is saal admission lene ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan to phir aap registration karke chalo, aapne koi college mein registration karaya hai abhi tak?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apply wagera kara hai registration, application wagera complete kara hai koi college mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To abhi application to nahi karoge to aap Amity Patna mein aap jaana chah rahe ho to aapko karke chalna padega na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi entrance examination diye ho JEE Mains wagera?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mains diye hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kitna score aaya wahan pe?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 92 percentile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kitna?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 92 percentile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 92 percentile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 92 percentile mein dekho NITs to milna thoda sa challenging hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Last round tak wait karo, koi reservation criteria se belong karte hai aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Category?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi reservation criteria means general, SC, ST, koi reservation criteria se belong karte ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: SC.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: SC na? To aapko milne ka chances hai NITs mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap Amity Patna ke liye kyun jaana chah rahe ho phir?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: NIT, NIT mein hi jaana hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap to abhi Amity Patna.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Advance ke, Advance ke exam ho jayega na, uske baad se jo jaisa percentile rahega us hisab se apna college dekhenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai koi issue nahi main samajh gaya but phir tab to phir aapka seat locking karne ka koi matlab nahi banta, aap just aap registration karke rakho phir as a backup option.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kal ke date mein aapka suppose maan ke chalo IITs wagera mein nahi hota hai to Amity Patna ka option rahega aapke paas.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapka minimally charge rahega 1500 rupaye ka registration hota hai, wo aap karke rakho to aapke paas ek backup option rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hamesha backup option leke chalo wo zyada better rahega na aapke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai dekhte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay no issue, thank you.

turns.text: Achha, kya reason hai jo UP mein nahi dekh rahe hain aap?

turns.text: Yes mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, theek hai.

turns.text: Koi issue nahi hai, phir aap jaa sakte ho colleges ke regarding, yeh achhe top colleges ke andar aa jaate hain, toh aap consider kar sakte ho, SRM jaa sakte ho, Jain jaa sakte ho, Christ phir bhi thoda sa management ke liye college aa jaata hai aapka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But still agar aap brand value wise consider karo toh Christ bhi ek decent option aa jayega.

turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.text: Main Santoshi Neha baat kar rahi hu shiksha.com se, aapki call back request proceed kari hai humne B.Tech course ke regarding.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap colleges vagera search out kar rahe ho B.Tech ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay Santoshi, to abhi jaise aap colleges search kar rahe hain B.Tech course ke liye, to aap mujhe bata sakte ho ki abhi aapne apna 12th complete kiya hai ya nahi kiya hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am abhi 12th complete kar diya, uska result aana baaki hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, kis year mein complete kiya tha 12th?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi achha 2020 abhi chal raha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan, result aana aapke baaki hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, and mujhe yeh batao ki abhi koi entrance exam vagera kuch diya hai ki nahi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Diya tha ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kaun kaun se entrance exams appear kiya hai ya abhi karne wale ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am abhi JEE Main ka diya tha, usme fir percentile badi low aayi thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kitni percentile thi JEE mein beta?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am 27 aayi thi, matlab overall marks subjective hi theek the par physics mein bahut kam aaye the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Uski vajah se percentile kam ho gayi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, to mujhe yeh batao ki jaise aap general category se belong karte ho ya reserve category se?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am OBC se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So OBC se bhi aapko JEE ke through to koi bhi college mil paana thoda sa mushkil hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To abhi aapne other koi college vagera search kiya hai ya abhi fill karne ka soch rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am abhi search kiya tha Punjab University aur ek do teen college search kiye the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Par uska fir samajh nahi aa raha tha na ki placement kaisa hai, fir fee structure aur fir woh bhi bahut tha kuch.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha to kya fee budget mein aap colleges vagera dekh rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Punjab ke aas paas shehron pe ya Punjab mein hi bas teen hi the.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Matlab aap Punjab government or private?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap Punjab ke nearby check kar rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Punjab ke near keh rahi hu aur Punjab mein bhi kar rahi hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha to mujhe yeh batao ki abhi jaise aap matlab Delhi NCR ka location aapke liye comfortable hoga?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, Delhi tak theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, aur abhi aapka budget vagera kya hai B.Tech course ko leke?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am chaar paanch lakh tak ho jaata hai aaram se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chaar paanch lakh mein beta koi bhi college mil paana to mushkil hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Good morning, am I talking to Srishti Agarwal?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Srishti my name is Kritika, I am calling from Shiksha.com.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually I have got your inquiry, you were looking for Bachelor of Arts and Masters of Arts colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So exactly which course you would like to pursue, is it BA or MA?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: MA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: MA, and I hope you have completed your Bachelor of Arts, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, and how much percentage you are having in that?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, 75 in BA, and in which specialization you have done BA?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Economics.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, and what about entrance exam, is there any entrance exam that you have given?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I have given CUET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CUET PG, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, apart from CUET, any college based exam?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No, I will give now DAVV college exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: DAVV CET, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: CET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, alright, and how much percentage you are having in 10th and 12th class?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 10th I have 66% and 12th I have 80%.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, alright.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And what is your preferred location for colleges?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am preferring Indore.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Particularly Indore or anywhere in MP?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Anywhere in MP.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, anywhere in MP and preferably Indore, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, great, so any college as of now that you have applied?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I have not applied yet.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You have not applied as of now for any college.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So I will tell you some of the colleges that provides MA in Economics in MP, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So the thing is like there is Prestige Institute of Management and Research which is in Indore only.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You can have a look for this college.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: The eligibility is like you should be having minimum 50% in 10th, 12th, also 50% in graduation minimum in order to apply for this college and over here it's a merit based admission, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: On the basis of your 10th, 12th graduation you can apply in the college and the selection will be on the basis of merit and after that if after the selection there will be a personal interview and after that you will be getting the offer letter from the college, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then there is Sage University Indore, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In Sage University Indore, the process is like you should be having 10th, 12th with 50%, graduation with minimum 55% and Sage University takes its own entrance exam, SLEE, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So you have to clear this exam and after that you have to take admission.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And the total tuition fee of MA Economics in Sage University is 60,000 rupees for two years, okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Can you please tell me the placement opportunity in Prestige University after doing MA?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah definitely, I will tell you for both of the colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So firstly talking about Prestige Institute of Management and Research, the placements, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So the median placement is around 5,75,000, so median is the exactly how much a student is taking on, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So median is very good in Prestige, alright.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So after that I have told you about this college, Sage University Indore, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So in Sage University Indore, the average is around 10 LPA, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So 10 LPA that means 10 lakh per annum, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So it is also a good opportunity that you can avail out, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then there is Oriental University which is again in Indore only.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: The total tuition fee for MA is 60,000 rupees for two years, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And over here also the admission is done on the basis of merit.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Merit in the sense you should be having minimum 50% in 10th, 12th and 50% in graduation also, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And if you are having that and if you are clearing the merit then you are getting the admission.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In Oriental University, median package a student has got is around 4 LPA, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In MA Economics, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So it is also a good opportunity.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apart from that, there are several other colleges but that are totally based out of this CUET PG, right, government colleges are there, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Because in government colleges you cannot priorly apply, right, you can only apply through CUET PG counselling, okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes ma'am, yes ma'am, I am listening.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So what I am doing, I will share the list of these colleges, these three colleges, universities that I have told you over this call.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You can check the course fee structure, placement reports, scholarships and mostly the in mostly colleges the fee is around under 1 lakh only, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And for two years and over on this fees also if you will be eligible you will be getting the scholarship as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So if you are looking for a good amount of scholarship and a good college under very less budget then you can definitely apply in these colleges also.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: At least take one or two college as a backup, right, because you are already giving, you have already given CUET PG and you will be going for the counselling also, right Srishti.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So I am sharing the details, is this your WhatsApp number?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, this is my.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am actually I am a bit confused that I will have a good placement or not after doing MA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So look definitely you can have a good placement after doing MA but to be very honest as I compare MA with MBA, the comparison is like you will be getting more good opportunity if you will be doing MBA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So under MBA the opportunity is good but the again the you have to appear for entrance exam then college based exams are there if you are not giving entrance exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And the fees is comparatively high, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: If you can do MA under 1 lakh for two years, then for MBA the fees is around 7 to 10 lakh for a good average college for two years, okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, so if you are okay with that then definitely I can recommend you some MBA colleges also.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: If you are okay with this.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But the thing is like again as of now mostly colleges has closed the admissions because after almost around after one to two months the classes of MBA are going to get start.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then right now the only options are like the colleges that are taking admissions through merit or they are having their own entrance exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So I will tell you one thing, just think over it, right.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Just I will share the details about MBA, what MBA is all about, future, scope, specializations, money involved, everything.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And after that just ping me over WhatsApp, right, that you want a call back or you want to know more about MBA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then I will definitely give you a call back and we will discuss in detail about MBA, okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I am sharing the details Srishti, if there will be any query you can feel free to reach me out on this number, alright.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bye, have a nice day.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho kya, matlab main aapko bas itna suggest kar raha hu ki aap Advanced ke liye bhi jao, JOSAA ki counselling bhi attend karo, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Options milte hain, bilkul lo, theek hai? But lekin main aapko, main is field mein already paanch saal se hu, toh main aapko apne experience ke basis pe bata raha hu ki like aapka thoda time, yeh thoda time taking process hai jo aap bata rahe ho mereko, hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Isme kya hota hai ki like at the end, ab ek baat samjho, at the end like ek option mein aapko abhi aapki ninety percentile hai, aapko shayad idea na ho ya idea bhi ho ki aapko achhe colleges nahi mil payenge kyunki cutoff aapko pata hai kitni high gayi hai. Ninety nine percentile wale bachhe ko IIT milta hai, fir matlab aapko already competition, har cheez ka pata hi hoga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Agar aap JEE ke student ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh jo, main, mera kehne ka matlab simple sa itna hai ki aap saari cheezein karo, but lekin smart work yeh hota hai ki apna ek backup option bhi leke chalo kisi bhi X Y Z college mein, theek hai? Jo ki at the end aapko ek backup rahe ki haan yaar agar maan lo JOSAA ke through bhi mereko koi, aapke mann ka college na mila ya aapke mann ki branch na mili, toh aapko ek option rahega ki haan agar main yahan pe invest karta hu toh mereko ROI achha justified mile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki you are free to go, aap try karo, har jagah karo, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main bas aapko itna hi suggest kar raha tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki aapko koi bhi doubt ho, kabhi bhi kuch jaankari leni ho, kuch jaanna ho, toh mera naam Aditya hai, aap mere se connect kar lena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Shiksha, Aditya, shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: User
