turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, to dekho woh kya karenge aapke father ke financial jo documents wagera hote hain na woh process hote hain, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske baad woh aapko dekh kar bata payenge kitni eligibility loan ki aapki hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Uspe aapko rate of interest wagera kya milega woh sab college ki side se ho jaata hai. College mein bahut saare banks baithte hain jo aapko bata dete hain ki hum yeh karwa payenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chandigarh ka entrance diya tha usme scholarship kitne percent aayi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi Chandigarh ka entrance diya nahi hai abhi maine.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha diya nahi hai abhi entrance?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi diya nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To woh entrance exam kyu nahi de rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam, kyunki mam aapne jaise ki mam mera last paper bacha hai, CUET bacha hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ab mujhe uske liye ab travel karne ke liye mam travel karne mein teen chaar din lagbhag lagbhag chala hi jayega mam mera.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Isliye mam main soch raha hu mam jo mera last paper CUET bacha hai isliye main ispe pura focus kar raha hu phir se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha theek hai, no problem. Agar exam pe focus hai to woh koi concern nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main ek baar Delhi NCR ke kam fees ke college aapko dekh leti hu kya kya dikha raha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Budget aapne bataya 5 to 7 wala na mujhe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Isse kam mein to mam possible bhi nahi hai I think.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, isse kam mein to bachhe possible bhi nahi hai. Itne mein bhi na bahut kam colleges milenge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dhoond ke bataungi. Jaise aapne NIU bola hai, woh possible hai. NIET ka bhi 7 lakhs ke aas paas ka fee structure hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dusra NIET ka jo application form hai na woh Shiksha ki side se free rahega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha. To NIET mein aap apply kar lena normally hi, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Link main aapko bhej dungi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske alawa jo aap budget keh rahe ho uske liye, yeh rahega Sonipat wali SRM University ka naam suna hai? SRM?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, yeh Lucknow mein hai I think.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, SRM University nahi. SRM alag hai. Dekho jo aap keh rahe ho woh SRMU hai, Shri Ram Murti Memorial aise karke hai, woh nahi keh rahi hu main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: SRM University jo main campus Chennai mein hai inka lekin inke all over India mein agar aap dekhoge to aath saat aath campus hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To unka ek campus Sonipat Haryana mein bhi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha Haryana mein. Unka fee structure bhi haan, Sonipat padega woh warna Ghaziabad mein bhi campus hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Unka 7 lakhs ke aas paas ka padega fee structure pura but woh scholarship bhi dete hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Noida International ki fees to aapne pehle hi check kari hogi 6-7 lakh ke aas paas ki.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan woh maine pehle hi check kar li.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To Noida International aap kar sakte ho aur ek Galgotias dikha raha hai. Galgotias ki bhi 7 lakhs ke aas paas ka fee structure hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Galgotias ki kitni fees hai mam?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 7 lakhs.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha Galgotias ki bhi itni hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wahan pe chances hain. Theek hai? Aur Dehradun ke liye comfortable rahoge?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No mam, Dehradun ke liye comfortable nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. To bas phir woh wala rehne do. Ek KIET hai Ghaziabad mein.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha KIET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: KIET. Ruko main aapko yeh do teen college ki na details bhej deti hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam koi Lucknow ya Allahabad mein nahi hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Lucknow ya Allahabad mein dekho, Lucknow agar dekhoge na to Lucknow mein jo colleges hain, dekho Lucknow mein jo main hai na ya to Chandigarh University achha hai ya Amity achha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ab main Amity Lucknow aapko karwa deti hu, application bhi free hai uska Shiksha ki side se. Bas itna main aapko kahungi ki unki jo scholarship rahegi na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Woh aapko final aapka application submit ho jaye kyunki unka application free hai Shiksha ki side se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap apply kar dena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Amity ka?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NIET ka bhi free hai, Amity Lucknow ka bhi free hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha. Theek hai? Main aapko link bhej dungi aap wahan se kar lena. Aaj hi kar dena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam, main abhi kar dunga, mujhe aap link bhej dijiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main bhej rahi hu aur aap Amity jab bhi Amity Lucknow fill karoge na usme ek cheez rahegi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity Lucknow ka jaise hi aapka application submit hota hai na within 48 hours ya 72 hours college aapko call karega PI ke liye, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kiske liye?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: PI, personal interaction round hota hai unka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha. To aapse puchenge why B.Tech aur kyu yeh wali specialization and all woh aapse sab kuch puchenge, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap ek kaam karna aap unse information le lena. Jo bhi aapko mil jayega uske baad aap ek kaam karoge ki college ka agar CUET ka score woh accept karte hain to CUET warna aapne JEE Mains ke score ke basis pe kar lena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam. Phir aapko college se ek letter aa jayega ki kitne percent scholarship woh de sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar scholarship ke baad Amity aapke budget mein jaye Lucknow wala to aap wahan pe admission le lena.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar woh aapke budget mein nahi jaata hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Woh aap kar dena. To aap use phir drop kar dena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam, okay mam, okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To isliye main Amity Lucknow ka link aapko bhej rahi hu. Aapko main NIET ka link bhej rahi hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh do to free hain Shiksha ki side se, pehle to aap yeh aaj hi apply kar lo, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NIU agar aap dekh rahe ho to NIU ka bhi link main aapko bhej deti hu, aap woh fill kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: NIU ka to mam I think usme application form bharne mein shayad fees le raha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hazaar rupaye hain. Unka to fees hai, hazaar rupaye ke aas paas ka fees hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan. Lekin NIET free hai aur Amity Lucknow free hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Woh main aapko bhej deti hu, woh aap kar sakte ho, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske alawa Lucknow mein aur koi itna khaas hai nahi Lucknow ya udhar. Bareilly mein Future ko dekh rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bareilly?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bareilly kahan padta hai mam waise?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Lucknow idhar hi hai na, UP mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main ek kaam karti hu, pehle yeh Noida wale teen chaar college bhejti hu, aap yeh check karo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam jo free side hai aap woh bhej dijiye, main usko pehle fill kar leta hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan jo free wale hain woh bhej rahi hu, ruk jao.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NIET ka application ka link bhej rahi hu aur Amity Lucknow ka, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you mam, main abhi fill kar leta hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan fill karke mujhe please share kar dena ki mam maine bhar diya hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mam, main abhi aapko share karta hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay theek hai. [06:45 -> 06:48] [MUSIC]

turns.text: Maine didi se bola ki to didi ne bola ki bas aapko fir dusri wali didi aa jaye to unse karwa dete hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Didi se matlab main samjhi nahi, kaun thi matlab aap apni didi se kaise matlab kaun kisse aap karwa rahe ho form fill?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo mam meri matlab.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji kya bol rahe hain aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Maine didi se bola to didi ne bola theek hai fir evening mein fir keh do fir main fir se batati hai fir jaisa hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To beta ye form to aapka free of cost form hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Isme aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapki voice break ho rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Beta thoda sa network wale area mein aaiye, aap kya bol rahe hain, network wale area mein aaiye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam yahan network nahi jaata na isliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi baat nahi, bolo kya bol rahe the aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Main keh rahi hu mam wo didi ne bola ki abhi evening mein keh dete to fir evening mein karwa deti matlab jaisa hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Beta evening tak to possible nahi hai na kyunki meri timing jo hai wo aapki 4 baje tak ki hi timing hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, to abhi form fill karne mein bhi thoda time lagega, approximately ye samjho ki agar aapke paas aadha ghanta, ek ghanta aapka form fill karne mein time lagega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To is wajah se main keh rahi thi ki aapka main form abhi fill karwa deti ya to aap khud se form fill kar lo, main call pe reh ke aapko batate chal rahi hu, aap form fill karte chalo ya to fir main aapka form fill kar du to zyada time nahi lagega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur bhi jaise teen char colleges hain, aapko Sakshi, wo bhi main aapko bataungi jo under the budget hain aur jinki top ki form bhi free of cost form hai, to use bhi aap apply kar lo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baat kar lo didi se baat kar lo aap.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki uske baad na kaafi saari problems aate hain form fill karne mein, then us time pe main available nahi houngi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay main puchti hu ek baar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Puch lo aap mute kar lo, puch lo jaake didi se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji bataiye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mam kal ho jayega kya subah matlab morning mein documents bhi to dene padenge na fir usme.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Beta documents mein aapka jo share karna padega wo aapko 10th ka marksheet share karna padega bas, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 10th ka marksheet aur aapka usme ho sakega to haan aapka Aadhar card mangega, aapka marksheet mangega, aapka photo mangega, ye teen cheez aapke paas phone pe available hongi na ya fir aapke paas photos wagera hongi na unki?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Actually mam main kahin aur aayi hu na to isliye main aapse keh rahi thi ki abhi to impossible hai, main kal shaam evening tak jaungi ghar par to fir aapko bata deti thi, isliye bola evening tak.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kal tak? Beta kal kal to chutti hai na, kal Sunday hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kal Sunday hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To abhi evening mein kab tak pahunchoge aap ghar batao?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I think 6 ya 7 o'clock.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Tab tak to chutti ho jayegi, fir koi aur fir to nahi possible ho payega na 6-7 baje.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi kisi se manga nahi sakte ho aap ki koi ghar pe hai aapke wahan pe jahan par aapke 10th ke marksheet ho ya photos ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi to koi nahi hoga jahan tak ki isliye to main aapse keh rahi thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo theek hai Sakshi aap ek baar try kar lo, theek hai? Koi baat nahi, agar aap ek baar check kar pao to dekh lo, theek hai? Aapke liye benefit ho jayega na ki maan lo kal to possible nahi hai, shaam ke 5-6 baje tak available nahi hua koi yahan pe, to is wajah se main aapse keh rahi thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur baaki Monday tak NIT ka form to mujhe confirm nahi hai ki ye band hoga ki kya hoga kyunki iski window pe to abhi to show ho raha hai lekin next day ka mujhe itna idea nahi hai, wo kis time aati hai pata chalegi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai mam main jaise pahunchti hu aapko matlab try karti hu jaldi pahunchne ke liye to fir main aapko send kar deti hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai koi baat nahi, koi baat nahi Sakshi aap dekh lo, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo theek hai, thank you, thank you so much.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hardik se baat ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, haan boliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji Hardik, aapne details dekhe baki ke Mangalmay, GNIOT, KCC?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, dekhe hum.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ek Shivalik se call aaya tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To abhi aapne kya decide kiya, kaun kaun se colleges ke apply karne hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Colleges apply Shivalik ka hi laga, GNIOT ke baare mein bhi soche hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap Shivalik apply, Shivalik walon se baat karoge to Shivalik achha lagne lagega. Aap GNIOT se baat karoge to GNIOT achha lagne lagega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapne compare kiya to aapko kaun sa college better laga? Aap mujhe yeh batao.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Location wise to I think GNIOT sahi rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To GNIOT aapko Bihar student credit card wala jo aapko chahiye, woh bhi provide kar dega. Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur Shivalik se aapne baat ki thi to unhone aapko us Bihar student credit card ka bataya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Uske baare mein to nahi kuch, uske baare mein to puchna reh gaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, to Shivalik mein dekho Bihar student credit card wala jo website hai na, woh kai dino se chal nahi raha hai. Matlab main aapko wahan se check karke bata deti ki aapko Shivalik provide karega ki nahi karega, hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Unka pata nahi kuch connection issue aa raha hai. To main ek baar check kar lungi, aapko bata dungi fir bhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Shivalik bhi achha hai, Dehradun location ke liye agar aap dekhoge. NAAC A rated college hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap apply karo jab tak do teen college mein apply karenge na Hardik, tab jaake aapko kisi ek college mein selection mil payega, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To Shivalik ka main aapko share karun college details wagera?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aap kiye hain shayad.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, Shivalik kahan kiya tha maine?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Maine Chandigarh, KCC, GNIOT, Mangalmay, NIET, Quantum, yeh kiya tha maine.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Oh, Shivalik wala khud send kiya tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main kar de rahi hoon aapko form, application form aur jo bhi aapke details hain woh sab.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aapko kaun se college mein abhi apply karna hai, mujhe batao?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi dekhiye, yeh aapko to bataye hain ki bahut saare exams abhi aa rahe hain. To pehle to exam saara de lenge uske baad hi hum apply karne ka soch rahe hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To uske baad apply karoge to aapko B.Tech mein jo specialization CS, AI yeh dekh rahe ho, yeh milna mushkil hai. Kyunki abhi jo bacche apply kar rahe hain, unhi kuch baccho ko mana kar diya ja raha hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Apply to maan lijiye abhi kar denge to fir usme bhi woh kahega ki abhi aap admission turant lijiye ya fees abhi turant bhariye, to fir to gadbad ho jayega na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi, apply karne ka matlab yeh nahi hota fees bharna hai aapko. Woh aap unko bolo ki mera exam hai, uske baad hi bharunga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apply karne ka matlab hai aap us college ke liye applicant ban chuke ho. Aapko fir further agar kahin kuch opportunity nahi mil raha hai to aap us college ko consider karenge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Uska interview deke offer letter, NIET ka, NIET ka hum application bhar diye hain to isme agar baad mein CS AI mein agar seats khali, maan lijiye ki milega to yeh de sakta hai, nahi?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan, bilkul. Agar usme agar koi baccha chhod deta hai, unka agar nahi selection hota hai ya woh us seat pe nahi aata hai, uska kahin aur selection ho jata hai other colleges mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To woh us college ke liye aapko call kar sakte hain agar aap applicant hoge to, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar aap form hi nahi daloge to sirf website se visit aur counsellor se baat laakhon bacche kar rahe hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To woh laakhon ko us time pe consider nahi karenge, hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh cheez samjho. Apply karke, abhi jaise aapka friend bhi apply kar raha hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To apply karke rakho. Agar aapka, main khud keh rahi hoon ki agar aapka koi entrance exam nikal jata hai to entrance exam ke through admission lo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But agar entrance exam nahi ho raha hai, uske liye bhi hamare paas option hone chahiye. Kyunki aapko main bataun ki agar main pure din mein 100 baccho se baat kar rahi hoon, 97 se 98 baccha mere paas CSE branch ke liye aa raha hai. Aapko lagta hai ki uske liye seats available rahega last tak?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, actually mein demand usi ka hi hai to.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Exactly. AI, ML ho gaya, Data Science ho gaya, Cyber Security ho gaya, yahi options aate hain keval. To abhi se apply karke to rakho baccha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai to hum do teen mein apply kar dete hain aaj ghar jaakar. Abhi to ek exam dene hi aaye hain yahan pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, kaun sa exam hai aaj? Aapne kal kuch bataya to tha mujhe, kaun sa exam hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Amrita wala.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

[04:12 - 04:15] User: Theek hai to hum do teen mein apply kar dete hain aaj ghar jaakar. Abhi to ek exam dene hi aaye hain yahan pe.
[04:15 - 04:21] Counsellor: Achha, kaun sa exam hai aaj? Aapne kal kuch bataya to tha mujhe, kaun sa exam hai?
[04:21 - 04:22] User: Amrita wala.
[04:22 - 04:23] Counsellor: Haan, theek hai.
[04:23 - 04:25] User: Okay.
[04:25 - 04:26] Counsellor: Okay.
[04:26 - 04:28] Counsellor: Chalo theek hai.
[04:28 - 04:30] User: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi Mridula, aapne call kiya tha I think mujhe do ek do din pehle.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main Trishna bol rahi hoon shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji ma'am, woh student loan ke liye maine call kiya tha aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Loan ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Student loan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Student loan ke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aapne bola tha na mujhe ki aap bataoge isliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Student loan ke liye to main aapko bas bata sakti hoon, help nahi kar paungi, matlab woh to aapko university se jab aapko offer letter milta hai to mostly jo bhi bank partners hote hain universities ke wahan pe aap loan ke liye apply kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But aapne university shayad decide nahi kiya abhi tak, aap bol rahe the ki aap application fees ke abhi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi ho gaya maine, wahi isliye main aapko contact connect nahi kar pa rahi thi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Maine choose kar liya, yeh Vidyalankar mein liya hai maine.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, Vidyalankar School of Business na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yahi wala bas decide kiya aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ho gaya mera udhar matlab admission.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, mujhe update kar do aap bas, woh aapke paas koi aapne application submit kiya hai to confirmation mail aaya tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan offer letter aa gaya mereko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Offer letter nahi, application submit, haan offer letter aa gaya, congratulations.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Application submit karne ke baad kuch confirmation mail hota hai na aapki mail pe aata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mail ID pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mridula Vetam one six at gmail.com, yahi hai na aapki mail ID?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan wahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ispe ek confirmation mail aata hai, thank you for successfully completed your application karke.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ho gaya woh sab, aa gaya mereko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mujhe bas confirmation share kar do taaki main yahan attach kar doon, warna yahan se counsellors aapko bahut baar reach out karenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To humein ek proof chahiye hota hai ki student ne apply kar diya hai aur woh confirmation attach karne se hi ho jaata hai submit.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan ji, ek baar aap check kar lo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Bas mail ID, aap mujhe student loan ke baare mein zara bata sakti hain kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kiske baare mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Student loan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan main aapko bata deti hoon student loan ke baare mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Tab tak aap mujhe bas ek baar check kar lo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Vidyalankar ke liye aap baat ki aapne, kaun kaun se college partners hain, bank partners unke?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Unhone bola mujhe SBI hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur offer letter dikha do.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main ek baar unki website pe dekh leti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap ek baar bas mujhe woh share kar do, main tab tak aapko check karke bata rahi hoon kya criteria hai inka student loan ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I think six seven steps mein bata hua hai, yeh steps jo hote hain na inke paanch ya chheh steps mein hote hain shayad.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Actually fee na seven, seven point five hai, seven lakh fifty thousand.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: PGDM ke liye kiya hai na aapne Wadala Mumbai wale campus ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan haan, PGDM mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Inka PGDM hi hai, MBA nahi hai I think.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi unke paas MBA nahi hai, MMS aur PGDM hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, PGDM in business analytics kiya aapne ya just normal PGDM?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi, human resources.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Woh to baad mein select karungi, haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho admission se sabse pehle jo kisi bhi loan ke liye aapko apply karna hoga to jo ki aapke paas already aa chuka hai, admission offer letter, provisional admission letter hona chahiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Without admission letter loan mushkil hota hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To aapka, nahi hai mere paas sab kuch, haan aa gaya hai, obviously baat hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Public banks SBI wagera mein aap, I think bol diya unhone, usme kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Shayad inka HDFC aur ICICI ke saath bhi hota hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeh interest rate bahut batate hain ma'am, kuch kam nahi hai kya kisi bank ka?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Interest rate, student ka to kam rehta hai shayad, student loan pe interest.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kitna to rehta hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I think interest rate inka somewhere around aapka maan ke chalo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Maybe aath se terah percent ke around rahega, eight se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha aath se terah hai na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan, aapko kitna bata diya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: SBI ka shayad das tak rahega, saat se, seven point one five se leke ten point one five tak.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan actually girls ke liye, girls ke liye eight point.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kiti hai girls saathi? Nine point?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nine point eight hai girls ke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur boys ka zara zyada hai, nine point eight.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To achhi baat hai na, baaki interest rate agar aur loans wagera ka dekho to kaafi high rehta hai interest rate.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapko education loan pe interest rate phir bhi kam rehta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap education loan completely loge poore amount ka ya phir like half amount?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi poora poora, nahi poora hi le rahi hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan jab le rahe ho to poora seven point theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur hostel wagera to aap to wahin se ho na Mumbai se, to aisa hostel.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hostel ka to kuch zaroorat nahi, haan Goregaon mein rehti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, up to down daily travelling aap kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To isme yahi rahega, aapka sabse pehle yahan se loan amount hoga, uska aapko jo bhi aapka sirf tuition fees ka hoga, wahi cover hoga I guess.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hostel ka mostly banks nahi karti hain shayad.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Collateral shayad chahiye ho sakta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ya phir aapke FD ya phir property ispe aapki security lag jayegi, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bade amount pe mostly lagti hai FD ya security pe aapki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then aapka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kya matlab?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: FD, FD ya property pe aapka lagega loan, collateral.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha yeh student loan pe nahi lagta na kuch?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Na na, nahi nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Vidyalankar School of Business ka jo hai na, usme I think lender colleges, repetition college, ROI wagera, co-applicant income dekhega aapka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Co-applicant jo aapke saath.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan co-applicant to father ko banaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Father hai na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan father.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan unka I think woh jo ITR status hota hai na, woh sab dekha jayega, monthly kitni income, yearly kitni annually income kitni ho rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aapko ek baar us pe apply kar do na unke page pe.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm aur woh aapko Vidyalakshmi portal kuch hai pata hai kya aapko uska kuch?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main ek baar aapki connect karwa deti hoon loan wale team se.

full_text:
[00:00 - 00:01] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:01 - 00:02] User: Hello.
[00:02 - 00:06] Counsellor: Hi Mridula, aapne call kiya tha I think mujhe do ek do din pehle.
[00:07 - 00:09] Counsellor: Main Trishna bol rahi hoon shiksha.com se.
[00:11 - 00:15] User: Haan ji ma'am, woh student loan ke liye maine call kiya tha aapko.
[00:16 - 00:16] Counsellor: Loan ke liye?
[00:17 - 00:18] User: Student loan.
[00:18 - 00:20] Counsellor: Student loan ke liye.
[00:21 - 00:24] User: Aapne bola tha na mujhe ki aap bataoge isliye.
[00:25 - 00:38] Counsellor: Student loan ke liye to main aapko bas bata sakti hoon, help nahi kar paungi, matlab woh to aapko university se jab aapko offer letter milta hai to mostly jo bhi bank partners hote hain universities ke wahan pe aap loan ke liye apply kar sakte ho.
[00:39 - 00:45] Counsellor: But aapne university shayad decide nahi kiya abhi tak, aap bol rahe the ki aap application fees ke abhi.
[00:45 - 00:51] User: Nahi ho gaya maine, wahi isliye main aapko contact connect nahi kar pa rahi thi.
[00:51 - 00:54] User: Maine choose kar liya, yeh Vidyalankar mein liya hai maine.
[00:55 - 00:56] Counsellor: Okay, Vidyalankar School of Business na?
[00:57 - 00:58] Counsellor: Yahi wala bas decide kiya aapne?
[00:59 - 01:02] User: Haan ho gaya mera udhar matlab admission.
[01:03 - 01:09] Counsellor: Theek hai, mujhe update kar do aap bas, woh aapke paas koi aapne application submit kiya hai to confirmation mail aaya tha?
[01:10 - 01:12] User: Haan offer letter aa gaya mereko.
[01:12 - 01:16] Counsellor: Offer letter nahi, application submit, haan offer letter aa gaya, congratulations.
[01:16 - 01:22] Counsellor: Application submit karne ke baad kuch confirmation mail hota hai na aapki mail pe aata hai.
[01:23 - 01:24] Counsellor: Mail ID pe.
[01:24 - 01:28] Counsellor: Mridula Vetam one six at gmail.com, yahi hai na aapki mail ID?
[01:29 - 01:30] User: Haan haan wahi hai.
[01:31 - 01:37] Counsellor: Ispe ek confirmation mail aata hai, thank you for successfully completed your application karke.
[01:38 - 01:40] User: Ho gaya woh sab, aa gaya mereko.
[01:41 - 01:46] Counsellor: Mujhe bas confirmation share kar do taaki main yahan attach kar doon, warna yahan se counsellors aapko bahut baar reach out karenge.
[01:46 - 01:51] Counsellor: To humein ek proof chahiye hota hai ki student ne apply kar diya hai aur woh confirmation attach karne se hi ho jaata hai submit.
[01:53 - 01:54] User: Achha.
[01:54 - 01:55] User: Okay okay.
[01:55 - 01:57] Counsellor: Haan ji, ek baar aap check kar lo.
[01:58 - 02:01] User: Bas mail ID, aap mujhe student loan ke baare mein zara bata sakti hain kya?
[02:02 - 02:02] Counsellor: Kiske baare mein?
[02:03 - 02:04] User: Student loan.
[02:04 - 02:07] Counsellor: Haan main aapko bata deti hoon student loan ke baare mein.
[02:07 - 02:08] Counsellor: Tab tak aap mujhe bas ek baar check kar lo.
[02:08 - 02:14] Counsellor: Vidyalankar ke liye aap baat ki aapne, kaun kaun se college partners hain, bank partners unke?
[02:15 - 02:17] User: Unhone bola mujhe SBI hai.
[02:18 - 02:18] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[02:19 - 02:23] User: Aur offer letter dikha do.
[02:24 - 02:26] Counsellor: Main ek baar unki website pe dekh leti hoon.
[02:26 - 02:31] Counsellor: Aap ek baar bas mujhe woh share kar do, main tab tak aapko check karke bata rahi hoon kya criteria hai inka student loan ka.
[02:31 - 02:36] Counsellor: I think six seven steps mein bata hua hai, yeh steps jo hote hain na inke paanch ya chheh steps mein hote hain shayad.
[02:37 - 02:38] User: Theek hai.
[02:38 - 02:42] User: Actually fee na seven, seven point five hai, seven lakh fifty thousand.
[02:42 - 02:46] Counsellor: PGDM ke liye kiya hai na aapne Wadala Mumbai wale campus ke liye?
[02:46 - 02:47] User: Haan haan haan, PGDM mein.
[02:48 - 02:51] Counsellor: Inka PGDM hi hai, MBA nahi hai I think.
[02:51 - 02:54] User: Nahi unke paas MBA nahi hai, MMS aur PGDM hi hai.
[02:54 - 02:58] Counsellor: Haan, PGDM in business analytics kiya aapne ya just normal PGDM?
[02:58 - 03:00] User: Nahi nahi, human resources.
[03:00 - 03:02] User: Woh to baad mein select karungi, haan haan.
[03:02 - 03:03] Counsellor: Theek hai, theek hai, theek hai.
[03:04 - 03:15] Counsellor: Dekho admission se sabse pehle jo kisi bhi loan ke liye aapko apply karna hoga to jo ki aapke paas already aa chuka hai, admission offer letter, provisional admission letter hona chahiye.
[03:15 - 03:18] Counsellor: Without admission letter loan mushkil hota hai, theek hai?
[03:18 - 03:22] User: To aapka, nahi hai mere paas sab kuch, haan aa gaya hai, obviously baat hai.
[03:22 - 03:27] Counsellor: Public banks SBI wagera mein aap, I think bol diya unhone, usme kar sakte ho.
[03:27 - 03:30] Counsellor: Shayad inka HDFC aur ICICI ke saath bhi hota hai.
[03:30 - 03:34] User: Yeh interest rate bahut batate hain ma'am, kuch kam nahi hai kya kisi bank ka?
[03:35 - 03:38] Counsellor: Interest rate, student ka to kam rehta hai shayad, student loan pe interest.
[03:38 - 03:39] User: Kitna to rehta hai?
[03:40 - 03:44] Counsellor: I think interest rate inka somewhere around aapka maan ke chalo.
[03:45 - 03:48] Counsellor: Maybe aath se terah percent ke around rahega, eight se.
[03:48 - 03:50] User: Achha aath se terah hai na?
[03:50 - 03:52] Counsellor: Haan haan, aapko kitna bata diya?
[03:52 - 03:58] Counsellor: SBI ka shayad das tak rahega, saat se, seven point one five se leke ten point one five tak.
[03:58 - 04:02] User: Haan actually girls ke liye, girls ke liye eight point.
[04:02 - 04:04] User: Kiti hai girls saathi? Nine point?
[04:05 - 04:07] User: Nine point eight hai girls ke liye.
[04:07 - 04:09] User: Aur boys ka zara zyada hai, nine point eight.
[04:09 - 04:14] Counsellor: To achhi baat hai na, baaki interest rate agar aur loans wagera ka dekho to kaafi high rehta hai interest rate.
[04:15 - 04:18] Counsellor: Aapko education loan pe interest rate phir bhi kam rehta hai.
[04:18 - 04:19] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[04:19 - 04:19] User: Haan.
[04:19 - 04:24] Counsellor: To aap education loan completely loge poore amount ka ya phir like half amount?
[04:24 - 04:26] User: Nahi poora poora, nahi poora hi le rahi hoon.
[04:26 - 04:28] Counsellor: Haan jab le rahe ho to poora seven point theek hai.
[04:28 - 04:32] Counsellor: Aur hostel wagera to aap to wahin se ho na Mumbai se, to aisa hostel.
[04:32 - 04:35] User: Hostel ka to kuch zaroorat nahi, haan Goregaon mein rehti hoon.
[04:35 - 04:38] Counsellor: Theek hai, up to down daily travelling aap kar sakte ho.
[04:38 - 04:39] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[04:39 - 04:48] Counsellor: To isme yahi rahega, aapka sabse pehle yahan se loan amount hoga, uska aapko jo bhi aapka sirf tuition fees ka hoga, wahi cover hoga I guess.
[04:48 - 04:50] Counsellor: Hostel ka mostly banks nahi karti hain shayad.
[04:51 - 04:51] User: Hmm.
[04:52 - 04:54] Counsellor: Collateral shayad chahiye ho sakta hai.
[04:55 - 04:55] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[04:56 - 05:01] Counsellor: Ya phir aapke FD ya phir property ispe aapki security lag jayegi, theek hai?
[05:02 - 05:05] Counsellor: Bade amount pe mostly lagti hai FD ya security pe aapki.
[05:06 - 05:07] Counsellor: Then aapka.
[05:07 - 05:07] User: Kya matlab?
[05:07 - 05:11] Counsellor: FD, FD ya property pe aapka lagega loan, collateral.
[05:11 - 05:13] User: Achha yeh student loan pe nahi lagta na kuch?
[05:14 - 05:15] Counsellor: Na na, nahi nahi.
[05:15 - 05:24] Counsellor: Vidyalankar School of Business ka jo hai na, usme I think lender colleges, repetition college, ROI wagera, co-applicant income dekhega aapka.
[05:25 - 05:25] Counsellor: Co-applicant jo aapke saath.
[05:25 - 05:28] User: Haan co-applicant to father ko banaya.
[05:28 - 05:29] Counsellor: Father hai na?
[05:29 - 05:29] User: Haan father.
[05:30 - 05:39] Counsellor: Haan unka I think woh jo ITR status hota hai na, woh sab dekha jayega, monthly kitni income, yearly kitni annually income kitni ho rahi hai.
[05:39 - 05:43] Counsellor: To aapko ek baar us pe apply kar do na unke page pe.
[05:43 - 05:48] User: Hmm aur woh aapko Vidyalakshmi portal kuch hai pata hai kya aapko uska kuch?
[05:49 - 05:53] Counsellor: Main ek baar aapki connect karwa deti hoon loan wale team se.
[05:53 - 05:56] Counsellor: Wahan se nahi connect karwaya aapko Vidyalankar School of Business se?
[05:57 - 06:03] User: Abhi wahan pe, haan matlab nahi hum log direct gaye the SBI bank mein, to wahan se kiya tha hamare yahan pe.
[06:04 - 06:05] Counsellor: Achha achha achha achha.
[06:06 - 06:11] Counsellor: Theek hai, main kisi counsellor se aapko connect karwati hoon jo loan ke liye aapko guide kar denge process kya rahega.
[06:11 - 06:11] User: Theek hai chalega.
[06:11 - 06:15] Counsellor: Aap mujhe woh share kar do Vidyalankar ka jo aapke paas hai.
[06:15 - 06:17] User: Haan WhatsApp pe main PDF bhejti hoon aapko letter ka.
[06:17 - 06:21] Counsellor: Theek hai, offer letter ka, theek hai offer letter hi chalo bhej do aap mujhe.
[06:22 - 06:25] Counsellor: Offer letter ka kar do, usi se, usi ke basis pe aapko guide kar denge woh.
[06:25 - 06:29] Counsellor: Yahi wali mail ID use ki hai na aapne, Mridula Vetam sixteen at gmail.com?
[06:29 - 06:30] User: Haan haan wahi.
[06:31 - 06:31] Counsellor: Theek hai, wahi bhej do.
[06:32 - 06:33] User: Okay ma'am, thank you.
[06:33 - 06:34] Counsellor: No problem.

turns.text: Haan theek hai. To basically jaise main aapko JECRC ka bata raha hu na, usme specialization opt karne ka zyada fayda hai aapka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise aap career path ke liye pooch rahe ho na ki career rahega ya nahi rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To uske according aap karo to uske according definitely rahega.

turns.text: Kyunki general to dekho aap bhi jaante ho general har koi kar raha hai aaj ke time mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To specifically agar hum plan karte hain ki koi matlab specifically agar hum usme specializations mein jaate hain to ek fayda rehta hai hamara.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye cheez hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Otherwise iske alawa aapke paas ek alternate details bhi hai, alternate email aapka?

turns.text: Iske alawa?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan iske alawa mere ko ek alternate email aur alternate contact number bhi aapka chahiye hoga.

turns.text: Text pe bhejoon?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan mere ko aap bata do, main likh dunga yahan pe return kar dunga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay mujhe check karna padega ek baar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To calls wagera us pe nahi jayenge aapke, kyunki kal bhi jo unka bhi apply hua hai na application, wo unke father ke number se hi application apply hua hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To abhi aap kya kar rahe ho?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Maine abhi application nahi kiya, maine jo Shiksha pe jo aapki inquiry thi na, Shiksha pe aapki inquiry raise kari hai, matlab wahan pe detail update kari hai aapki, kyunki aap referred by Kushal hai na, to wahan pe khali maine ek detail aapki update kari hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To usse aisa koi concern nahi hota hai aapka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Specifically agar aap dekhte ho to, aap phir plan kar rahe ho to aap JECRC se aap easily aap plan kar sakte ho phir to for future process ke liye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan aap bologe to main aapko application share kar dunga uska JECRC ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To usme kya hoga? Registration?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan usse pehle aapka application fulfill hoga, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Wo application fulfill hone ke baad phir secondary hoga aapka admission ka process.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ki application kya hota hai, application must hota hai aapka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay to aap fill kar doge wo?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main bhi fill kar sakta hu yahan se aapka, aisa koi concern nahi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi mat karna, main kar lunga chalo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi aap apne se aap kar lena, theek hai, aisa koi concern nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But try karna ki as soon as possible aap use complete kar le.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, kyunki unka bhi application already university mein ja chuka hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapke friend ka, unki baat ho gayi hai meri unse, haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To that's why.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Otherwise koi concern aata hai, already aapke paas mera contact number hai, to aap direct aap mere ko us pe connect kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, thank you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Most welcome.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji Priyanka se baat ho rahi hai meri?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji good afternoon ma'am, main Shiksha.com se baat kar rahi hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually ma'am aapke is number se query raise hua tha Shiksha ke platform pe, aap B.Tech colleges ke baare mein research kar rahe hai, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay so I want to know aapne koi colleges finalize kiye hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ek minute.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello, yeah may I know your name?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: My name is Harsh Gupta.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Harsh, okay. Hi Harsh, this side Dimple from Shiksha.com.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually I got the query from your number like you searching for B.Tech colleges, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so did you finalized any colleges for the further?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Not certainly yet. I am confused between some colleges, I am reading the reviews on online.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, may I know the what like what colleges you are finalize?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Um JSS IT Noida, that's JPU, oh JP, JP Noida and um Shiv Nadar University.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so are you looking for Delhi location or any other location is comfortable for you?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Delhi NCR because it's near from my home.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so only Delhi you are looking for, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No no no, if if other good colleges are also available, tell me also.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Matlab Delhi, NCR, Chandigarh, Noida aas paas ka area aapko chalega, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji ji ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, all right. To aapne Chandigarh University ke baare mein dekha hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan maine padha to hai par uska uske reviews itne acche hai nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Reviews ki agar baat karu to dekhiye reviews to fake and all sab hota hai, true bhi hota hai, false bhi hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But agar exact university wise agar main ranking dekhu to uska all India ranking hai 4.2 out of five, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To bahut accha ranking hai, placements bhi acchi company se hai like Wipro hai, Google hai and other company Cognizant and haan Adobe company, bahut saari acchi acchi companies hai jo visit kar rahi hai yaha pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And admissions agar aap dekhenge, B.Tech ke liye hi dekh rahe hai, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji ji, computer science.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, hm hm hm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So B.Tech ke liye main aapko fee structure bhi ek baar bata deti hu, 6 lakhs to 6 lakhs ke up to jaata hai uska.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To aap iske baare mein soch sakte hai, accha university hai Chandigarh. Iske alawa.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mujhe JP ke baare mein bata sakte hai aapke paas agar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah sure sure, main ek minute dekh leti hu JP ke baare mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Waise JP ka main concern kya tha aapka, fee structure tha ya other koi cheez aapko problem de rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Fee structure to khair matlab uska theek hai, matlab hai thoda expensive side.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: But ye hai uska jo maine reviews padhe thoda campus size wagera chota hai, stricter hai bahut, strict hai bahut wo log. Ye thoda maine concerns dekhe hai abhi tak reviews mein unke baare mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hm hm hm. Waise iska campus jaise ki aap bol rahe hai thoda chota hai, wo baat aapki sahi hai. Dusra iska ranking 3.9 hai out of five, okay?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur ye bhi bahut purana college hai, accha college hai, 2001 mein establish hua tha aur iski placements bhi main aapko bata deti hu kaunsi companies ki hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Just a second.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iski placement bhi TCS, Zomato, Amazon, Wipro, Adobe, bahut saari acchi companies yaha par visit karti hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ye bhi accha college hi hai JP.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To iske liye bhi aap application form daal sakte hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur koi sir aapko matlab aapke usme acche colleges ho?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan Chandigarh University hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NIET hai, NIET ke baare mein aapne dekha hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi abhi maine itna dekha nahi hai, bata dijiye aap thoda. NIET Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha college hai ye bhi, iski bhi rating aap dekhenge to four out of five, 4.0 iska rating hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iska placement bhi same Google, Adobe and TCS companies jaise companies mein hi ho raha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske reviews bhi acche hai and iska infrastructure agar aap check karenge to wo bhi kaafi accha hai aur campus wise bhi bahut accha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aage jaake scholarship benefits bhi milenge aapko yaha pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iska fee structure, tuition fees jo jaata hai normally 2.9 lakh to 6.3 lakhs average rehta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Total four years?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan total tuition fees ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hm hm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap NIET ke liye bhi ja sakte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: NIET ka to I think application form bhi abhi free chal raha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To wo aap ek fill kar sakte hai backup option ke liye. Baaki CGC college ke baare mein dekha aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: CGC no ma'am abhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CGC University Mohali.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am abhi nahi, bata dijiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uska bhi ranking kaafi accha hai, 4.3 out of five ranking hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye bhi bahut purana, like private university hai aur bahut acchi company se iske placements hai, cutoffs bhi sahi hai iski, infrastructure and facilities bhi kaafi acchi hai, faculty bhi bahut acchi hai, scholarship opportunity bhi hai isme aage.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To aap.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ye kahan par hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye Mohali, Chandigarh Mohali.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mohali, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? To aap isme bhi dekh sakte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur bhi bahut saare option JECRC and baaki further option main aapko share karti hu WhatsApp pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye aapka WhatsApp number hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji ma'am, ji ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Main aapko saara detail ek baar send kar rahi hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek baar aap acche se baith ke go through kar lijiye, jo bhi comfortable hai aapke liye uske liye hum application form fill karenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur from my side main aapko ek advice kar sakti hu, backup option ke liye aap NIET Greater Noida mein hai NIET college, uska aap form aaj hi fill kar lijiye kyunki wo application form bilkul free of cost hai aur uski placements bhi kaafi acchi hai aur ranking bhi acchi hai uski.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To wo main uska application link bhi aapko share kar rahi hu, wo bhi aap fill kar lijiye aur other university details bhi main aapko WhatsApp pe share kar rahi hu, okay?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: All right, okay, take care.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, okay.

[06:33 - 06:49] Counsellor: Aur from my side main aapko ek advice kar sakti hu, backup option ke liye aap NIET Greater Noida mein hai NIET college, uska aap form aaj hi fill kar lijiye kyunki wo application form bilkul free of cost hai aur uski placements bhi kaafi acchi hai aur ranking bhi acchi hai uski.
[06:49 - 06:51] User: Okay ma'am.

[02:16 - 02:27] User: Actually maine, actually maine ek to DU ki preference thi meri but DU CUET ke result ke according I do not think so milega but mostly mujhe private university hi dekhni hai mereko.
[02:27 - 02:40] User: Aur like ek idhar dekhi thi, ek Noida mein AMITY karke hai, ek wo dekhi hai maine aur ek SMVDU Jammu mein hai, Jammu University, Mata Vaishno Devi wali university, wo bhi keh rahe hain achi university hai.
[02:40 - 02:41] Counsellor: Okay.
[02:41 - 02:45] Counsellor: To theek hai, main aapko kuch college ke suggestions send kar rahi hoon, theek hai?
[02:45 - 03:00] Counsellor: Ek baar aap wo acche se, bhej rahi hoon, ek baar go through kijiye aap, saari cheezon ko compare kijiye, jo bhi aapke liye suitable hai, unke application form, main aapko yahi suggest karungi abhi se fill kijiye kyunki aapke paas options mein kuch na kuch rehna chahiye, right?
[03:00 - 03:03] Counsellor: To agar application rahega then only you can proceed for further, right?
[03:04 - 03:14] User: Like aapko koi CUET ke process ka idea hai? Like kal jaise result aaya to ab main universities pe jaake like wahan pe upload karke apna result us according check karu na?
[03:14 - 03:17] Counsellor: CUET ka result dekhna hai aapko, aisa?
[03:18 - 03:20] User: Nahi, maine result to dekh liya.
[03:20 - 03:20] Counsellor: Okay.
[03:20 - 03:24] User: But like ki ab jaise har university apni cut-off nikalegi.
[03:24 - 03:29] User: To like should I wait for the cut-off ya phir main usse pehle apply kar doon universities mein?
[02:29 - 03:32] Counsellor: Haan, you can apply, apply kar sakte ho aap.
[03:32 - 03:40] Counsellor: Kyunki kuch kuch mein entrance exam unke khud ke personal hote hain, kuch kuch CUET ke basis pe le lete hain aur kuch ka ye hota hai ki aap direct admissions le sakte hain.
[03:40 - 03:46] User: Masters, Masters ke admission kab tak hote hain? Like kis time tak rehti hai ab?
[03:46 - 03:47] Counsellor: Kiski?
[03:47 - 03:50] User: Masters ke ab jo admissions hoengi.
[03:50 - 03:54] Counsellor: Ye kaun se month tak? Masters ke to chalenge abhi tak, August tak chalenge iske admissions.
[03:54 - 04:03] User: But ye hai na ki August tak meri bachelor ki degree poori nahi hogi kyunki mere sixth, jo last semester hai uske exams hi August-September mein honge.
[04:03 - 04:07] Counsellor: Dekhiye main aapko samjha rahi hoon Himanshi, aap application form fill karke rakhiye.
[04:07 - 04:13] Counsellor: Taaki aapke paas, To usse koi issue to nahi hoga na ki bachelor's poori nahi hui aur udhar se Masters ka agar main kar loon to wahi pooch rahi thi.
[04:13 - 04:17] Counsellor: Koi problem nahi hai, koi problem nahi hai, aap Masters kar sakte hain.
[04:17 - 04:27] Counsellor: And aap fill karke, Because drop lungi to phir aage teen-char months, paanch months mujhe wait karna padega, phir usme, usme mujhe dobara phir CUET ki ya to karu.
[04:27 - 04:27] Counsellor: Right.
[04:28 - 04:31] Counsellor: Wo aapko wo ek gap aa jayega poora jo aapko cover karna padega.
[04:31 - 04:50] Counsellor: Isse better hai aap options leke chaliye, ek do form bhar ke rakhiye, aur bhi colleges ke bare mein main aapko detail share karungi, usko bhi dekhiye, unke bhi application form bhariye and unko bhi options mein leke rakhiye taaki aapko jis jab aapko admission lena ho to aapke paas ek perfect plan ho ki aapko kis college mein lena hai, right?
[04:50 - 05:03] Counsellor: Kyunki agar kisi ka bhi aapko pata hai ki placement kahan acha ho raha hai, kiska infrastructure, fee structure acha hai, aage jaake future mein aapko kya scholarship benefits mil sakte hain, tabhi wo aapke liye better opportunity rahega, right?
[05:03 - 05:04] User: Haan ji, haan ji.
[05:04 - 05:10] Counsellor: To ek to main NIET ka form aapko send kar rahi hoon, wo aaj ke liye free of cost hai, theek hai?
[05:10 - 05:17] Counsellor: To wo aap fill kar dijiye, acha university hai, wo bhi aapke liye option mein rahega agar aap form fill kar denge to.
[05:17 - 05:20] Counsellor: Baaki AMITY ke bare mein main send kar rahi hoon.
[05:20 - 05:24] Counsellor: JECRC ke bare mein suna hai aapne? Ye Rajasthan mein Jaipur.
[05:24 - 05:25] User: Haan JECRC, haan ji, haan ji.
[05:25 - 05:28] Counsellor: Acha university hai. Jaipur mein hai wo. Haan, acha university hai wo bhi.
[05:28 - 05:31] Counsellor: Uska bhi bhej dungi and Galgotias ke bare mein suna hai aapne?
[05:33 - 05:37] User: Haan Galgotias ka suna hai but Galgotias main to tech ka hai na?
[05:37 - 05:38] Counsellor: Jaise.
[05:39 - 05:44] Counsellor: Okay, so aapko mostly Masters ke liye hi chahiye, wahi colleges aapko.
[05:44 - 05:48] User: Mujhe Masters Economics mein hi karni hai to mujhe usi ke liye hi chahiye na.
[05:48 - 05:49] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[05:49 - 05:53] Counsellor: To main aapko relatable college jo bhi hai, saara data main aapko share kar rahi hoon.
[05:53 - 05:54] Counsellor: Aap ek baar go through kijiye.
[05:54 - 05:58] User: SMVDU college kaisa hai jo Jammu ka hai, SMVDU?
[05:58 - 06:00] Counsellor: Ek minute, main check karti hoon.
[06:03 - 06:04] Counsellor: Jammu mein hai na?
[06:04 - 06:06] User: Haan ji, SMVDU.
[06:14 - 06:17] Counsellor: Ye Shri Mata Vaishno Devi University ki baat kar rahe hain aap?
[06:17 - 06:19] User: Haan ji, haan ji, yahi wali.
[06:19 - 06:20] Counsellor: Okay.
[06:21 - 06:28] Counsellor: Acha hai, iski 3.8 rating hai, 2004 se ye established hai, placement bhi achi de raha hai ye.
[06:28 - 06:35] Counsellor: Achi in the sense, Kehte hain ki like India mein ache top ranking mein aati hai ye.
[06:35 - 06:49] Counsellor: Haan, iski jo placement companies hai wo hai TCS, Infosys, Tata Axis and Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, ye saari inki jo hai best companies hai jo visit karti hai yahan par.
[06:50 - 06:53] Counsellor: To ye bhi acha hai, isko bhi aap suggestion mein rakh sakte hain.
[06:54 - 06:59] Counsellor: Theek hai? To main inka, Mujhe in sab ki aap bhej dena phir application forms.
[07:00 - 07:04] Counsellor: Theek hai, main sabka application forms with details main aapko share kar rahi hoon, theek hai?
[07:04 - 07:10] Counsellor: NIET ka to abhi aap fill kar dijiyega kyunki free hai aur aaj uska last date hai form ka, theek hai?
[07:10 - 07:11] Counsellor: To application daal ke, Haan ji, kar dungi abhi.
[07:12 - 07:15] Counsellor: Haan, application daal ke rakhenge to wo aapke liye ek option mein rahega.
[07:15 - 07:23] Counsellor: Baaki ye jo college bataya iska detail and AMITY, JECRC aur bhi bahut saare colleges hain jinka information main aapko share kar rahi hoon.
[07:23 - 07:26] Counsellor: Kuch bhi doubt ho aap mujhe call back karke confirm kar lijiyega, theek hai?
[07:27 - 07:27] User: Okay, okay.
[07:28 - 07:32] Counsellor: Okay, and NIET ka fill karke aap mujhe ek baar screenshot bhej dijiye, theek hai?
[07:32 - 07:33] User: Haan ji, theek hai.
[07:33 - 07:34] Counsellor: Okay, okay, bye bye.
[07:35 - 07:36] User: Bye, thank you.

[06:19 - 06:19] User: Yes, ma'am.
[06:19 - 06:24] Counsellor: Baki kisi bhi college specific college ka aapko aur information chahiye hoga to aap mujhe bata sakte ho, main aapko share kar dungi.
[06:25 - 06:25] User: Okay ma'am, sure.
[06:26 - 06:32] Counsellor: Theek hai. Baki aapka ek baar email ID confirm kar do. Like mere paas dyutijain1028@gmail.com hai.

turns.text: Uski fees toh 8 to 9 lakh hai four year ki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan wahi toh keh rahi hu 8 se 9 lakh tak ka hai na, uska fees mehenga hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeh matlab Medicaps type hai aur kya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan Medicaps ki tarah hi hai yeh bhi.

turns.text: Kya zindagi, aur ma'am dusri batao.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur main check kar rahi hu ek second.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek main aapko na yeh bhejti hu, ek baari na is list ke colleges ko explore karo toh.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan main call par hu aap ek baar batao koi college aapko pasand aata hai ya aapko kuch information chahiye toh batao main abhi hand to hand bata deti hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am yeh shiksha.com link hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan uss pe click karo uss pe Madhya Pradesh ke colleges ka link khulega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Open link haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am only Indore side hi dekhna hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Accha ruko ek second main Indore ka filter laga ke deti hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh wala dekho.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Arvindo ka, main abhi bhul gayi ek second.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aise hi tha na 3.5 ke around tha total. Haan 3.5 ke around jayega usse kam hi jayega waise.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab kam hi hogi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am isme IIT hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: IPS hai aur Shivaji Rao hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Prestige bhi hai, Sage bhi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Doctor A. P. J. Abdul Kalam.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am yeh A. P. J. Abdul Kalam toh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Government hai ki nahi yeh bhi toh dekho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ispe toh likha nahi hai ma'am government hai ya nahi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am yeh shayad government hi hoga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur JEE Mains se lega na yeh toh.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: GSIT.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am isme se kaunsa college dekhna hai mereko?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I guess almost colleges toh humne explore kar liye hain, maine isliye aapke reference ke liye yeh bhej diye hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Accha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I guess almost toh explore ho hi gaya na humara.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh chalo theek hai fir agar kuch rehta hai toh fir mujhe bata dena, mujhe WhatsApp pe text kar dena, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo, okay thank you, have a great day.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello, kaun bol raha hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello, hi this side Aarushi. I called you from shiksha.com.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aditya se baat ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapki side se admissions ke liye inquiry raise hui thi, so plan kar rahe ho is saal college admissions ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aapki aawaz nahi aa rahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello hello, can you hear me?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapke side se college admissions ke liye registration hua tha, so is saal plan kar rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab is saal college dekhne ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Like kaunse course ke liye plan out kar rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: C B S E.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Matlab B.Tech C S E ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aapki aawaz bahut kat ke aa rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello hello, can you hear me?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan main keh rahi hu B.Tech C S E ke liye plan kar rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sorry kiske liye?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: B.Tech C S E ke liye plan kar rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so aapka tenth mein kya percentage tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ninety two.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ninety two, theek hai and twelfth ka result aa gaya aapka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Twelfth ka result aa gaya aapka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi nahi aaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi nahi aaya, koi entrance exam diya tha like aapka J E E ka paper?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: J E E tha na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay J E E mein kitna percentile aaya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usme ninety three point two zero thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ninety three point two, theek hai, good and koi aur bhi entrance exam diya hai aapne ya dene wale ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi ek V I T ka bacha hai, ek COMEDK ka bacha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha V I T Vellore ka form fill kiya tha aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay fine, so abhi main aapka preferred location kya rahega, kahan se B.Tech karna chahte ho location wise?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: First preference to M P mein hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay mainly M P ko target kar rahe ho and how about Maharashtra, Bangalore, Delhi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab wo baki second preference mein aata hai agar M P mein koi agar milega to main I will go for that.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai theek hai but abhi aap explore to lekin har location mein kar lo and preference definitely aap usme de sakte ho M P mein, baki abhi tak koi college aapne shortlist ya explore kiye hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi maine, aisa to kuch hai nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai main aapko kuch college ideas de deti hu, jaise main specifically agar M P se hi start karu to mainly to ek Sage University aapka hai Indore and Bhopal mein.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hai na, wahan pe koi fees budget lekar chal rahe ho kya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Under ten lakhs, eleven lakhs.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Under ten, eleven, okay fine, so Sage University ka to fees structure aapko haan eight lakhs ke around rahega, seven to eight.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, agar kuch plan rehta hai Amity University ke liye to Amity ka ek college Gwalior mein hai agar aap comfortable hai to wahan par bhi aapka das se gyarah lakh tak fees jaata hai but wo log scholarship bhi provide karte hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Amity or M I T?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity University Gwalior mein jo hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hai na, M I T W P U Pune mein hai, main us pe bhi aaungi abhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, Amity University scholarship bhi provide karta hai kyunki dekho aapka percentile to kaafi achha hai plus aapko kya lagta hai twelfth mein kitna expected hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Twelfth mein?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan kitna aa sakta hai percentage?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Above eighty.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Above eighty, fine theek hai, so Amity mein minimum seventy five percent required rehta hai for scholarship and current mein the registration charges is also waived off to agar ye benefit aap uthana chahte ho to aap unka form fill kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Plus Amity sirf Gwalior hi nahi total seven campuses hai jahan par ye benefit mil raha hai jaise aapka Gurgaon ho gaya, Lucknow ho gaya, Gwalior to hai hi, Jaipur, Raipur, Mumbai, Bangalore.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uske alawa main aapko bata deti hu Medicaps University is also there Indore mein.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kaunsi?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Medicaps.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Medicaps?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Medicaps mein nau lakh tak ka fees jaata hai, nau se das lakh tak ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Par uski matlab placement kaisi hongi?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Placement mein average package aap expect kar sakte ho around seven to eight lakhs.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, uske alawa ek I P S Academy is also there Indore mein, yahan par aapka five lakh tak fees rehta hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kitna?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Paanch lakh tak.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chaar saal ka, uske baad ek Prestige Institute bhi ek option hai yahan par do lakh tak ka fees rehta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chaar saal ka, theek hai, so talking about Maharashtra, agar main aapko kuch options Maharashtra ke bhi bata deti hu kyunki ye to mainly aapke M P side ka ho gaya, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Pune mein aapne suna hoga M I T W P U ke baare mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, Kothrud mein hai ye, theek hai, but the thing is ki iska jo fees structure hai wo sixteen to seventeen lakh tak chala jaata hai for four years.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, next ek Symbiosis bhi hai but Symbiosis ab close ho chuka hai, aapne pehle apply kiya tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kya?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Symbiosis mein aapne pehle apply kiya tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Symbiosis mein nahi kara tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay Symbiosis ab close bhi ho gaya hai so wahan par nahi ho sakta, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Next, ek Mumbai mein Universal AI University, main aapko, aapko thodi der baad call karu kya abhi thoda bahar tha main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai meanwhile main aapko college list share kar deti hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay, thank you so much.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo okay, thank you, have a great day.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, but PGDM me aap ATMA ke through admission le sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Clear?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To dono ka hi hai, dono me apply karke aap test interview de sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, PI wagera.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes, to dono ka aapko, Amity ka to maine bheja hi hua tha aapko applications wagera.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan, unhone abhi college visit ke liye bulaya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
