full_text:
[00:01 - 00:02] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:02 - 00:03] User: Haan Vaishanavi ji, good afternoon.
[00:03 - 00:05] Counsellor: Haan ji Darshan, good afternoon.
[00:06 - 00:09] User: Maine aapko kal bahut call kiye the, aapne ek bhi call nahi uthaya ma'am.
[00:09 - 00:12] Counsellor: Aap mereko ispe karte ho na, I think kal main leave pe thi.
[00:12 - 00:13] Counsellor: Bataiye.
[00:13 - 00:14] User: Achha.
[00:14 - 00:20] Counsellor: Main aapko apna number de deti hu dusra wala bhi, us pe kabhi call kar lijiyega kyunki wo ghar pe rehti hu na to mera office ka number chalta nahi hai.
[00:21 - 00:22] User: Achha.
[00:22 - 00:27] User: Nahi maine actually mereko kal Thakur college me bulaya gaya tha campus visit ke liye.
[00:27 - 00:28] Counsellor: Achha.
[00:29 - 00:30] User: Thakur me.
[00:30 - 00:31] Counsellor: Okay.
[00:31 - 00:39] User: To bas unhone mujhe bulaya tha aur bas wo explanation de rahe the MMS program ke liye, to unhone bola ki utna wait karne ki zarurat nahi hai.
[00:39 - 00:42] Counsellor: Haan haan.
[00:42 - 00:43] User: Aap dusre program ke liye try kar sakte hai.
[00:43 - 00:45] Counsellor: Okay.
[00:45 - 00:50] User: PGDM jaisa kuch hai, to main soch raha tha ki Chetna aur Amity me apply kar du isliye main in dono me karne wala hu.
[00:51 - 00:51] Counsellor: Chetna?
[00:52 - 00:58] User: Haan, matlab aap mujhe zara bata sakte hai ki ranking Chetna ka zyada achha hai ki Amity ka almost same hi hai?
[00:58 - 01:00] Counsellor: Main bata deti hu.
[01:00 - 01:02] Counsellor: Ek minute.
[01:09 - 01:11] Counsellor: Chetna.
[01:13 - 01:14] Counsellor: Ye kaunsa Wardha me jo hai?
[01:15 - 01:16] User: Haan Bandra me jo hai na wo.
[01:18 - 01:19] Counsellor: Nahi nahi, Wardha.
[01:21 - 01:22] User: Wardha matlab?
[01:22 - 01:24] Counsellor: Wardha me jo hai.
[01:25 - 01:26] User: Nahi Bandra me hai.
[01:26 - 01:29] Counsellor: Kaunsa mujhe ek baar bataoge pura pura college ka naam kya hai actually?
[01:30 - 01:32] User: Chetna Institute of Research and Management.
[01:33 - 01:35] Counsellor: Aisa to koi college nahi aa raha hai.
[01:37 - 01:38] User: Hai hai, Bandra me ek hai.
[01:39 - 01:42] User: C H E T N A, Chetna Institute of Research and Management.
[01:42 - 01:44] Counsellor: Chetna Institute of Management?
[01:45 - 01:45] User: Haan.
[01:49 - 01:50] Counsellor: East Mumbai.
[01:51 - 01:52] User: Bandra East me hoga kuch.
[01:53 - 01:54] Counsellor: Haan main samajh rahi hu.
[01:59 - 02:02] User: Aap kabhi Mumbai aaye hai ma'am ki abhi tak nahi aana hua?
[02:02 - 02:05] Counsellor: Ye IMR, achha nahi nahi Mumbai to vaise main nahi aayi hu.
[02:06 - 02:06] User: Achha.
[02:08 - 02:09] Counsellor: Okay got it, mil gaya.
[02:09 - 02:11] Counsellor: CIMR bolte hai usko.
[02:12 - 02:13] User: Achha CIMR bolte hai, achha.
[02:13 - 02:17] Counsellor: Haan, isliye wo nahi mil raha tha kyunki Chetna Wardha me koi dikha raha tha.
[02:17 - 02:18] User: Achha.
[02:19 - 02:21] Counsellor: Okay, let me check this.
[02:25 - 02:27] Counsellor: Dekho Chetna me agar aapko karna hai, theek hai?
[02:27 - 02:33] Counsellor: To wo bhi theek hi hai, Amity ka but zyada brand value hai agar aap brand value puchoge mujhe, theek hai?
[02:33 - 02:34] User: Okay.
[02:34 - 02:40] Counsellor: Yes, brand value agar aap puchoge to Amity ka zyada rehta hai, us Amity me aapka MMS program bhi available hai, theek hai?
[02:40 - 02:43] Counsellor: Plus aapka PGDM program bhi available hai.
[02:43 - 02:44] Counsellor: Okay?
[02:44 - 02:47] Counsellor: To Amity ka dono hi available hai, dono me hi aap ja sakte ho.
[02:48 - 02:52] Counsellor: Agar main Chetna aur Amity dono ka agar ranking wagera ki baat karu, theek hai?
[02:52 - 02:55] Counsellor: To dono ka hi vaise dekho similar hi aa raha hai.
[02:55 - 03:02] Counsellor: Amity ka bhi aapka 3.9 ka rating hai aur iske alawa Chetna ka bhi 3.9 ka hi rating aa raha hai.
[03:02 - 03:02] User: Achha.
[03:03 - 03:03] Counsellor: Yes.
[03:04 - 03:11] Counsellor: And dusri cheez ye hai, fees ka bhi agar main aapko bolu to Amity ka jo fees rahega MMS ka that is 4.4 lakhs.
[03:12 - 03:12] User: Okay.
[03:12 - 03:18] Counsellor: Okay and Chetna ka 9.4 lakhs rahega agar aap PGDM me jaate ho to.
[03:18 - 03:19] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[03:19 - 03:20] User: Okay.
[03:20 - 03:28] Counsellor: Yes, PGDM me jaate ho to 9.4 lakhs hai and yes unka fees to yahi hai, zyada to nahi hai matlab aur koi program available nahi hai.
[03:28 - 03:32] Counsellor: Amity me agar aap MMS me jaate ho wo 4.4 lakhs hai.
[03:33 - 03:37] Counsellor: And agar aap PGDM me jaate ho, wo bhi main aapko ek baar bata deti hu PGDM wale ka.
[03:55 - 03:58] Counsellor: PGDM ka fees zyada hai unka Amity ka, that is 12 lakhs.
[03:58 - 03:59] User: Okay.
[03:59 - 04:04] Counsellor: MMS ka 4.4 lakhs hai aur wo isliye hai kyunki wo Maharashtra CET ke through aapko milta hai.
[04:04 - 04:05] User: Achha.
[04:05 - 04:09] Counsellor: But agar aap PGDM me apply karte ho Amity ka, wo aap ATMA dene wale ho na?
[04:09 - 04:10] User: Haan.
[04:10 - 04:12] Counsellor: Haan, ATMA aur MH CET dono ke through se leta hai PGDM me.
[04:12 - 04:13] User: Achha.
[04:13 - 04:19] Counsellor: Yes, to isliye uska fees bhi zyada hai and placement ki agar main baat karu, dono ka placement similar hi hai.
[04:19 - 04:20] Counsellor: Amity ka bhi aapka 8 to 9 lakhs ka average placement jaata hai, 8.5 ka average placement hai Amity ka aur Chetna ka bhi 8 lakhs ka average placement hai.
[04:20 - 04:30] Counsellor: Theek hai, to dono me hi agar aap dekhoge to dono ka hi barabar ka hi rankings and barabar ka hi ratings aa raha hai, placement and fees wagera bhi sab same hi similar hi aa rahi hai.
[04:30 - 04:35] Counsellor: Kyunki aap Chetna me bhi 9.4 lakhs de rahe ho, aap Amity me bhi 12 lakhs ke around hi de rahe ho, that is similar.
[04:36 - 04:40] Counsellor: Dono me hi apply karna hai, koi dikkat nahi hai, aap dono me apply karke interview de sakte ho.
[04:40 - 04:42] Counsellor: Thakur me to aapne baat kar li hogi, wo to CET ke through hi lenge.
[04:43 - 04:43] User: Hai na?
[04:43 - 04:44] Counsellor: Hmm.
[04:44 - 04:45] User: Ji.
[04:45 - 04:47] Counsellor: Hai na, haan to wo to aapka CET ke through hi hoga.
[04:47 - 04:52] Counsellor: Amity me aapke paas chance rahega ki aapka ye bhi ho sakta hai matlab ATMA ke through bhi le sakte hai wo.
[04:52 - 04:53] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[04:53 - 04:54] User: Okay.
[04:54 - 05:00] Counsellor: Chetna me bhi, Chetna me bhi aapka ATMA bhi lete hai aur aapka Maharashtra CET bhi lete hai.
[05:00 - 05:01] User: Okay.
[05:01 - 05:04] Counsellor: Theek hai, aur ek cheez hai Darshan aap ek aur kaam kar sakte ho.
[05:05 - 05:07] Counsellor: Ki ek MAT ka exam hota hai, aapko pata hoga.
[05:07 - 05:08] User: Theek hai.
[05:08 - 05:10] Counsellor: Haan, MAT, only MAT.
[05:10 - 05:15] Counsellor: Theek hai, jaise CAT ka exam hota hai, ZAT ka exam hota hai, ek MAT ka exam hota hai.
[05:15 - 05:23] Counsellor: To CAT aur ZAT ka exam to once in a year hi hota hai matlab CAT ka November me hota hai aur ZAT ka January me hota hai.
[05:23 - 05:24] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:24 - 05:27] Counsellor: But jo MAT ka exam hai na, wo saal me chaar baar conduct hota hai.
[05:28 - 05:28] User: Okay.
[05:29 - 05:33] Counsellor: Yes, ek hota hai aapka December MAT, ek February MAT, ek hota hai May MAT.
[05:34 - 05:34] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:35 - 05:40] Counsellor: To May MAT ke liye maybe registration open ho aur close bhi ho sakta hai, wo ek baar aap check kar lena.
[05:40 - 05:44] Counsellor: Agar uske registration, ATMA ke liye to aapne register kar liya hai na?
[05:44 - 05:45] User: Haan.
[05:45 - 05:47] Counsellor: Haan, agar ATMA ke liye register kar liya hai.
[05:47 - 05:55] Counsellor: MAT ka exam ke liye aap check kar lena kyunki MAT ke through bhi colleges aapko easily mil jayenge aur ye dono college MAT ka bhi exam accept karte hai.
[05:56 - 05:57] User: Okay.
[05:57 - 06:02] Counsellor: Yes, but otherwise ATMA to aap de hi rahe ho, CET bhi, CET to aapne diya nahi hai hai na?
[06:02 - 06:03] User: Diya hai na I think.
[06:03 - 06:04] Counsellor: Diya hai na?
[06:04 - 06:04] User: Haan diya hai.
[06:04 - 06:12] Counsellor: Haan to ye dono college Chetna ho gaya, Amity ho gaya, dono hi CET and ATMA dono ke through se hi college me admission mil jayega aapko, CET ke through bhi aur ATMA ke through bhi.
[06:12 - 06:19] Counsellor: MAT exceptional agar aapko dena hai to de sakte ho, check kar lena, otherwise aapka admission matlab dono ke basis pe ho jayega.
[06:19 - 06:23] Counsellor: Baki Thakur ka to aapka completely Maharashtra CET ke hi through hoga.
[06:23 - 06:24] Counsellor: Agar aap.
[06:24 - 06:25] User: Okay.
[06:25 - 06:30] Counsellor: Amity me MMS program ke liye apply karte ho to MMS ke liye Maharashtra CET me hi wo hoga.
[06:30 - 06:34] Counsellor: Aapko matlab MMS program ke liye aap ATMA ka koi role nahi hai.
[06:34 - 06:35] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[06:35 - 06:39] Counsellor: Okay, but PGDM me aap ATMA ke through admission le sakte ho.
[06:39 - 06:40] Counsellor: Clear?
[06:40 - 06:40] User: Okay.
[06:41 - 06:44] Counsellor: To dono ka hi hai, dono me apply karke aap test interview de sakte ho.
[06:44 - 06:46] Counsellor: Theek hai, PI wagera.
[06:46 - 06:47] User: Okay.
[06:47 - 06:51] Counsellor: Yes, to dono ka aapko, Amity ka to maine bheja hi hua tha aapko applications wagera.
[06:51 - 06:52] Counsellor: Hai na?
[06:52 - 06:54] User: Haan, unhone abhi college visit ke liye bulaya hai.
[06:55 - 06:55] Counsellor: Kisne?
[06:56 - 06:57] User: Amity walo ne.
[06:58 - 07:02] Counsellor: Okay, college visit ke liye bulaya hai, to aap pehle application fill karoge ki college visit karoge?
[07:03 - 07:04] User: Nahi pehle main college visit karunga.
[07:05 - 07:06] Counsellor: Uske baad apply karoge?
[07:06 - 07:07] User: Haan.
[07:08 - 07:12] Counsellor: Theek hai, main aapko dono ka hi link wagera bhej deti hu, aap college jab visit karoge na ek baar mujhe inform kar dena.
[07:12 - 07:14] Counsellor: Theek hai, jaane se pehle.
[07:14 - 07:19] Counsellor: Baki main college visit karne ke baad aapko fill karna hai to fill kar lena aur jaisa bhi hai, theek hai?
[07:19 - 07:20] User: Okay.
[07:21 - 07:22] Counsellor: Okay Darshan ji.
[07:22 - 07:24] Counsellor: Aap please iska call.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello. Hi Atharv bol rahe ho aap? Atharv Ambekar?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan bolo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Atharv aap MIT-WPU mein apply karne wale the, aapne apply kar diya hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi kiya abhi tak.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi nahi kiya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: CET diya hai, uske baad kya karna hai wo pata nahi tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achcha achcha. CET ke baad hi apply karoge aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan matlab CET ho gaya mera, maine de diya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan matlab CET ke result ke baad karoge kya? Ye puch rahi hu main.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan. Par haan wahi karna tha, CET ke result ke baad hi. To MIT Pune ka koi khud ka ye hai kya fir? Exam wagera?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Application form hai unka, bas exam to nahi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achcha achcha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sirf MIT-WPU hi decide kiya hai ya fir aur bhi universities ke liye aap comfortable ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: COEP. COEP, PICT. PICT, ye bhi kiya tha na apna PICT, Pune ka hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Pune Institute of Technology na? Ek PCOE bhi hai, Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering. DY Patil bhi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan. DY Patil. Ajinkya bhi, Ajinkya karke bhi tha ek.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan Ajinkya DY Patil. To ye sab bas shortlist kar rakha hai, CET ke result ke baad aisa matlab decide karna hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan. CET ke baad hi decide karna padega matlab CET ke percentile ke upar kaunsa milega, kaunsa nahi milega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achcha. Kuch universities ka to khud ka bhi application form hai, to agar jiske liye bhi inme se sabse zyada aap interested ho, shayad zyada aap MIT-WPU ke liye interested the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hai na? First priority WPU hai aapki?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan wahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ya COEP bhi matlab COEP mein to thoda hard rehta hai aapka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi WPU. MIT-WPU hi tha kyunki mere senior bhi ek wahan pe hai jo abhi first year unka ho gaya complete, ho jayega complete. Baad mein usko pehli priority thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main bas ye samjha rahi hu na aapko ki dekho aap kitne matlab aap bas mujhe thoda sa profile brief kar do fir main bol bata sakti hu aapko ki at least ek do jagah hi apply karna chaho to aap kar sakte ho. Kyunki ye rehta hai na ki agar aap apply abhi kar lete ho to kuch percentile se agar reh bhi jaata hai na to aapko kai baar wo preference mil sakti hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki aapne 12th ka exam de diya hai, hai na? Kitne aapko lag rahe hain 12th mein aa jayenge?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Around 75 to 80.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 75 to 80. Theek hai. 12th ka itna matlab wo to aapka eligibility me se one of the criteria hota hai, usme 65-70 mein accept ho jaata hai aapka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur WPU mein I think cut off high jaata hai B.Tech CSE branch ka. Aapko CSE mein jaana hai ya kisi aur branch ke liye dekh rahe the?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan, CSE mein hi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CSE mein hi na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: CSE mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. So aap 12 abhi aapne JEE ke do attempt diye hain ya ek hi attempt diya tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: First hi, second hi attempt diya tha April wala.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. Usme kitna hai aapke?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Rank? 65. 65 percentile hai aur rank around 5 lakh hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 5 lakh ke aas paas rank aa rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Rank aapka 5 lakhs ke around hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan. CET mein accha kiya hai par is baar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CET sahi gaya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: CET ka dusra attempt bhi. Nahi nahi, mera JEE ka hi kharab gaya tha par CET mein accha kiya hai aur CET ka mera second attempt bhi hai. Matlab pehle mein to accha kiya, second mein de raha hu abhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai theek hai. To CET ka sahi gaya aur second wale pe zyada focus hai aapka. Matlab main tumhara Maharashtra ke colleges ka CET hi rehta hai, students JEE bhi nahi dete hain, CET pe focus rehte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aapko nahi bola na, sang guta kadayche hote.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sorry, mujhe Marathi nahi aati hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello, haan nahi nahi, aapko nahi bola.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai theek hai. Atharv to abhi exam de lo lekin agar jisme zyada interested ho usme apply pehle kar loge na to poora admission procedure ke baare mein aapko sab samajh mein aa jayega. Kyunki admission, waise aapke dost hain to unhone bata to diya hi hoga aapko kya hai, kis tarike se rehta hai MIT-WPU ka criteria.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Placements wagera unka abhi kaisa chal raha hai, internships wagera?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo first year mein hai matlab like this year hi, last year hi join kiya. Unka last year 12th khatam hua na.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi complete nahi hui hai na unki?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi, complete nahi, first year mein hi rahenge abhi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, first year mein. To wo aapse senior hain ya aas paas mein rehte hain? School se, ek hi school se aap log padhe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi matlab main 11th, senior hai 11th 12th mein the.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achcha achcha. 11th mein the, wo 12th mein the, waise tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. Unhone kya review diya hai WPU ka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Wo bole ki campus bahut accha hai aur placements ka bhi sahi hai yahan pe aur entry ka bhi accha matlab entry bhi ho jaati hai jaldi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan haan. Aur faculty kaisi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Faculty ka bhi unhone review accha diya tha ki haan teaching staff bhi accha hai. Wo bhi CSE hi kar rahe B.Tech mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achcha achcha achcha. B.Tech CSE.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. To fir unse ek baar unse hi pooch lo ki unhone CET ke baad apply kiya tha ya pehle kar liya tha. Bacche itna apply karke chal rahe hain Pune wale. To kuch na kuch to advantage unko hoga na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ek baar pooch lena unse ki bina apply kiye CET ke baad bhi kaam chal jayega ya fir abhi apply karna zyada better rahega. Main yahi suggest karungi ki aap apply kar lo taaki aapko aur acche se admission team har saal kuch kuch cheezein nayi cheezein aati hain, kuch cheezein change hoti hain. To agar aap abhi se baat karke rakh loge na to aapke liye better hoga. Baaki to dost se aap apne pooch lo, friend se.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chalo.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur kuch fees wagera hai apply karne ki?

full_text:
[00:02 - 00:06] Counsellor: Hello. Hi Atharv bol rahe ho aap? Atharv Ambekar?
[00:06 - 00:07] User: Haan haan bolo.
[00:07 - 00:11] Counsellor: Atharv aap MIT-WPU mein apply karne wale the, aapne apply kar diya hai?
[00:12 - 00:13] User: Nahi kiya abhi tak.
[00:14 - 00:15] Counsellor: Abhi nahi kiya?
[00:15 - 00:18] User: CET diya hai, uske baad kya karna hai wo pata nahi tha.
[00:18 - 00:20] Counsellor: Achcha achcha. CET ke baad hi apply karoge aap?
[00:21 - 00:23] User: Haan matlab CET ho gaya mera, maine de diya.
[00:24 - 00:27] Counsellor: Haan haan matlab CET ke result ke baad karoge kya? Ye puch rahi hu main.
[00:27 - 00:36] User: Haan haan. Par haan wahi karna tha, CET ke result ke baad hi. To MIT Pune ka koi khud ka ye hai kya fir? Exam wagera?
[00:36 - 00:38] Counsellor: Application form hai unka, bas exam to nahi hai.
[00:39 - 00:40] User: Achcha achcha.
[00:40 - 00:45] Counsellor: Sirf MIT-WPU hi decide kiya hai ya fir aur bhi universities ke liye aap comfortable ho?
[00:46 - 00:56] User: COEP. COEP, PICT. PICT, ye bhi kiya tha na apna PICT, Pune ka hi hai.
[00:56 - 01:04] Counsellor: Pune Institute of Technology na? Ek PCOE bhi hai, Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering. DY Patil bhi hai.
[01:04 - 01:07] User: Haan. DY Patil. Ajinkya bhi, Ajinkya karke bhi tha ek.
[01:08 - 01:13] Counsellor: Haan Ajinkya DY Patil. To ye sab bas shortlist kar rakha hai, CET ke result ke baad aisa matlab decide karna hai?
[01:13 - 01:19] User: Haan. CET ke baad hi decide karna padega matlab CET ke percentile ke upar kaunsa milega, kaunsa nahi milega.
[01:19 - 01:29] Counsellor: Achcha. Kuch universities ka to khud ka bhi application form hai, to agar jiske liye bhi inme se sabse zyada aap interested ho, shayad zyada aap MIT-WPU ke liye interested the.
[01:29 - 01:31] User: Haan haan.
[01:31 - 01:33] Counsellor: Hai na? First priority WPU hai aapki?
[01:34 - 01:35] User: Haan wahi hai.
[01:35 - 01:39] Counsellor: Ya COEP bhi matlab COEP mein to thoda hard rehta hai aapka.
[01:39 - 01:51] User: Nahi WPU. MIT-WPU hi tha kyunki mere senior bhi ek wahan pe hai jo abhi first year unka ho gaya complete, ho jayega complete. Baad mein usko pehli priority thi.
[01:51 - 01:52] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[01:52 - 02:11] Counsellor: Main bas ye samjha rahi hu na aapko ki dekho aap kitne matlab aap bas mujhe thoda sa profile brief kar do fir main bol bata sakti hu aapko ki at least ek do jagah hi apply karna chaho to aap kar sakte ho. Kyunki ye rehta hai na ki agar aap apply abhi kar lete ho to kuch percentile se agar reh bhi jaata hai na to aapko kai baar wo preference mil sakti hai.
[02:11 - 02:17] Counsellor: Baaki aapne 12th ka exam de diya hai, hai na? Kitne aapko lag rahe hain 12th mein aa jayenge?
[02:17 - 02:20] User: Around 75 to 80.
[02:21 - 02:29] Counsellor: 75 to 80. Theek hai. 12th ka itna matlab wo to aapka eligibility me se one of the criteria hota hai, usme 65-70 mein accept ho jaata hai aapka.
[02:29 - 02:36] Counsellor: Aur WPU mein I think cut off high jaata hai B.Tech CSE branch ka. Aapko CSE mein jaana hai ya kisi aur branch ke liye dekh rahe the?
[02:36 - 02:38] User: Haan haan, CSE mein hi.
[02:38 - 02:39] Counsellor: CSE mein hi na?
[02:39 - 02:39] User: CSE mein.
[02:39 - 02:46] Counsellor: Theek hai. So aap 12 abhi aapne JEE ke do attempt diye hain ya ek hi attempt diya tha?
[02:46 - 02:49] User: First hi, second hi attempt diya tha April wala.
[02:49 - 02:51] Counsellor: Okay. Usme kitna hai aapke?
[02:51 - 02:59] User: Rank? 65. 65 percentile hai aur rank around 5 lakh hai.
[02:59 - 03:00] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[03:00 - 03:02] User: 5 lakh ke aas paas rank aa rahi hai.
[03:02 - 03:04] Counsellor: Rank aapka 5 lakhs ke around hai.
[03:04 - 03:07] User: Haan. CET mein accha kiya hai par is baar.
[03:07 - 03:08] Counsellor: CET sahi gaya?
[03:08 - 03:18] User: CET ka dusra attempt bhi. Nahi nahi, mera JEE ka hi kharab gaya tha par CET mein accha kiya hai aur CET ka mera second attempt bhi hai. Matlab pehle mein to accha kiya, second mein de raha hu abhi.
[03:18 - 03:29] Counsellor: Theek hai theek hai. To CET ka sahi gaya aur second wale pe zyada focus hai aapka. Matlab main tumhara Maharashtra ke colleges ka CET hi rehta hai, students JEE bhi nahi dete hain, CET pe focus rehte hain.
[03:29 - 03:30] User: Haan.
[03:30 - 03:31] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[03:31 - 03:33] User: Aapko nahi bola na, sang guta kadayche hote.
[03:34 - 03:36] Counsellor: Sorry, mujhe Marathi nahi aati hai.
[03:36 - 03:38] User: Hello, haan nahi nahi, aapko nahi bola.
[03:38 - 03:54] Counsellor: Theek hai theek hai. Atharv to abhi exam de lo lekin agar jisme zyada interested ho usme apply pehle kar loge na to poora admission procedure ke baare mein aapko sab samajh mein aa jayega. Kyunki admission, waise aapke dost hain to unhone bata to diya hi hoga aapko kya hai, kis tarike se rehta hai MIT-WPU ka criteria.
[03:54 - 03:58] Counsellor: Placements wagera unka abhi kaisa chal raha hai, internships wagera?
[03:59 - 04:04] User: Wo first year mein hai matlab like this year hi, last year hi join kiya. Unka last year 12th khatam hua na.
[04:04 - 04:06] Counsellor: Abhi complete nahi hui hai na unki?
[04:06 - 04:08] User: Nahi nahi, complete nahi, first year mein hi rahenge abhi.
[04:08 - 04:13] Counsellor: Theek hai, first year mein. To wo aapse senior hain ya aas paas mein rehte hain? School se, ek hi school se aap log padhe ho?
[04:13 - 04:16] User: Nahi matlab main 11th, senior hai 11th 12th mein the.
[04:16 - 04:19] Counsellor: Achcha achcha. 11th mein the, wo 12th mein the, waise tha.
[04:19 - 04:21] Counsellor: Okay. Unhone kya review diya hai WPU ka?
[04:22 - 04:31] User: Wo bole ki campus bahut accha hai aur placements ka bhi sahi hai yahan pe aur entry ka bhi accha matlab entry bhi ho jaati hai jaldi.
[04:32 - 04:33] Counsellor: Haan haan haan. Aur faculty kaisi hai?
[04:34 - 04:40] User: Faculty ka bhi unhone review accha diya tha ki haan teaching staff bhi accha hai. Wo bhi CSE hi kar rahe B.Tech mein.
[04:40 - 04:42] Counsellor: Achcha achcha achcha. B.Tech CSE.
[04:42 - 04:53] Counsellor: Theek hai. To fir unse ek baar unse hi pooch lo ki unhone CET ke baad apply kiya tha ya pehle kar liya tha. Bacche itna apply karke chal rahe hain Pune wale. To kuch na kuch to advantage unko hoga na?
[04:53 - 04:54] User: Haan.
[04:54 - 05:16] Counsellor: To ek baar pooch lena unse ki bina apply kiye CET ke baad bhi kaam chal jayega ya fir abhi apply karna zyada better rahega. Main yahi suggest karungi ki aap apply kar lo taaki aapko aur acche se admission team har saal kuch kuch cheezein nayi cheezein aati hain, kuch cheezein change hoti hain. To agar aap abhi se baat karke rakh loge na to aapke liye better hoga. Baaki to dost se aap apne pooch lo, friend se.
[05:16 - 05:17] User: Theek hai.
[05:18 - 05:18] Counsellor: Chalo.
[05:19 - 05:20] User: Aur kuch fees wagera hai apply karne ki?
[05:21 - 05:25] Counsellor: Haan, application ki aapki fees lagegi na? 2000 ki fees hai application ki.
[05:25 - 05:26] User: Achcha achcha.
[05:26 - 05:28] Counsellor: To wo pooch lo aap unse na.
[05:28 - 05:28] User: Okay.
[05:28 - 05:29] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:29 - 05:30] User: Theek hai theek hai.
[05:30 - 05:32] Counsellor: Chalo. Okay, all the best. Take care.
[05:32 - 05:33] User: Thank you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello sir, good afternoon. Actually this is Trishna. Hope you remember we had a conversation regarding your, I guess there was a student looking for B.Tech in Delhi NCR.

turns.text: Student has filled. And today, today I got a call from ABES college and they told me about the recruitment process and all, all those stuff, admission process.

turns.text: Okay, but in this university are, are they not providing this CSE branch?

turns.text: Well, they told me that she can get an admission in, what was that?

turns.text: Mechanical, Civil or?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Some electronics and communication.

turns.text: Okay, okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In case if you would like to apply for more option as backup so you can apply for two three more options.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No, I should apply for other options as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay okay yeah. Haan, I do remember that. I have checked their eligibility criteria is quite tough to get B.Tech CSE at NIT.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: KCC is there. KCC.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: They accept.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Well then when it is about, when it is about Knowledge Park then there are thousand of, there are multiple options.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: But what I was thinking that if she get an admission nearby her home or something else then it it could be a little helpful for us as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.text: Ghaziabad right?

turns.text: Yeah in Ghaziabad.

turns.text: Okay.

turns.text: ITS Engineering college.

turns.text: Yes, yes.

turns.text: Okay, it is in Greater Noida na? I think they have two campuses or like you have filled for Greater Noida campus?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No, I have not filled the form yet.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But you are planning to fill.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah I am planning to fill.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, it is in Greater Noida right?

turns.speaker: User

turns.text: So your preference is Ghaziabad. Like more preferably you are more comfortable with this location because it will be nearby student's home.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Correct?

turns.text: Okay sir, no problem.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright sir, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you.

full_text:
[00:00 - 00:01] User: Hello.
[00:01 - 00:03] Counsellor: Hello. Ji boliye.
[00:03 - 00:06] User: Hello. Arman se baat ho rahi hai meri?
[00:06 - 00:07] Counsellor: Ji.
[00:07 - 00:10] User: Hi Arman, main Priyanka baat kar rahi hoon shiksha.com se.
[00:10 - 00:14] Counsellor: Aapki inquiry receive hui thi, aap colleges plan kar rahe the apni higher studies ke liye?
[00:14 - 00:15] User: Ji ji.
[00:15 - 00:17] Counsellor: B.Tech ke liye colleges dekh rahe the aap, right?
[00:18 - 00:19] User: Ji.
[00:19 - 00:22] Counsellor: Haanji bataiye.
[00:22 - 00:27] User: Kya kiya hua hai aapne? Kaise colleges, abhi tak koi college shortlist kiya hai aapne apne end se?
[00:28 - 00:32] Counsellor: Waise bahut college hai but aap apna se thoda sa suggest kijiye na.
[00:32 - 00:33] User: Theek hai.
[00:33 - 00:35] Counsellor: Isiliye bahut bahut college dekh ke confuse ho rahe hai na.
[00:35 - 00:36] User: Hmm hmm.
[00:36 - 00:39] Counsellor: Kis location mein colleges dekh rahe ho aap?
[00:40 - 00:43] User: Wahi Noida side ho jaye nahi to Kolkata side.
[00:43 - 00:48] Counsellor: Yehi do matlab jitna hai na ye uttar side mein ho jaye na to wahi theek rahega.
[00:48 - 00:50] User: Achha. Kahan rehte hain aap? Noida rehte hain kya?
[00:50 - 00:55] Counsellor: Nahi nahi, Noida mein mere father rehte hain na. Actually wo live in Gurgaon.
[00:55 - 00:56] User: Okay.
[00:57 - 01:02] Counsellor: To aise Uttar Pradesh ho jayega, Delhi ho jayega plus mein Bengal side ho jayega na.
[01:02 - 01:06] User: Hmm. To aur plus mein Rajasthan, Rajasthan nahi chalega.
[01:06 - 01:08] Counsellor: Yehi matlab yehi do teen states.
[01:08 - 01:12] User: Okay. So mainly Delhi NCR target kar rahe ho aap, right?
[01:12 - 01:13] Counsellor: Haan haan.
[01:13 - 01:14] User: Theek hai.
[01:14 - 01:21] Counsellor: Aap mujhe thoda sa apni profile batayenge 10th 12th mein kya kiya hai aapne aur kya percentage hai?
[01:22 - 01:23] User: 10th mein hai 85%.
[01:23 - 01:27] Counsellor: Hmm. Aur 12th hum science se kiye hue hain 82%, 82.2.
[01:28 - 01:29] User: 82.2.
[01:30 - 01:32] Counsellor: 12th mein kitna percentage hai?
[01:32 - 01:33] User: 82.
[01:33 - 01:34] Counsellor: 82, theek hai.
[01:34 - 01:37] User: B.Tech karna chah rahe hain aap CS mein. Ji.
[01:37 - 01:38] Counsellor: Ji. Okay.
[01:38 - 01:40] User: PCM tha aapke paas 12th mein na?
[01:40 - 01:42] Counsellor: Ji haan PCM tha.
[01:42 - 01:43] User: Theek hai.
[01:43 - 01:48] Counsellor: So abhi tak kisi bhi university mein application wagera apply kiya aapne? Application ki hai?
[01:48 - 01:50] User: Nahi kari. Nahi.
[01:51 - 01:52] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[01:53 - 02:00] User: To mainly jo hai dekho aapki profile ke accordingly agar main aapko colleges bataun to aapne koi entrance exam diya hua hai ya fir abhi kuch nahi diya?
[02:00 - 02:07] Counsellor: Abhi actually hum form fill up kiye hue hain CUET ka.
[02:07 - 02:08] User: Hmm.
[02:09 - 02:11] Counsellor: To uska exam dena hai.
[02:11 - 02:13] User: Kab hai exam aapka?

[02:18 - 02:19] Counsellor: Haan.
[02:19 - 02:20] User: Okay.
[02:23 - 02:29] Counsellor: Theek hai. Koi as such budget ka bracket leke chal rahe ho aapke kitne budget mein colleges aap dekh rahe ho?

[02:34 - 02:35] Counsellor: Sorry?
[02:35 - 02:37] User: Okay. Four lakh hai na?
[02:38 - 02:41] Counsellor: Four lakh hum payment karenge student credit card se.
[02:41 - 02:46] User: Hmm hmm. Aur plus mein aur plus mein wahi one year two lakh cash karenge bas.
[02:47 - 02:49] Counsellor: Achha achha. Theek hai.

[02:57 - 02:59] Counsellor: Haan wahi four to, haan four to five ya six.

[03:02 - 03:04] User: Theek hai. In Delhi NCR only.

[03:13 - 03:15] Counsellor: Achha achha. Theek hai.
[03:15 - 03:20] User: Aur specialization mein computer science ke alawa aur koi bhi specialization dekh rahe ho aap?
[03:21 - 03:24] Counsellor: Computer science nahi to electric, yehi do.
[03:26 - 03:31] User: Achha. Ya to electrics ya fir computer science, iske alawa aur kuch as such nahi.
[03:32 - 03:37] Counsellor: Bas wahi yehi do target hai. Computer science milega to wo le lenge nahi to electric milega to wo le lenge.
[03:37 - 03:41] User: Theek hai. But mainly mainly rahega computer science ke liye.
[03:41 - 03:42] Counsellor: Hmm. Theek hai.
[03:43 - 03:53] User: So dekho mainly jo hamare colleges hain Delhi NCR mein agar main aapko colleges bataun to aapne suna hoga jaise Mangalmay Institute of Engineering and Technology hai.
[03:53 - 03:55] Counsellor: Haan. Suna hai aapne iske bare mein?
[03:55 - 03:56] User: Ji ji.
[03:56 - 04:02] Counsellor: Greater Noida mein hai ye aur fees jo hai. Uska dekhe hue hain fir GNIIT ka dekhe hue hain, Lloyd ka dekhe hue hain.
[04:02 - 04:03] User: Hmm hmm.
[04:04 - 04:06] Counsellor: Inme application application bhi fill kari hai aapne?
[04:07 - 04:10] User: Nahi application nahi, ye sab ka hota hai customer care, us sab se baat kiye hue hain.
[04:10 - 04:13] Counsellor: Achha achha. But application abhi kahin nahi kari aapne.
[04:13 - 04:14] User: Nahi application kahin bhi nahi dale hue hain.
[04:15 - 04:16] Counsellor: Achha theek hai.
[04:16 - 04:24] User: Dekho hota kya hai na kyunki abhi hamare paas entrance exam nahi hai theek hai aur hame nahi pata ki entrance exam ke result mein hamara kitna score aayega.
[04:24 - 04:32] Counsellor: It is better ki agar hum jitna jaldi apna applications fill karenge na wahi baat hoti hai ki first come first serve wali, right?

[04:38 - 04:40] Counsellor: But what if ki abhi aapko result nahi pata, right?
[04:41 - 04:53] User: To ye hota hai ki result aane se pehle hi aap apni jo hai application fill karke rakhte hain to ye hota hai ki university ko already knows ki theek hai aap early basis pe aaye ho, aapne apni application jo hai wo fill kar rakhi hai.
[04:55 - 04:56] Counsellor: Ji.
[04:56 - 05:01] User: Ab Mangalmay ki jo tuition fee hai that is approx aapki 5.16 lakh rupees ki hai.
[05:01 - 05:04] Counsellor: Ek K.R. Mangalam University hai jo Gurgaon mein hi hai.
[05:04 - 05:11] User: Iski fees jo hai wo approx approx aapki jo hai 6.9 lakh tak ki fee jaati hai iski.

[05:32 - 05:33] User: Only tuition fee.
[05:33 - 05:38] Counsellor: Ji. Aur agar excluding hostel fees kare to wahi six to seven, seven highest.
[05:38 - 05:40] User: Zyada nahi. Theek hai.

[05:50 - 05:51] User: Theek hai.
[05:52 - 05:56] Counsellor: Ab ma'am aap bol rahe hain na because ki six lakh hum afford nahi kar payenge na.
[05:56 - 05:58] User: Only five, five hi rakhiye.

[06:18 - 06:22] Counsellor: Theek hai. Budget plus mein college bhi badhiya hona chahiye na.

[06:49 - 06:50] Counsellor: Accept karna chahiye.

[06:58 - 07:03] Counsellor: Jaise ki usse hai na hum, jaise ki mujhe na loan mil jayega jaise Bihar se hai na.

[07:32 - 07:36] User: Aur jo rest which hai. Haan. Plus mein jo hostel fees hai wo hum apna cash karenge.
[07:36 - 07:37] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[07:37 - 07:42] User: Aur abhi tak aapne kahin pe bhi tuition application nahi fill kari hai na?
[07:42 - 07:43] Counsellor: Ji ji.

[07:51 - 07:58] Counsellor: Accordingly main un universities ki information bhi aapko de dungi and then usme application kaise karna hai, kaise process karna hai wo bhi main bata dungi, theek hai?

[07:59 - 08:00] Counsellor: Theek hai. Okay.

[00:00 - 00:01] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:01 - 00:02] User: Hello, hello.
[00:02 - 00:10] Counsellor: Yeah, I was calling actually I was in the counselling session with the student, so I just got busy there.
[00:10 - 00:11] Counsellor: Am I audible now to you?
[00:11 - 00:14] User: No, not very nice, but clear.
[00:14 - 00:18] Counsellor: Hello, am I audible? A bit clarity is required.
[00:19 - 00:20] User: Hello.
[00:20 - 00:23] Counsellor: Yeah. Yeah, yeah, yeah, am I audible now ma'am?
[00:23 - 00:27] User: Yeah, you are audible but a bit clarity is required, I said.
[00:27 - 00:29] Counsellor: Okay. Now is it fine?
[00:30 - 00:31] User: Yes, same.
[00:31 - 00:32] Counsellor: Okay.
[00:32 - 00:36] User: Yeah, so yes, please say. You were looking for your son only, right?
[00:36 - 00:37] Counsellor: Yes.
[00:37 - 00:40] User: Okay, what he is doing right now? I mean.
[00:40 - 00:52] User: Like he has given class 12 ISC, so he is awaiting the results. And his intention is to get to B.Tech engineering with computer science. Can you just help me out?
[00:53 - 00:58] Counsellor: Okay, he is looking for, just a second, just B.Tech colleges, right?
[00:58 - 01:03] User: Yes, yes. He will pursue with engineering in computer science.
[01:03 - 01:07] Counsellor: Okay. And specialization will be. Yes, yes, say.
[01:07 - 01:08] Counsellor: The location will be?
[01:08 - 01:16] User: The location can be Kolkata, can be outside Kolkata. I just want to know a brief about it. I am very confused, that is why I required help.
[01:17 - 01:18] Counsellor: Okay.
[01:19 - 01:22] User: And I think you are an educational counsellor, is not it ma'am?
[01:22 - 01:24] Counsellor: Yeah, yeah. I am calling you from shiksha.com only.
[01:24 - 01:37] Counsellor: So B.Tech colleges, I can you know guide you in Kolkata that too is there is any you know budget bracket which you are looking?
[01:37 - 01:39] User: No, no, no, no, not now.
[01:39 - 01:40] Counsellor: Not really.
[01:40 - 01:42] User: Okay.
[01:42 - 01:47] User: Like the placement and the faculty should be good. That is my requirement.
[01:47 - 01:48] Counsellor: Okay.
[01:49 - 01:54] Counsellor: So from your end have you searched about the colleges? Like have you shortlisted any of the colleges?
[01:54 - 01:55] User: May I know the names?
[01:55 - 02:06] User: No, see from like my son has appeared for JEE mains but his percentile will not be good, he has said. And he has given BITSAT, yesterday also he has given KIIT.
[02:07 - 02:14] User: Haan, and next upcoming is VIT and like that is all out of Kolkata what I said.
[02:14 - 02:15] Counsellor: Okay, okay.
[02:15 - 02:20] User: Yeah, so within Kolkata like what all colleges are there, what is the facility, can you just tell me?
[02:21 - 02:22] Counsellor: Yeah sure, I am really confused.
[02:22 - 02:35] Counsellor: Sure, sure, sure. I can tell you. Also after the call what I can do best is I can also share you the details over the WhatsApp so you can you know go to it or briefly you can know about the university.
[02:35 - 02:39] Counsellor: But overall I can give you a review or you know certain.
[02:39 - 02:46] User: Yes, certain colleges like yes, see some like they are calling me up from IEM and then Techno.
[02:46 - 03:01] User: Like now I am a bit confused like Techno has so many branches. One is under MAKAUT university and one is autonomous university. So I am getting a bit confused about it. Like what is good? MAKAUT is good or an autonomous is good?
[03:01 - 03:03] User: So just can you clear me out?
[03:03 - 03:09] Counsellor: Both the university which you have told me that is, can you please repeat the names?
[03:09 - 03:11] User: Techno India.
[03:11 - 03:14] Counsellor: Techno India. Okay, okay, okay, okay.
[03:15 - 03:16] User: Are you ma'am from Kolkata?
[03:16 - 03:25] Counsellor: No, I am not from Kolkata only but we are dealing with the pan India colleges. So I can give you a brief you know idea about the colleges and yeah yeah yeah.
[03:25 - 03:34] Counsellor: So as I can check that there is a university in Kadampukur that is Amity University in Kolkata only, right?
[03:34 - 03:36] User: Okay.
[03:36 - 03:44] Counsellor: Yeah, they are offering, I mean student is planning to give any entrance or he will, he has already given?
[03:44 - 03:46] User: As you said that ZAT.
[03:46 - 03:47] Counsellor: Amity.
[03:47 - 03:49] User: No, no, no, I am generally I am asking.
[03:49 - 03:50] Counsellor: Huh?
[03:50 - 03:51] Counsellor: Generally I am asking.
[03:51 - 04:02] User: Haan, he is giving exams like JEE mains he has given then already BITSAT he has given, yesterday KIIT he has given. So he is giving the entrance exams.
[04:02 - 04:03] Counsellor: Okay.
[04:04 - 04:12] Counsellor: Sure. So in if I will say in Kolkata only for B.Tech CS we have the colleges.
[04:12 - 04:20] Counsellor: That is Sister Nivedita University. That university is in Rajarhat.
[04:20 - 04:26] Counsellor: And the fee of the university is around 9.48 lakh rupees for total fee.
[04:27 - 04:33] Counsellor: And the medium salary or you could say average package which they are offering that is around 6 lakh rupees.
[04:34 - 04:43] Counsellor: Out of five the university got the you know reviews or the rating that is 4.1 out of five.
[04:43 - 04:45] User: Okay.
[04:45 - 04:51] Counsellor: Yeah. The second university that is in Kolkata only, University of Engineering and Management.
[04:51 - 04:53] User: Yeah, yeah, IEM.
[04:53 - 05:00] Counsellor: Yes. So the fee of the university is around 9.45 lakh rupees.
[05:00 - 05:06] Counsellor: And out of five the university ranking or you could say the placement ranking is 4.5.
[05:07 - 05:08] User: Okay placement.
[05:08 - 05:16] Counsellor: Yeah. They all those university which I am talking about they are offering B.Tech CS only and that too in your location.
[05:16 - 05:24] Counsellor: Then there is Om Dayal Group of Institute, Kolkata. The fee of the total fee of the course is.
[05:24 - 05:32] User: Which which university ma'am? What is the package they are giving in IEM and what is the faculty like? Can you say anything about it? Do you know?
[05:32 - 05:34] Counsellor: About IEM?
[05:34 - 05:35] User: Hmm hmm.
[05:35 - 05:36] Counsellor: Okay, just give me a second.
[05:37 - 05:55] Counsellor: So as I can check on the website that about the, I will do one thing na, about whatever the universities I am you know giving you the review.
[05:55 - 06:07] Counsellor: About the faculty as well as the detailed information, is it okay if I will share it on your WhatsApp?
[06:07 - 06:10] User: That will be fine. Ma'am see whatever you are saying that is that been shown in the Google also.
[06:10 - 06:16] User: I want some inner information.
[06:16 - 06:19] Counsellor: Because as I can, yeah yeah, please go on, go on.
[06:19 - 06:29] User: Yeah, I need an information like if you know personally anybody in Kolkata who deals with it, can you give him give that person's contact number?
[06:29 - 06:31] User: But this is I can see in Google even.
[06:31 - 06:32] Counsellor: Hmm hmm.
[06:32 - 06:36] Counsellor: So I will do one thing. In YouTube, in Google all this are promotional ma'am.
[06:36 - 06:44] User: Like sometimes it is saying Sister Nivedita is good, someone is saying IEM is good and someone is saying Techno India is good.
[06:44 - 06:47] User: Someone is saying JIS is good.
[06:47 - 06:51] User: So like I need a real information.
[06:51 - 07:01] User: So I know many are there, Heritage is there, Adamas is there. If I give 10 lakh in total four years all this are offering the same thing.
[07:01 - 07:10] User: So I want to know that what is the difference between this and BITSAT, a total thing I want to know because shiksha.com deals with this, I know.
[07:10 - 07:11] Counsellor: Yeah, yeah, yeah.
[07:11 - 07:22] Counsellor: So I will do one thing, just allow me around two minutes. I will just look who are you know from the Kolkata only and dealing with the colleges in Kolkata.
[07:22 - 07:25] Counsellor: So it will be more much better to you know transfer your call to them.
[07:25 - 07:29] Counsellor: So they can give you a brief idea about the faculty and the placement and other things, right?
[07:29 - 07:32] User: Yes, but who knows a bit of inside.
[07:32 - 07:41] User: This so I can take out from Google also and from YouTubers also. There are n number of YouTuber nowadays in Insta also. I am quite techno savvy about it.
[07:41 - 07:45] User: So these things I can take it out. This is not a bit problem for me.
[07:45 - 07:57] User: But I need the inside real thing. Just after I admit my son and then I find it oh no, this was better and that was better. I do not want to go to that confusion, you know?
[07:58 - 07:58] Counsellor: Okay.
[07:58 - 08:01] User: Because this is the career of my son.
[08:01 - 08:08] User: And I am quite like I am quite about it. I am like I need someone. So that is why I am contacting you all.
[08:08 - 08:11] Counsellor: No worries, no worries, got your point.
[08:11 - 08:15] Counsellor: I will just allow me around, I will say five minutes approx.
[08:15 - 08:17] User: Ma'am your five minutes will become again 30 minutes.
[08:17 - 08:19] Counsellor: No, no, no, don't worry, it will not, it will not.
[08:19 - 08:21] Counsellor: I will take care of it. Sure. Thank you.
[08:21 - 08:22] User: Yeah, yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Meri baat Varun Sahu se ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi Varun, main Priyanka baat kar rahi hu Shiksha.com se.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapki query receive hui thi, aap B.Tech ke liye colleges search kar rahe hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, sahi time hai aapse baat karne ka?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan boliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: B.Tech ke liye colleges kis location mein search kar rahe hain aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi B.Tech ke liye nahi, woh main abhi BBA LLB ke liye soch raha hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: BBA LLB ke liye, aur 12th, 10th 12th ka thoda sa profile bataoge aap mereko apna?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 12th ka toh abhi result nikla nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kya expected hai, kitna aa jayega, kuch idea?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, aur 10th mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: 10th mein 80.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kis location mein colleges dekh rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: BBA LLB ke liye na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, kis location mein colleges dekh rahe hain aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Odisha mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, abhi tak koi college mein application wagera fill kari hai aapne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi tak toh nahi ki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Odisha mein dekh rahe ho aap college?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So dekho main jo hai aapko kuch colleges apne end se suggest kar sakti hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapne koi entrance exam diya abhi tak?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi woh abhi KITT ka hai, uske liye daala hai, woh abhi May last ko hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CUET ka na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi KITT ka, woh KITT ka jo hota hai na apna entrance exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan haan haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So main aapko jo hai kuch BBA LLB ke liye colleges jo hai woh main search karke aapko bata deti hu jo aapko aapki location mein mil jayenge, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Is there is any specific budget jo aap dekh rahe ho colleges mein?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi waise koi specific budget nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Koi specific nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur apne end se abhi tak aapne I mean kuch colleges mein application wagera nahi fill ki hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So Odisha mein jo hai, are you okay with Bhubaneswar or any other location?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan koi baat nahi, koi baat nahi, woh hum Bhubaneswar paas mein hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm hmm, isliye maine pucha ki agar aap Bhubaneswar mein okay hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise Bhubaneswar mein jo hai hamare paas aapke do teen colleges hain which jisme abhi applications ongoing hain, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek toh aapka Birla Global University hai, jiski tuition fee jo hai woh approx approx aapki 7 lakh rupees hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur isme aapke direct applications bhi accepted hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, direct applications in the sense ki aap jo hai apna direct application ke basis pe bhi aapko seat allot hoti hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh Bhubaneswar mein hai, apart from Bhubaneswar agar main Odisha ki baat karu toh Odisha mein jo hai hamare paas kuch main located colleges hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise ki one of the colleges is NLU Odisha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, National Law University jo hai, ek yeh bhi aap check out kar sakte ho, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Woh NLU mein uska woh CLAT dena padta hai, uske liye woh CLAT December se khatam ho chuka hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm, toh abhi aapne I mean uska koi form wagera ya kuch aisa fill nahi kiya tha?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi nahi nahi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Main soch raha tha B.Tech ke liye lekin abhi matlab B.Tech ab nahi karna hai toh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usi ke liye main, main matlab pehle se sochta toh woh CLAT ka de deta exam.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan haan, samajh rahi hu main.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh ab dekho kyunki humne koi entrance exam nahi diya hai aur hum is point of time pe hain jahan pe almost universities ke jo hai applications woh close kar rahe hain, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh Odisha mein jaise agar main woh jo abhi maine college aapko bataya woh hata bhi du toh uske alawa.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapka ek hai Centurion University of Technology and Management which is in Bhubaneswar only, theek hai, private institute hai, iski jo tuition fee hai that is approx 5.75 lakh rupees.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan main actually woh aaj kal ke andar woh XIM ka aur woh SOA ka try kar raha hu, dekhte hain kya hota hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh SOA ka aapne jo hai application form fill kar diya hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, woh kal karunga main jaake.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So what I can do is I can share you some details of SOA as well, jisme jo hai main aapko either ki uski jo applications wagera hai uske liye I can help you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur jo universities main aapko bata rahi hu jaise yeh Centurion University of Technology hai ya Birla Global University hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ganjam Law College hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Isme bhi iski jo tuition fee hai woh approx 1.5 lakh rupees hai aur isme direct applications, direct seats allot hoti hai application ke basis pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh first come first serve ke accordingly.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh main inki details ek baar na aapko share kar deti hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apart from that main SOA aur SOA ke alawa bhi aur koi college aap dekh rahe ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: SOA aur XIM.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: BBA LLB specifically right? Not BA LLB.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, main jo hai ek baar aapko inki details WhatsApp bhi kar deti hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeh same number pe WhatsApp use kar rahe ho aap jisse abhi baat ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, I will do one thing, main aapko na hi ka message drop kar rahi hu, aap mujhe revert karo, accordingly once you will revert accordingly I will fetch the details, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, okay sure, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

[05:15 - 05:16] Counsellor: Okay.

[03:43 - 03:44] User: Matlab jaise aapne koi.
[03:44 - 03:46] Counsellor: Sorry?
[03:46 - 03:46] User: Haan boliye.
[03:47 - 03:55] Counsellor: Jaise aapne koi application fill ki Amity mein, theek hai, aapke application ke basis pe wo aapko seat allot karte hain, theek hai?
[03:57 - 04:06] Counsellor: Amity ka apna khud ka P.I. aur test hota hai jo wo conduct karte hain then aapko seat milti hai, iski jo fees hai na wo around aapke four point four lakh rupees hai.
[04:07 - 04:11] User: Around saade char lakh maan ke chalo aap B.Com ki.
[04:11 - 04:15] Counsellor: Placement rating jo hai wo aapki four point one hai out of five.
[04:16 - 04:26] Counsellor: To isi tarike se similarly jitne bhi private universities hain na Ranchi mein wo unki fees jo hai approx approx itni hi padti hai.
[04:26 - 04:31] Counsellor: Ab jaise ek aur university hai Jharkhand Rai University, naam suna hai aapne uska?
[04:32 - 04:34] User: Haan sune hain.
[04:35 - 04:46] Counsellor: Iski jo fees hai wo thodi kam hai, isme bhi direct applications hain to direct applications ke through ye seat allot karte hain, theek hai aur jo fee range hai iski that is around one point two lakh rupees.
[04:46 - 04:49] Counsellor: To aap isme ek baar try kar sakte ho, theek hai?
[04:50 - 04:54] Counsellor: Kyunki aapko ye bhi dekhna hoga ki kaunsi university mein abhi applications open hain.
[04:56 - 05:13] Counsellor: Abhi aap main kya plan kar rahe hain ki kyunki abhi tak hamare haath mein result nahi hai twelfth ka aur aapne koi entrance bhi nahi diya hai, is point of time pe mostly jo hai universities, colleges jo hain apne applications close kar rahe hain, to abhi aap kya plan kar rahe ho fir aage ke liye?
[05:14 - 05:21] User: Aage ke liye abhi pehle admission karayenge uske baad fir.
[05:22 - 05:43] Counsellor: But aapne to admission kaise karaoge, abhi to aapne kahin kisi bhi college mein apply hi nahi kiya hai to fir kaise, kyunki jab aap application daalte ho to college aapko connect karta hai, batata hai ki seat blocking amount kitna hoga, fir aapka scholarship test hota hai, theek hai, uske basis pe scholarship allot hoti hai then aapko seat milti hai.
[05:43 - 05:49] Counsellor: But aapne to abhi tak kahin apply hi nahi kiya hai to aapko kaise pata chalega ki kahan pe kya ho raha hai?
[05:49 - 05:50] User: Haan.
[05:53 - 05:56] Counsellor: Ranchi ke alawa bhi koi location mein colleges dekh rahe ho aap?
[05:56 - 05:58] User: Nahi nahi dekh rahe hain Ranchi ke bahar.
[05:58 - 06:00] Counsellor: Achha sirf Ranchi mein hi dekh rahe ho?
[06:00 - 06:10] Counsellor: To main kya karti hoon jaise Ranchi mein Amity University hai, theek hai, Jharkhand Rai University hai, aise hi ek aapka Sarla Birla University hai Ranchi mein jiski fees aapki do lakh rupaye hai, theek hai.
[06:10 - 06:19] Counsellor: Ye bhi direct applications ke through seat allot karte hain aur inki placement rating bhi achhi hai, three point eight hai out of five.
[06:19 - 06:23] Counsellor: To ek aap ye jo hai isko check out kar sakte ho.
[06:24 - 06:33] Counsellor: Iske alawa Y.B.N. University hai Ranchi mein jisme direct applications ke through seat milti hai, iski fees jo hai wo ek lakh se kam hai.
[06:33 - 06:41] Counsellor: To isme aap try kar sakte ho agar inke paas seats allot hongi aur abhi jo inki applications agar khuli hongi to aap isme apply kar sakte ho, theek hai?
[06:42 - 06:42] User: Haan.
[06:43 - 06:47] Counsellor: Iske alawa baaki aap bataiye aap colleges ke baare mein aur kya information chahte hain?
[06:48 - 06:54] Counsellor: To jis number pe abhi hamari baat ho rahi hai, isi ye same number aap WhatsApp pe use kar rahe hain?
[06:54 - 06:55] User: Haan haan WhatsApp use karte hain.
[06:56 - 06:59] Counsellor: Yahi na seven two six double zero three eight five seven two?
[07:00 - 07:01] User: Haan.
[07:02 - 07:07] Counsellor: Main ek kaam karti hoon, main na aapko in universities ki kuch details bhi share kar dungi.
[07:07 - 07:17] Counsellor: Aap ek baar usko khud se bhi go through karna kyunki hamare haath mein abhi koi entrance exam nahi hai aur hamara result bhi nahi aaya, kitna predict kar rahe ho, kitna aa jayega twelfth mein?
[07:18 - 07:20] User: Twelfth mein.
[07:21 - 07:21] Counsellor: Hmm.
[07:22 - 07:28] User: Sixty five, seven, sixty five to seventy percent tak aa jayega.
[07:29 - 07:29] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[07:30 - 07:40] Counsellor: Make sure ki utna aa jaye so that ki aapko you know private colleges mein aap admission le sako aur apni seat secure kar sako.
[07:41 - 07:52] Counsellor: Agar aapko seat secure karni hai to aapko applications abhi se fill karke rakhni padengi kyunki jitna late aap application karoge utna zyada kam chance hote hain aapko admission milne ke, theek hai?
[07:52 - 07:53] User: Haan.
[07:53 - 08:24] Counsellor: Baaki main details ek baar aapko share karti hoon, aap usko details ko go through kar sakte ho, details go through karne ke saath saath na jaise applications fill karte hain na colleges mein, haan to kitne colleges ki applications jo hain kyunki aap jaise hamare saath registered ho Shiksha ke saath to Shiksha registered students ke liye kya hota hai ki aapko applications waiver mil jata hai, matlab jo application agar hazar rupaye ki hai to wo aapki free ho jati hai with the coupon code, theek hai?
[08:25 - 08:41] Counsellor: Either aapko jaise aap Shiksha ke through agar kisi university mein ja rahe hain aur uski application maan lijiye pandrah sau ki hai, theek hai, to Shiksha jo hai apne students ko kuch cashback bhi provide karta hai, to aap wo bhi avail kar sakte ho.
[08:41 - 08:44] Counsellor: But wo application fill hone ke baad hi hota hai.
[08:45 - 08:45] User: Oh.
[08:46 - 09:04] Counsellor: Theek hai, to main ye jo maine char paanch universities aapko batayi hain, Amity ho gaya, theek hai, aapka jo hai Amity ke alawa Y.B.N. University hai, Sarla Birla University hai aur aapka Jharkhand Rai University hai, main inki details aapko ek baar WhatsApp karungi, abhi main hi ka message drop kar rahi hoon.
[09:05 - 09:10] Counsellor: Aap mujhe revert karna, jaise aap revert karoge to hi main details aapko share kar paungi, theek hai?
[09:10 - 09:11] User: Haan theek hai.
[09:11 - 09:24] Counsellor: Haan fir main bhej deti hoon fir aap mujhe batana kaunsi university mein aap fill karna chahte ho application ya fir kaunsi university ke liye aap aur information janna chahte ho, accordingly fir main aapko share kar dungi aur options, theek hai?
[09:24 - 09:25] User: Theek hai.
[09:25 - 09:26] Counsellor: Theek hai, okay thank you.
[09:27 - 09:28] User: Welcome.

turns.text: Ji meri baat Chhavi se ho rahi hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Namaste ma'am, main Shiksha.com se baat kar rahi hoon aur I think aapse baat hua tha mera previously bhi, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay so ma'am I want to know aapne college shortlist kar liya hai Chhavi ke liye?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am abhi nahi kara kuch bhi, abhi sirf discussion chal raha hai ghar mein.

turns.text: Kya discussion chal raha hai ma'am? Agar koi concern hai, problem hai to bataiye taaki main us query ko solve kar sakun.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am college finalize karne mein issue aa raha hai ki kaun sa le.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha aap mujhe yeh bataiye, aapne apni end se kuch decide kar rakha hai kisi college ke baare mein, research kar rakhi hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mereko sabse best abhi tak ka NLU laga tha par usme CLAT maang rahe hain.

turns.text: NLU laga tha. Okay, to fir aapne uska application form daala hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi wahi to main keh rahi thi na, ma'am maine bataya na ki mera kuch final nahi tha ki mujhe usi mein admission lena hai. Main to sirf inquiry kar rahi thi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. Socha ki nahi main lock kar leti hoon, fir lock karne lagi to yeh ho gaya.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye LLB ke liye agar aap dekhenge to bahut achhe-achhe colleges ke maine aapko I think WhatsApp pe bhi share kiya tha. Aapne go through kiya hai unko?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am maine dekhe the.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm to aapko usme se, hmm hmm. Kya kehte ho use?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Usme se kuch samajh mein nahi aaya aapko?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kuch bhi samajh mein nahi aa raha. Seriously bata rahi hoon, kuch bhi samajh mein nahi aa raha ki kahan se lena hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Dekhiye. Woh log na admission bol ke seat booking ke liye form bhar do aap log.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. Iske baad woh further solve karenge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Maan lijiye maine seat booking ke liye form bhar diya, in case woh college pasand nahi aata hai like hostel sahi nahi hai, area wise sahi nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: At least, at least aapke paas woh cheez option mein to rahegi.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeh sochiye, kyunki seat full hone ke baad agar aapko full fee, full fee bhi pay karte hain to woh seat aapko nahi mil sakta hai, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To application form aap fill kar dete hain to woh seat aapke liye ek tarah se reserved ho jaata hai ki aap baad mein application daala hai to I think aap baad mein admission le sakte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aur agar nahi bhi lete hain admission is not, is not a big deal ki agar lena hai to le sakte hain nahi to koi zaroorat bhi nahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Right.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I know but agar main admission nahi leti hoon to woh payment waste ho jayegi na jo main seat booking ki payment karungi to?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekhiye, aapko LLB to karna hai, yeh to final hai, right? To aapko ab college to finalize karna hi padega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aap dekhiye saare colleges ke baare mein achhe se knowledge lijiye, jaaniye aur agar koi query hai aapko kisi ko bhi lekar jaise last time aapse baat hua tha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mujhe main yeh woh ho raha hai, ab mujhe kehte hain Delhi ke hi colleges bhej do.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mummy keh rahi hai ki area wise to woh nahi kar sakte kyunki agar yeh Delhi mein rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To yeh hoga ki main weekly ghar aa jaa sakti hoon ya fir meri family mujhe aa ke dekh sakti hai, main bhi, hmm hmm, at least woh jaise ki woh college mein jaake dekh lenge na ki hostel wagera kaisa hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm. To basically aap Delhi ke liye dekhna chah rahe hain, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan. Theek hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To main yeh kaam karti hoon, main Delhi ke jo bhi LLB colleges hain jo karate hain, achhe colleges jahan pe scholarship bhi achha ho and placement bhi achhi jagah ho, woh colleges ka data main aapko share karti hoon, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ek baar aap go through kijiye, main aapko 4:30 tak call back karungi to aap mujhe bataiyega ki aapne kaun sa college shortlist kiya hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ya fir aap bataiye main kal call karun aapko.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi aap kal le lo, koi issue nahi hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, main aapko colleges send kar rahi hoon kyunki hamein koi na koi college to shortlist karna padega, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To ek baar aap dekh lijiye achhe se, soch lijiye aur jo bhi aapke liye comfortable hai, aapko lag raha hai isme aapko karna chahiye, then uska application aap daaliye, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Alright, okay, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.text: Hello, haanji Yuvraj, ab aa rahi hai awaaz aapko?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji ji aa rahi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haanji bataiye, 10th, 12th aur graduation ke marks batayenge aap mujhe apne?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Mere 10th mein aaye the 61.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And 12th mein mere 50 aaye the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, and graduation mein 6.9 CGPA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, BSc kari hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji, chemistry.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, BSc in chemistry.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, sure. So you are looking for MSc in the same field only?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: As I can check ki aapne environmental science ke liye search out kiya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur basically jo bhi colleges aapne dekhe hain abhi tak bhi, woh NCR ki side mein dekhe hain, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But you said that you are okay with any other location.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Toh main either aapko, what I will do is, main aapko kuch MSc ke liye colleges bata deti hoon, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I can start with NCR location within your budget.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Same number jo hai aap WhatsApp pe bhi use kar rahe hain jispe abhi baat ho rahi hai hamari?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi nahi, alag hai mera number WhatsApp pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha theek hai. After the conversation aap mujhe ek baar number, ya toh aap mujhe number bhi bata dijiye ek baar, main update kar dungi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Also jo main colleges aapko bata rahi hoon na, toh woh main fir aapko WhatsApp bhi kar dungi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So you will have a, you know, information in your hand. Accordingly aap usse fir go through bhi kar sakte ho, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Aap sirf ek hi location ka information denge?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi aisa nahi hai. Nahi nahi nahi, aisa kuch nahi hai. We are dealing with pan India colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I can start with Delhi NCR, later on aap mujhe locations batate jaana, main aapko colleges usme add on karti jaungi, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay, sure, sure.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Just give me a second, I can just put the.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Iska overall woh mil sakta hai kya, brochure, matlab sab cheez ka including hostel and mess and all?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Definitely, definitely. I can share that with you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Even though if you want, I can also, you know, share some, you could say, direct college links to you so that ki aap college ki website pe hi use directly go through kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: As you are a Shiksha registered student, so kyunki agar aapne abhi jis bhi number se aapne, jis par bhi baat ho rahi hai na, if you are going to fill the application with the same number, so there are multiple universities, kyunki aap Shiksha registered students hain, toh you will get a free application on that, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Also there will be some cashback from Shiksha's side, so you can avail that as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: If you are filling the application from the same number.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.text: Yes ma'am, yes ma'am.

turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.text: Dekho Delhi NCR mein agar aap achha college dekh rahe ho na, around paanch saat lakh rupaye fees to phir bhi hoti hai colleges ki, itna aapko bhi pata hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur specifically B.Tech ke liye seats jo hain wo kitni limited hain ye aapko pata hai, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki all over India se students jo hain wo NCR target karte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur NCR mein hi reh ke aap, abhi aap ye maan ke chalo jo students hain wo per student jo hai wo apni cities jo hain wo target kar karke nahi nahi bhi to 20 se 25 application fill karke rakh raha hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Although main jo hai aapko kuch colleges bata sakti hoon, theek hai, jo ki B.Tech CS ke liye aur aapki location mein hi hai.

turns.text: Kuch aisa, wahi five lakh ke around.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, college?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ab wahi hai na, aapko pata hoga ki B.Tech ke liye ya kisi bhi particular course ke liye first come first serve wali baat hoti hai na, bacche jitna jaldi application fill kar rahe hain unki seat blocking utni jaldi hoti hai, right?

turns.text: Haan wo to hai. To aap Delhi NCR mein hi rehte hain, kahan rehte hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am abhi to main Bihar se bol rahi hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, to phir aap colleges yahan pe dekh rahe ho, I mean?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Bihar mein kyun nahi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am Bihar mein utna achha placement nahi hai colleges mein.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Isliye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main jo hai ek kaam karti hoon, abhi jis number pe hamari baat ho rahi hai, main ek baar jo hai aapko ye isi number pe WhatsApp use kar rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho main jo colleges maine aapko abhi bataye na, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Inki details to main aapko share kar hi deti hoon but jo GNIOT hai iski application bahut jaldi fill hoti hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aapka ek Amity bhi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity ka bahut saare campus hai, ek Noida hai aur ek Gurugram hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap wo dono hi campus dekh sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Amity Noida ki jo application fee hai,

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ma'am jo bhi, jo bhi is range mein better college hai wo sab ka aap list bhej dijiye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Isi pe state ka koi problem nahi hai, UP ya phir yahan pe Bihar, jo bhi aas paas mein Bihar ke states, un sab mein possible hai, main ja sakti hoon wahan pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But Delhi to.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho jaana, jaoge to tab na jab aap application fill karoge ya phir aapke paas kahin ka offer letter aayega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi aapne kahin apply nahi kiya, theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur abhi is point of time pe na universities kabhi bhi apni application close kar sakti hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: What I will suggest you is ki main details aapko share kar deti hoon NCR ke jo colleges hain for B.Tech CS, theek hai, under five, six lakh rupees.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap mujhe usmein se dekh ke ye batao ki aap kis mein application fill karna chahte ho, accordingly I will help you with the application kyunki application ke baad jo personal interview aur test hota hai usmein jo material aapko chahiye hota hai, I can help you with that as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But try karo ki at least do application to aap aaj fill kar hi do, aur aisa nahi hai ki dono paid wali hi karo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: There are multiple universities jaise Amity hai, to Amity ke jo Gurugram campus hai wahan pe kyunki aap Shiksha registered student ho, aapki application fee jo hai wo waive off ho jaati hai, to aap use bhi use kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? And then also kyunki aap Shiksha ke through you know applications kar rahe hain ya phir colleges aap shortlist kar rahe hain to Shiksha bhi apne students ko, apne registered students ko cashback provide karta hai to aap usko bhi avail kar sakte ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But wo hoga tabhi jab aap applications fill karoge, you will share the you know screenshot with me.

turns.speaker: User
