full_text:
[00:01 - 00:02] User: Hello.
[00:02 - 00:04] Counsellor: Hello. Kanak se baat ho rahi hai meri?
[00:05 - 00:05] User: Haan boliye.
[00:06 - 00:11] Counsellor: Hi Kanak, main Priyanka baat kar rahi hoon shiksha.com se. Actually aapki request aayi thi call back ke liye.
[00:11 - 00:13] Counsellor: Aap colleges search kar rahe the na B.Tech ke liye?
[00:14 - 00:14] User: Yes ma'am.
[00:15 - 00:17] Counsellor: Okay. Sahi time hai baat karne ka aapse?
[00:18 - 00:18] User: Haan boliye.
[00:19 - 00:21] Counsellor: Bataiye kya colleges search karne hai?
[00:22 - 00:26] User: Ma'am B.Tech ke liye, B.Tech ke liye Delhi mein college bataiye.
[00:27 - 00:29] Counsellor: B.Tech ke liye Delhi mein colleges aap dekh rahe ho.
[00:30 - 00:31] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[00:31 - 00:34] User: Yes ma'am.
[00:32 - 00:34] Counsellor: Delhi NCR mein you are fine with?
[00:35 - 00:36] User: Haan haan.
[00:37 - 00:42] Counsellor: Jaise ki main check kar, I can show ki aapne Galgotias ke liye search kiya tha, right?
[00:43 - 00:46] User: Galgotias mein, usmein usmein koi interest nahi hai, doosra kuch aur bataiye.
[00:47 - 00:50] Counsellor: Achha. Phir aapne ITS Engineering College ke liye search kiya tha.
[00:51 - 00:52] User: Yes ma'am.
[00:53 - 00:55] Counsellor: To usmein application wagera fill kiya abhi aapne? Nahi?
[00:55 - 00:58] User: Nahi abhi kuch nahi kiya hoon, bas check kar rahi thi.
[01:03 - 01:05] Counsellor: Iske alawa aap mujhe thoda sa apna profile batayenge?
[01:05 - 01:07] Counsellor: Entrance exam kuch diya hai aapne?
[01:08 - 01:12] User: Yes ma'am, JEE Mains ka diye hue the. 3.7 lakh rank aaya hai uska.
[01:13 - 01:14] Counsellor: Kitni rank aayi hai?
[01:14 - 01:15] User: 3.7.
[01:15 - 01:16] Counsellor: Okay.
[01:18 - 01:18] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[01:19 - 01:24] Counsellor: So abhi aap aage ke liye kisi college mein application fill ki hai aapne apne end se abhi tak?
[01:24 - 01:26] User: Nahi nahi ma'am, abhi nahi kiya.
[01:26 - 01:27] Counsellor: Nahi kiya hai.
[01:27 - 01:34] Counsellor: Theek hai. But abhi tak aap kis cheez ka wait kar rahe the? I mean applications jo hain almost colleges ki close ho gayi hain, aapne abhi tak kahin pe application fill nahi ki hai.
[01:34 - 01:36] Counsellor: Abhi to bahut late ho gaya hai.
[01:38 - 01:41] User: No ma'am, main wait kar rahi thi state counselling ki.
[01:42 - 01:42] Counsellor: Achha.
[01:42 - 01:47] Counsellor: Wo to theek hai but aapko ye bhi to dekhna hoga na ki aap apne backup mein options leke chal rahe ho.
[01:47 - 01:50] Counsellor: Kyunki state counselling se to dekho aapko good colleges mil jayenge, right? No doubt.
[01:50 - 01:54] Counsellor: But as a backup aapke paas, aapke haath mein bhi to offer letters hone chahiye na?
[01:54 - 01:56] Counsellor: Aap B.Tech CS ke liye plan kar rahe ho?
[01:56 - 01:57] User: Yes ma'am.
[01:58 - 02:00] Counsellor: Theek hai. Aur Delhi NCR mein you are okay with?
[02:01 - 02:02] User: Yes ma'am, yes ma'am.
[02:02 - 02:03] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[02:03 - 02:08] Counsellor: Kuch specific jo hai aapka budget wagera kuch leke chal rahe ho aap, kitne budget mein?
[02:09 - 02:12] User: Achha college ma'am kis budget mein aa jayega?
[02:13 - 02:19] Counsellor: Dekho Delhi NCR mein agar aap achha college dekh rahe ho na, around paanch saat lakh rupaye fees to phir bhi hoti hai colleges ki, itna aapko bhi pata hai.
[02:19 - 02:24] Counsellor: Aur specifically B.Tech ke liye seats jo hain wo kitni limited hain ye aapko pata hai, right?
[02:24 - 02:28] Counsellor: Kyunki all over India se students jo hain wo NCR target karte hain.
[02:28 - 02:42] Counsellor: Aur NCR mein hi reh ke aap, abhi aap ye maan ke chalo jo students hain wo per student jo hai wo apni cities jo hain wo target kar karke nahi nahi bhi to 20 se 25 application fill karke rakh raha hai.
[02:43 - 02:43] User: Yes ma'am.
[02:44 - 02:49] Counsellor: Aur abhi tak aapne ek bhi nahi fill kiya, that is kind of shocking ki aapne nahi kiya hai.
[02:49 - 02:58] Counsellor: Although main jo hai aapko kuch colleges bata sakti hoon, theek hai, jo ki B.Tech CS ke liye aur aapki location mein hi hai.
[02:58 - 03:01] Counsellor: Aap mujhe bataoge kis budget mein aap college dekh rahe ho?
[03:02 - 03:04] User: Kuch aisa, wahi five lakh ke around.
[03:04 - 03:06] Counsellor: Under five lakh?
[03:06 - 03:06] User: Yes ma'am.
[03:07 - 03:09] Counsellor: Theek hai. 10th, 12th mein kya percentage rahi hai aapki?
[03:10 - 03:15] User: Ma'am 10th mein to mera 95% tha.
[03:15 - 03:22] Counsellor: Hmm.
[03:16 - 03:22] User: 12th mein ma'am maine open boarding se board se diya hai to abhi ma'am uska result nahi aaya.
[03:22 - 03:25] Counsellor: Phir bhi approx kya idea laga rahe ho aap, kitna aa jayega kuch idea?
[03:25 - 03:27] User: Ma'am 95 above hi aayega.
[03:27 - 03:29] Counsellor: 95 and above.
[03:30 - 03:31] Counsellor: Theek hai, koi dikkat nahi.
[03:31 - 03:38] Counsellor: Main jo hai aapko dekho NCR mein kuch colleges aapko bata deti hoon jo ki aapka you know under your budget hai.
[03:38 - 03:45] Counsellor: Theek hai? Wo aap ek baar go through kar sakte ho but aapko phir ye dekhna hoga ki most of the universities mein application kahan kahan pe open hai.
[03:47 - 03:48] User: Yes ma'am, college?
[03:50 - 03:57] Counsellor: Agar main waise baat karu to jaise aapka GIMS hai, jo Greater Noida mein hai, Engineering and Management Technical Campus hai.
[03:57 - 03:59] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[03:58 - 03:59] User: Yes ma'am.
[03:59 - 04:03] Counsellor: Inki JEE Mains ka jo exam hai wo accepted hai is college mein.
[04:03 - 04:06] Counsellor: To aap jo hai is college ke liye application fill kar sakte ho.
[04:07 - 04:09] User: Start ho gaya iska application?
[04:09 - 04:13] Counsellor: Most of the colleges band kar rahe hain apni application. Applications are ongoing.
[04:14 - 04:15] Counsellor: Hum abhi late hain is time pe.
[04:16 - 04:17] User: Oh.
[04:18 - 04:28] Counsellor: To isiliye maine poocha kyunki kal jaise hi JEE ka result aaya hai na, students ne aise applications fill ki hain ki most of the colleges apni application close kar rahe hain kyunki unka bucket bhi bharta hi hai na.
[04:28 - 04:38] Counsellor: Ab wahi hai na, aapko pata hoga ki B.Tech ke liye ya kisi bhi particular course ke liye first come first serve wali baat hoti hai na, bacche jitna jaldi application fill kar rahe hain unki seat blocking utni jaldi hoti hai, right?
[04:39 - 04:44] Counsellor: Especially jinki rank achhi nahi aayi hai ya jo apne backup mein options leke chalna chah rahe hain.
[04:44 - 04:52] Counsellor: Aur aisa nahi hai student ek application fill kar raha hai, per head student jo hai na nahi nahi bhi to paanch applications leke chal raha hai ki mere paas itne to hone hi chahiye.
[04:52 - 04:59] Counsellor: Kyunki application to starting phase hai, uske baad aapka PI hota hai, aapka test hota hai, uske baad aapko seat allot hoti hai.
[05:00 - 05:00] User: Yes ma'am.
[05:01 - 05:04] Counsellor: To agar main GIMS hai, theek hai, aap ye dekh sakte ho.
[05:05 - 05:09] Counsellor: Iske alawa jo hai aapka GNIOT hai jo Greater Noida mein hai.
[05:10 - 05:11] User: GNI UP?
[05:12 - 05:15] Counsellor: G N I O T, Greater Noida Institute of Technology.
[05:16 - 05:19] Counsellor: Jo Greater Noida mein hai, inki applications abhi chal rahi hain.
[05:19 - 05:25] Counsellor: To isse aap go through kar sakte ho, ismein JEE Mains ka jo hai result accepted hai, uske basis pe aapko scholarship bhi milti hai.
[05:26 - 05:26] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:26 - 05:27] User: Okay ma'am.
[05:27 - 05:36] Counsellor: Ek to JEE Mains ke basis pe, either ye jo hai apni seats early basis pe agar aap application fill kar rahe ho to direct application ke basis pe bhi seat aapko allot hoti hai.
[05:37 - 05:41] Counsellor: Iski tuition fee jo hai wo around aapki 3.68 lakh rupees hai.
[05:41 - 05:42] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:42 - 05:42] User: Okay ma'am.
[05:42 - 05:47] Counsellor: Aur abhi jo inka median package jo chal raha hai that is 4.6 lakh rupees.
[05:48 - 05:49] User: Okay ma'am.
[05:49 - 05:50] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[05:50 - 05:55] Counsellor: Iske alawa main aapko jo hai jaise KCC Institute of Technology and Management hai.
[05:56 - 06:00] Counsellor: Ye aapka Greater Noida mein hi hai, iski jo fees hai wo around 4.8 lakh rupees hai.
[06:01 - 06:03] Counsellor: Iski bhi applications abhi open hain.
[06:03 - 06:10] Counsellor: Ye apna khud ka bhi entrance exam lete hain plus mein JEE Mains ke basis pe bhi aapko scholarship allot hoti hai.
[06:10 - 06:15] Counsellor: Wo tab hota hai dekho, JEE Mains ke basis pe aapko jo colleges milenge wo to milenge hi, theek hai?
[06:15 - 06:20] Counsellor: Aap early apni application fill karke rakhoge to usse hoga ye ki aapke haath mein already offer letter hai.
[06:20 - 06:28] Counsellor: You have a strong backup so you can show that to university ki bhai mere paas to itne package ka already offer letter hai, so I can go with this university.
[06:29 - 06:30] User: Yes ma'am.

[07:16 - 07:17] User: Yes ma'am.

[07:28 - 07:30] Counsellor: To aap wo dono hi campus dekh sakte ho.
[07:30 - 07:31] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[07:31 - 07:32] User: Okay ma'am.

[07:34 - 07:38] User: Ma'am jo bhi, jo bhi is range mein better college hai wo sab ka aap list bhej dijiye.
[07:38 - 07:48] User: Isi pe state ka koi problem nahi hai, UP ya phir yahan pe Bihar, jo bhi aas paas mein Bihar ke states, un sab mein possible hai, main ja sakti hoon wahan pe.
[07:48 - 07:49] Counsellor: But Delhi to.

[07:56 - 07:59] Counsellor: Abhi aapne kahin apply nahi kiya, theek hai?

turns.text: Achha, to aapne end se kahin pe applications wagera ya kuch aisa fill kiya hai aapne abhi?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ki nahi kiya hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, waise nahi kiya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha achha, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So dekhiye, according to your, you know, preference aur in saari jo aapne mujhe batayi hain, iske basis pe I can guide you some colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Abhi jis number pe hamari baat ho rahi hai, isme jo hai, same number pe aap apna WhatsApp use kar rahe hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, okay, I will do one thing, mujhe na aap bas ek minute ka time dijiye, main aapko kuch colleges jo hain, wo bata deti hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jo ki aapka lateral entry accept karte hain.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Baaki aap jo hai, ek baar main details aapko WhatsApp bhi karungi, to aap ek baar wo bhi check kar sakte hain, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, baaki jo colleges hain jahan pe lateral entry jo hai abhi accepted hai ya fir applications jo hain wo ongoing hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aise bahut hi na limited colleges hain, to main ek baar inki list nikal leti hoon colleges ki and then accordingly, kyunki mujhe nahi lagta aise bahut zyada colleges hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dehradun ke alawa aur bhi koi location hai jo aap target kar rahe ho aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi, waise to abhi Dehradun hi hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap Dehradun mein hi rehte hain ya fir kahan rehte hain?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Main Dehradun mein hi hoon.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, bhai bhi Dehradun mein hai? Jo first year kar raha hai, wo kaunsi college se kar raha hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Abhi to wo government se kar raha tha, Bihar government se diploma.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha, achha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To main ek kaam karti hoon sir, main na ek baar list nikal leti hoon colleges ki jo ki Dehradun mein hi specifically lateral entry provide kar rahe hain, theek hai? Accordingly fir main aapko wo poore colleges, unka fee structure, placement rating, ye saari cheezein main bata deti hoon aur kahan kahan pe applications open hain. So if you are interested, you can go with the application thing.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Okay sir, thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: [UNINTELLIGIBLE].

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Am I speaking to Yuvika?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hi Yuvika, this side Priyanka from shiksha.com.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually we got your query, you were looking for colleges.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I am looking for colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, is it a right time to talk to you?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, please say for what program you are looking up to?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: As you I can.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah go on.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am looking for BBA.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: For BBA. Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And have you shortlisted any college till now?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I have shortlisted few colleges.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: St. Xavier's Mumbai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: The location which you are looking that is?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: It is either Mumbai, Chandigarh, Jaipur or Rajasthan.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so you are okay with all these locations which you are saying.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I am okay with all these locations.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sure. So may I know something about your profile?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Like what you have done in your 10th, 12th?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes sure ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sure, yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Please say, what was your score in 10th?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: It was 85%.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm. And in 12th?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I have just appeared for my 12th exam so the result is not disclosed yet.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay okay, it is awaited, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, it is awaited.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, have you given any entrance exam till now or are you planning to give?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I am planning to give ZAT exams which is on May 2nd.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. And apart from this you do not have given any other entrance exam, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am, yes ma'am, I have not thought about anything else.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay. So from your end the college which you were saying that was?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Which you have shortlisted?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: St. Xavier's.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: St. Xavier's. Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And any other college which you have shortlisted or have you filled the application of the colleges because for as you said that you have exam for ZAT, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm. So have you applied for any other college or filled the application?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am, I have not applied for any other college yet.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So what I can do is, may I know something like are you looking up to any, you know, colleges which is under budget?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So do you have discussed all this thing with your parents like are you looking for colleges within 5 lakh, 10 lakh or something?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I am looking under 5 to 7 lakh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: 5 to 7 around.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm. So firstly see, if I will say, you know, the colleges in Mumbai, I can guide you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So there are multiple colleges which is one of the college is according to your profile that is, you know, Universal Skilltech University.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Have you heard about this university?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am, I have not heard about it.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, they what basically see, as of now we do not have any entrance exam in our hand, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And most of the universities accepts MH for Mumbai they accepts MH CET or either CUET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But we do not have any.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So you know we have to go with the university where, you know, university is not asking for the, they are accepting the, you could say, direct applications.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Or either the university has their own application, that is why I asked you that have you shortlisted any university by yourself where you do not require any, you know, entrance exam.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Entrance exam.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am, I have not. Actually the colleges which I have been looking for, each and every college have some type of entrance exam and the application dates are already closed as I am, I was busy with my board exam, so it was very difficult to cope up with the application deadlines.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, no worries.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: See, in Mumbai we have a college which I can, you know, tell you that is ITM Institute of Hotel Management.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: That is in Navi Mumbai, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And the fee of the college is around 6.9 lakh rupees.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Application is still open so you can go with that. They similar university have, you know, multiple campuses.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So the second one is in Oshiwara.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So the first one is in Navi Mumbai and second one is Oshiwara.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So you can both go with that.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Where are you from basically?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am from Patna, Bihar.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so from I mean why you are not going with Patna colleges, why Mumbai or Rajasthan or somewhere else?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Because ma'am, I believe the exposure we want is not still not there in Patna.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: The the work life balance, the industries which I I have been looking for my career is not in Patna right now.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: So that is why I choose developed cities.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hmm. So see, what I can do best is I can, you know, for every location I can tell you at least one or two options so whatever the locations which you are looking, you will have all the options in your hand, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And then I can also share you the details of the university, the links, the fee and everything.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So you can go through it. So in Mumbai I can, you know, tell you that we can go with ITM which is under your budget and their applications are open right now because most of the universities have, you know, closed their application.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So we have to see whether the applications are open or not.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes ma'am, I get it.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And apart from ITM there is Universal Skilltech University which the course which you are looking they are offering.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: But applications are open there, theek hai, we can go with that.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I will just, the fee of the university is around 5.45 lakh rupees for whole course.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Right. Apart from Mumbai, which other location you are looking up to?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Chandigarh and Rajasthan or Jaipur.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chandigarh you are saying.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, just give me a second, I will just.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sure sure, take your time ma'am. [06:37 -> 06:52] [PAUSE]

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In Rajasthan we do have, you know, the colleges, have you heard about Amity Jaipur?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes, I have heard about it.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Have you like go through the website or have you filled the form of it?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No ma'am, I have not.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You have not. Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So we do have, you know, Amity Jaipur which you can, the applications are still going on so you can go with that. They are not asking for any entrance exam or something, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: They are offering the and the applications are open right now so you can go with Amity Jaipur.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah. Basis on your application and after that there is a PI which will be taken by the university only.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apart from Amity there is a college called Om Dayal Group of Institutions.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You can go with that as well, just a second, just. [07:56 -> 08:14] [PAUSE]

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah, am I audible now?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yes ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah. So in Rajasthan I told you about Amity, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: The second college which we can go with that is in Udaipur, that is SPJS, Shri Padmapat University.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah. But I have to check whether they have, you know, application are open or not right now.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: There is a, yeah, there is a university called Poornima University, that is in Jaipur only and they have, you know, applications are going on.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I will do one thing, the location which you told me that is in Jaipur.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mumbai, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And Chandigarh.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Chandigarh.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I will do one thing, I will give you a call back within two minutes and I will give you the name of the universities apart from the name of the university, I will tell you about the courses and the location.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And then I will guide you briefly about the university. After two minutes I will give you the call back. I hope you are free now.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes, sure ma'am.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Right? I will explain you about the university and everything and then we will go with the, then I will share the details with you over the WhatsApp.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sure.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sure. Thank you.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay. Okay, thank you.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Yeah.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah.

turns.text: Haan, wahi wahi. Theek hai. So ab main yeh kar sakti hoon ki jaise aapne mujhe bataya ki aap Bangalore mein colleges dekh rahe ho B.Tech CS ke liye. Computer Science ke liye na?

turns.text: Ji.

turns.text: Uska details madam nahi bhej sakte hain WhatsApp pe? Uspe saara hum check kar lete hain. Aapko hum WhatsApp college bhej rahe hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi, bilkul. Main ek baar na aapko thoda...

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Fir aapka hum number save kar leta hoon, uske baad result aane ke baad fir main aapse baat karunga.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sure. But tab tak sir abhi dekhiye jaise kitne colleges hain, Bangalore mein hi jinki applications open hain. But ek applications kab tak open hain, inki deadlines jo hain woh bahut close hain. Theek hai? Aap jab tak wait karenge ki result aayega, uss time tak toh applications hi close ho jayenge na? Tab toh student directly eligible hoga ki woh apne JEE ke result ke basis pe apni seat jo hai woh lock kar sake. But uske liye prior mein ek benefit yeh hota hai ki haan student ne apni prior applications jo hain woh universities mein fill kar rakhi hain. Agar main jaise aapko obviously main details toh aapko share kar hi dungi jo aapne bola. Isi number pe WhatsApp use kar rahe ho na aap?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai. Aap mujhe ek budget range bata sakte hain ki kis budget mein aap colleges dekh rahe hain student ke liye?

Aur placement rating jo hai iski woh 4.1 hai out of 5. Inki applications abhi open hain. Ismein JEE jo hai woh exam accepted hai, toh student ke liye benefit yeh hai ki woh apne JEE Mains ka jo result hai woh ismein plug in kar sakte hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Aur iske alawa jaise GITAM School of Computer Science hai Bangalore mein. Yeh aap check out kar sakte ho. Aapne waise in universities ka naam suna hai jo main bata rahi hoon abhi aapko?

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Iske alawa jo hai main aapko kuch aur colleges hain jaise T. John Institute of Technology hai. Iski, ismein bhi JEE Mains jo hai woh accepted hai. 13 lakh rupees inki fee hai. Aur placement rating jo hai woh aapki 3.2 hai out of 5.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So main inki kuch details, common details main aapko share kar deti hoon aapke jo hai WhatsApp pe. Aap ek baar inhein go through kar lijiye. Theek hai? turns.text: Toh uske accordingly fir main aapko ya toh applications ke liye guide kar dungi. Either jaise kai baar kya hota hai na universities mein apne khud ke entrance exam hote hain, personal interviews hote hain, test hote hain student ke.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

full_text:
[00:00 - 00:01] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:01 - 00:02] User: Haan ji.
[00:02 - 00:04] Counsellor: Hi, am I speaking to Satish?
[00:04 - 00:05] User: Ji.
[00:05 - 00:08] Counsellor: Hi Satish, main Priyanka baat kar rahi hoon shiksha.com se.
[00:08 - 00:09] User: Boliye madam.
[00:09 - 00:15] Counsellor: Aapki is number se query receive hui thi, aap colleges plan kar rahe hain? Engineering colleges?
[00:15 - 00:17] User: Ji madam, apne bacche ke liye hum kar rahe the.
[00:17 - 00:21] Counsellor: Achha achha. Bataiye kya plan kar rahe hain? Kya kar raha hai baccha abhi?
[00:22 - 00:27] User: Uska madam 95.2 percentile aaya hai abhi first paper mein JEE Mains mein.
[00:27 - 00:31] Counsellor: Achha achha. Theek hai. JEE Advanced ka bhi exam diya hai?
[00:32 - 00:33] User: Advanced ka abhi hua kahan hai?
[00:34 - 00:39] Counsellor: Advanced ka toh abhi result aane wala hai na aaj kal mein? Do exams hote hain na?
[00:39 - 00:43] User: Second two ka aa raha hai, JEE Mains ka paper two ka aa raha hai.
[00:43 - 00:44] Counsellor: Hmm hmm hmm.
[00:45 - 00:49] Counsellor: Toh second phase ka, second phase ka result abhi aaj kal mein aa jayega, right?
[00:49 - 00:53] User: Hmm, uske baad Advanced hoga, 17 May ko Advanced ka exam hai.
[00:54 - 00:59] Counsellor: Theek hai. So 12th ka result bhi abhi awaited hoga student ka?
[00:59 - 01:03] User: Mera uska ho gaya madam result. 12th mein uska 89% hai.
[01:04 - 01:04] Counsellor: 89?
[01:05 - 01:06] User: Hmm.
[01:06 - 01:08] Counsellor: Theek hai. Aur 10th mein?
[01:08 - 01:10] User: 10th mein 94 hai.
[01:10 - 01:15] Counsellor: 94 hai. Bataiye, aap kya bacche ke liye kya plan kar rahe hain? Kaise colleges dekh rahe hain?
[01:16 - 01:23] User: Abhi toh madam dekh rahe hain, abhi toh jaise agar NIT agar vagera, IITs ke NIT bhi nahi milega toh private college hi dhoondh rahe the badhiya.
[01:24 - 01:29] Counsellor: Theek hai. So badhiya se aapka matlab hai ki kis location mein colleges dekh rahe hain aap?
[01:30 - 01:33] User: IT sector jaise VIT Vellore vagera ho jaata hai.
[01:33 - 01:34] Counsellor: Hmm hmm.
[01:36 - 01:37] User: Wahi dhoondh rahe the.
[01:38 - 01:43] Counsellor: Theek hai. So mainly aap Bangalore side colleges dekh rahe hain ya fir like NCR mein open hain?
[01:44 - 01:50] User: NCR abhi toh madam IT sector mein zyada bacche log ko zyada choice rehta hai Computer Science ka.
[01:50 - 01:51] Counsellor: Haan ji, haan ji.
[01:52 - 01:56] User: Toh IT sector jahan pe zyada hai jis city mein wahan pe admission lene se na fayda hoga.
[01:57 - 02:04] Counsellor: Woh toh hai. Ab dekhiye jaise Mumbai, Mumbai ke side mein bhi IT sector ke achhe colleges hain. Fir Bangalore side bhi achhe colleges hain. Toh ek aapki preference...
[02:04 - 02:06] User: Bangalore ka ek lena tha madam.
[02:06 - 02:09] Counsellor: Theek hai. Toh mainly aap Bangalore, Bangalore mein...
[02:09 - 02:12] User: Bangalore mein Geetham Engineering college hai.
[02:12 - 02:13] Counsellor: Haan ji, haan ji.
[02:14 - 02:15] User: VIT Vellore hai.
[02:15 - 02:16] Counsellor: Hmm.
[02:18 - 02:20] User: SRM University shayad Bangalore mein hi hai na?
[02:20 - 02:28] Counsellor: Haan ji. Toh aapne in universities ke baare mein thoda sa search out kiya apne end se? Abhi tak kahin application vagera kuch fill ki hai aapne?
[02:28 - 02:31] User: Abhi toh madam counselling shuru hui nahi, abhi tak toh nahi kiye hain.
[02:31 - 02:36] Counsellor: Hmm. Bacche ne entrance exam JEE ke alawa aur koi entrance exam diya hai ya dene ka plan kar raha hai?
[02:37 - 02:40] User: Ab toh kisi ka date bhi nahi hai madam. Ab toh saara...
[02:40 - 02:41] Counsellor: Hmm, CUET vagera ka nahi diya tha?
[02:42 - 02:44] User: CUET ka toh form ka bhi date khatam ho gaya.
[02:45 - 02:48] Counsellor: Hmm, woh toh hai. Toh bacche ne nahi fill kiya tha? Main yeh jaanna chah rahi hoon.
[02:48 - 02:49] User: Na.
[02:49 - 02:50] Counsellor: Achha, theek hai.
[02:51 - 02:57] User: NIT toh madam mil hi jayega. NIT home state se Civil Engineer mil raha hai. Lekin dekhiye kya hota hai.
[02:58 - 02:59] Counsellor: Sir dekhiye.
[02:59 - 03:01] User: Abhi toh OBC quota bhi lagta hai na madam.
[03:01 - 03:03] Counsellor: Hmm, achha, okay.
[03:04 - 03:05] User: OBC quota bhi hai hamara.
[03:06 - 03:35] Counsellor: Theek hai. Mainly hota kya hai na, dekhiye ab aapke jo hai, JEE Mains, aapke Advanced ke result ke basis pe aur Mains ke result ke basis pe na jo universities allot hongi, woh toh hongi hi. Theek hai? Jis hisaab se aapne bacche ki academics batai hai 12th aur 10th ki, uske accordingly profile is good. Theek hai? He is eligible to get good scholarships in universities. But kai baar hota kya hai na ki aap jo ek particular exam de rahe ho na, woh aur bhi students de rahe hain. Theek hai?
[03:35 - 03:37] User: Woh toh hai, bahut saara hai.
[03:38 - 03:45] Counsellor: Ab kisi ek particular college mein na, maan lijiye 100 mein se 20 seat hain, woh 20 seat aapke JEE Mains ke basis pe allot hongi.
[03:46 - 03:47] User: Seat hi nahi hai.
[03:47 - 03:53] Counsellor: Haan, usmein competition itna hota hai ki aapko fir apne backup ke liye jo hai...
[03:54 - 04:01] User: Isiliye toh iska inquiry madam kar rahe hain ki koi option toh rakhna hoga na, backup plan, plan B bhi bana ke rakhna hoga aapko.
[04:01 - 04:11] Counsellor: Haan, wahi wahi. Theek hai. So ab main yeh kar sakti hoon ki jaise aapne mujhe bataya ki aap Bangalore mein colleges dekh rahe ho B.Tech CS ke liye. Computer Science ke liye na?
[04:11 - 04:12] User: Ji.
[04:13 - 04:21] Counsellor: Theek hai. So main Computer Science ke liye aapko kuch achhe jo hai ranking wise colleges bata sakti hoon. Placement wise colleges jo hain woh main kuch aapko compare karke...
[04:21 - 04:27] User: Uska details madam nahi bhej sakte hain WhatsApp pe? Uspe saara hum check kar lete hain. Aapko hum WhatsApp college bhej rahe hain.
[04:27 - 04:29] Counsellor: Nahi nahi, bilkul. Main ek baar na aapko thoda...
[04:29 - 04:32] User: Fir aapka hum number save kar leta hoon, uske baad result aane ke baad fir main aapse baat karunga.
[04:32 - 05:04] Counsellor: Sure. But tab tak sir abhi dekhiye jaise kitne colleges hain, Bangalore mein hi jinki applications open hain. But ek applications kab tak open hain, inki deadlines jo hain woh bahut close hain. Theek hai? Aap jab tak wait karenge ki result aayega, uss time tak toh applications hi close ho jayenge na? Tab toh student directly eligible hoga ki woh apne JEE ke result ke basis pe apni seat jo hai woh lock kar sake. But uske liye prior mein ek benefit yeh hota hai ki haan student ne apni prior applications jo hain woh universities mein fill kar rakhi hain. Agar main jaise aapko obviously main details toh aapko share kar hi dungi jo aapne bola. Isi number pe WhatsApp use kar rahe ho na aap?
[05:04 - 05:05] User: Ji.
[05:05 - 05:17] Counsellor: Theek hai. Aap mujhe ek budget range bata sakte hain ki kis budget mein aap colleges dekh rahe hain student ke liye?
[05:17 - 05:20] User: Budget ka issue nahi hai madam, bas college badhiya hona chahiye. Usko...
[05:21 - 05:25] Counsellor: Fir bhi ek approx idea jaise 10 to 15 lakh, 20 lakh, 25 lakh aise karke?
[05:27 - 05:31] User: Arre jitna achha, jaisa college rahega, fee uska waisa hi rahega madam.
[05:31 - 05:32] Counsellor: Hmm, woh toh hai hi, woh toh hai.
[05:32 - 05:39] User: Bas fees ka baat hum nahi kar sakte hain. College dekhenge, college jis according fees hoga, woh toh aapko dena hi hoga.
[05:39 - 05:42] Counsellor: Woh toh hai, bilkul. Bas paise ka issue nahi hai.
[05:42 - 06:15] Counsellor: Haan. Ab mostly jo hai kitne colleges aise hain jinhone apni jo hai applications close kar di hain. Theek hai? Ab agar main aapko waise bataun toh jaise ek Jain Deemed-to-be University hai, jo aapki jo hai Kanakpura Road pe hai. Theek hai? Iski tuition fee jo hai woh approx 14 lakh rupees hai. Aur placement rating jo hai iski woh 4.1 hai out of 5. Inki applications abhi open hain. Ismein JEE jo hai woh exam accepted hai, toh student ke liye benefit yeh hai ki woh apne JEE Mains ka jo result hai woh ismein plug in kar sakte hain.
[06:16 - 06:27] Counsellor: Theek hai? Aur iske alawa jaise GITAM School of Computer Science hai Bangalore mein. Yeh aap check out kar sakte ho. Aapne waise in universities ka naam suna hai jo main bata rahi hoon abhi aapko?
[06:28 - 06:30] User: Nahi, usko toh dekh lenge madam.
[06:30 - 06:44] Counsellor: Yeh jo GITAM School of Computer Science hai, inka apna khud ka entrance exam hota hai. Theek hai? Iski jo fee hai woh aapki around 14 to 15 lakh rupees hai. Placement rating jo hai inki woh 4.1 hai out of 5.
[06:45 - 07:02] Counsellor: Iske alawa jo hai main aapko kuch aur colleges hain jaise T. John Institute of Technology hai. Iski, ismein bhi JEE Mains jo hai woh accepted hai. 13 lakh rupees inki fee hai. Aur placement rating jo hai woh aapki 3.2 hai out of 5.
[07:02 - 07:20] Counsellor: So main inki kuch details, common details main aapko share kar deti hoon aapke jo hai WhatsApp pe. Aap ek baar inhein go through kar lijiye. Theek hai? Aur aap fir mujhe bataiyega ki kaunsi universities hain jo aapko lag raha hai ki sahi hai, course ke accordingly aur baaki cheezon ke accordingly.
[07:20 - 07:31] Counsellor: Toh uske accordingly fir main aapko ya toh applications ke liye guide kar dungi. Either jaise kai baar kya hota hai na universities mein apne khud ke entrance exam hote hain, personal interviews hote hain, test hote hain student ke.
[07:32 - 07:32] User: Ji.
[07:33 - 07:43] Counsellor: Toh main woh jo hai, woh main aapko fir share, mere paas agar koi preparation material hoga, kuch hoga, toh woh main student ke saath share kar sakti hoon taaki student ko jo hai thoda sa help ho jaye.
[07:44 - 07:45] User: Ji madam.
[07:45 - 07:59] Counsellor: Theek hai? Main Bangalore ke kuch colleges aapko share kar deti hoon. Aap ek baar use go through kar lijiye. Karke aur accordingly aap mujhe bataiyega kaunsa college aapko sahi lag raha hai. Then accordingly fir main aapko aage ke process ke liye guide kar dungi. Theek hai?
[07:59 - 08:00] User: Theek hai madam.
[08:00 - 08:14] Counsellor: Agar aapko lag raha hai ki mujhe student ke saath connect karne ki zaroorat hai, toh same number pe jab main abhi na aapko ping kar rahi hoon, aap mujhe revert kar dena, tabhi main aapko details bhej paungi. Toh aap jab student available hoga, uss time pe aap mujhe same number pe hi connect kar sakte hain. Theek hai?
[08:14 - 08:15] User: Theek hai madam.
[08:16 - 08:17] Counsellor: Theek hai. Okay, thank you.
[08:17 - 08:19] User: Okay madam, welcome.

turns.speaker: User

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap prepare kar rahe ho it's a very good thing. Lekin aap side by side na ek achha option bana ke bhi chalo.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aap NMAT ke liye jaise apply kar rahe ho na Chandigarh ke liye, Narsee Monjee, it's a very good campus if you want to go, aap bilkul karo apply.

[01:19 - 01:20] User: Can you repeat?
[01:21 - 01:21] Counsellor: Haan ji?
[01:22 - 01:22] User: Can you repeat?
[01:23 - 01:26] Counsellor: I am asking about plus one results. Aapke plus one ke kya result the?
[01:27 - 01:27] User: Plus one?
[01:28 - 01:28] Counsellor: Hmm.
[01:31 - 01:33] User: I guess you are talking about 11th class hai na?
[01:33 - 01:35] Counsellor: Haan ji, I am talking about 11th class.
[01:36 - 01:41] User: Sir actually maine last year hi 12th complete kar li thi to mere dono ke hi result hai.
[01:41 - 01:45] Counsellor: Achha achha awaited nahi hai aapka. Theek hai to 12th class ka kya result hai aapka?
[01:46 - 01:47] User: It's 74.8.
[01:48 - 01:49] Counsellor: Aur 10th mein kitna percentage aaya tha?
[01:50 - 01:51] User: 86.8.
[01:51 - 01:52] Counsellor: To ek saal ka gap kyu?
[01:53 - 01:59] User: Actually I have participated in another university but I kind of recalled from it recently.
[01:59 - 02:02] Counsellor: Achha. Kaunsi university mein kiya tha participate?
[02:02 - 02:03] User: CU.
[02:04 - 02:07] Counsellor: To drop karne ka matlab kya concern tha wahan pe?
[02:08 - 02:10] User: It's kind of a partial drop.
[02:11 - 02:11] Counsellor: Haan ji?
[02:12 - 02:13] User: Partial drop.
[02:13 - 02:17] Counsellor: Partial drop? Matlab campus pasand nahi aaya ya koi aur issue ho gaya?
[02:18 - 02:23] User: Campus pasand nahi aaya actually mere ko waha ka. Matlab locality mere zyada kafi prefer nahi hui mere se wahan pe.
[02:24 - 02:26] Counsellor: To isliye aapne basically NMAT ke liye dekha hai, right?
[02:27 - 02:28] User: Yeah.
[02:28 - 02:33] Counsellor: Theek hai. To current basis ke liye NMAT ke liye aapne abhi apply jo hai wo abhi nahi kiya.
[02:33 - 02:37] Counsellor: So are you prepared mentally matlab like for your applications ke liye?
[02:38 - 02:40] User: Sorry?
[02:40 - 02:45] Counsellor: Matlab aapne entrance test ke regarding jo hai aapne prepare karna shuru kar diya apna NMAT ke liye?
[02:46 - 02:51] User: Main currently uske liye prepare kar raha hun. NMIMS CET inka entrance exam hota hai na jo.
[02:51 - 02:55] Counsellor: Haan ji. Dekho CUET is something jo ek competitive examination hai, right?
[02:56 - 02:57] User: Yeah yeah.
[02:57 - 03:02] Counsellor: To aap prepare kar rahe ho it's a very good thing. Lekin aap side by side na ek achha option bana ke bhi chalo.
[03:03 - 03:09] Counsellor: Aap NMAT ke liye jaise apply kar rahe ho na Chandigarh ke liye, Narsee Monjee, it's a very good campus if you want to go, aap bilkul karo apply.
[03:10 - 03:12] User: Yeah yeah my friend suggested it to me.
[03:12 - 03:14] Counsellor: Haan ji. Haan ji haan ji.
[03:14 - 03:20] Counsellor: So currently aap Chandigarh mein private universities ko to chase nahi kar rahe honge jaise ki CGC ho gaya, CGC Landran ho gaya.
[03:20 - 03:21] Counsellor: Right?
[03:21 - 03:22] User: No no.
[03:22 - 03:26] Counsellor: Theek hai. Aur Chandigarh se bahar aapko jaana nahi chahiye. Jaana chahte nahi ho aap.
[03:26 - 03:30] Counsellor: To theek hai. Aap accordingly agar apply karna chahte ho so you can apply for NMAT.
[03:31 - 03:33] Counsellor: Aur mujhe batana beta aapka koi bhi criteria ho.
[03:33 - 03:43] Counsellor: Jab aap apply kar doge to definitely aap Shiksha mein humein kuch bata dijiyega kyunki hamare yahan pe jo students rehte hain hum unki listing karwate hain to selection preferences aapko definitely kuch na kuch milta hai.
[03:43 - 03:45] Counsellor: Main commit nahi kar raha but still.
[03:45 - 03:46] Counsellor: Right?
[03:46 - 03:46] User: Okay okay.
[03:46 - 03:48] Counsellor: Aap kab tak apply kar loge?
[03:49 - 03:51] User: By the end of this month I think.
[03:52 - 03:58] Counsellor: Aap 29th. Till I guess 27th I will completely.
[03:59 - 04:00] Counsellor: 27th.
[04:00 - 04:03] Counsellor: Theek hai. Koi problem nahi hai. Aap accordingly apply kar lo.
[04:03 - 04:11] Counsellor: And matlab apply karke hi rakh lena beta month end se pehle kyunki application close hone wale hain mere khayal se 30th tak.
[04:11 - 04:12] User: Yeah I know I know.
[04:12 - 04:17] Counsellor: To aap apna aaj ya kal mein agar apply kar sakte ho to aap kar lo otherwise I can guide you how to apply the application form.
[04:18 - 04:21] User: Yeah I will surely complete the application form.
[04:22 - 04:23] Counsellor: Theek hai. No issue Vasu.
[04:23 - 04:27] Counsellor: Baaki details aapko WhatsApp kar de raha hun main Narsee Monjee ke application link and all.
[04:27 - 04:28] User: Okay. Thank you.
[04:28 - 04:30] Counsellor: Thank you. Most welcome.

turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Good morning Gurbeer.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually main na Abhay baat kar raha hu Shiksha.com ki taraf se Gurbeer.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji sir. I feel aap colleges ko leke search kar rahe ho admissions lene ke liye.

turns.text: Haan ji sir, pehle mera kal entrance exam hai uske baad dekho kya banta hai.

turns.text: Sir abhi to maine socha hi nahi kuch, pehle maine socha pehle ye de du fir dekhte hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually aapka ye B.A. B.A. LL.B. ke liye na ye aapka counselling call hai, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To beta sabse pehle aap please mujhe apne academics bataiye. Like current basis ke liye aapne 11th mein kitna score kiya hua hai?

turns.text: 11th mein?

turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.text: 11th mein sir mujhe yaad to nahi par maine plus two mein 92 liye the.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha 92, aapka plus two ka result aa chuka hai kya?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan sir, sir mujhe matlab gap year hai na mera, main saal ho gaya mujhe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha 2025 mein aapka plus two complete hua tha.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji gap year hai mera.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai, nice.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Abhi current basis ke liye aap rehne wale kahan se ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Ludhiana.

turns.text: Ludhiana se ho aap.

turns.text: Theek hai. Ludhiana mein kahan se ho aap?

turns.text: Ludhiana mein Shimlapuri, Lohara side.

turns.text: Mohara ke side mein ho, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So current basis ke liye bacche colleges aapko sirf Punjab University dekh rahe ho ya private universities bhi dekh sakte ho?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir dono hi dekh rahi hu, jahan ghar wale bolenge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki honestly agar dekha jaye na to Punjab University na aap kar rahe ho, it's well and good hai, apna aaj preparation acche se karo aur do.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Lekin aapko bhi pata hai ki Punjab University mein aap akele apply nahi kar rahe, aapke sath laakhon bacche baith ke test denge.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji bilkul bilkul.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki uska na test thoda easy nahi hai, us college ki entry easy nahi hai, wo bahut famous campus hai to aapke neighbor state Haryana ho gaya, Himachal ho gaya, wahan ke bacche bhi wahan pe apply karte hai aur B.A. LL.B. ke liye 100-150 se zyada seat nahi hai unke paas.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Apply karne wale bacche laakhon mein hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To in case agar aapka Punjab University mein nahi hota hai, aapke paas backup plan koi ready hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Nahi sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jaise ki, jaise ki Chandigarh University ho gaya aapka, Lovely Professional University ho gaya, aise kuch criteria?

turns.text: Nahi sir, maine socha hi nahi pehle.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho honestly basis pe na apna backup plan bhi create karke rakho aur backup plan create karne ka matlab mera yahan pe aisa hai ki aap Lovely Professional University ya C.U. inpe apply karna shuru karke rakho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki na colleges ki seats har jagah limited hoti hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sir lekin without entrance to wo bhi nahi hoga na?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Nahi nahi hota, unka entrance hota hai lekin unka khud ka entrance hai jo itna mushkil nahi hoga jitna Punjab University ka mushkil hota hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aap jaise Chandigarh University ke andar apply karte ho to wahan pe aapko dena hota hai CUCET ka entrance test.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Hai na? Aur usme bhi up to 100% tak ki scholarship milti hai aapko.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar aap LPU mein apply karte ho to aapko entrance test dena hota hai LPU NEST ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai? Usme bhi up to 100% tak ki scholarship hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CGC Mohali bhi dekh sakte ho aap Gurbeer.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Budget ke regarding depend karti hai kuch cheezein na, main aapko agar colleges bataunga to on the basis of goodness aur unka budget criteria kya hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sabse pehle aap mujhe budget bataiye, aapka budget kitna invest karne ko ready ho aap B.A. LL.B. ke liye?

turns.text: Sir, sir main aapko to be honest batau, main na actually main nani house rehti hu, main ghar pe nahi rehti apne, so mere mamme ki jo salary hai na wo 18 hai total.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha ji. To matlab mere khayal se budget ka issue rahega.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji bilkul, par lekin wo kar denge, mujhe pata hai wo kar denge.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan koi baat nahi, agar aap kar sakte ho to main aapko fees bata deta hu, accordingly bataiye ki kiske liye aap zyada interested ho.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye teeno hi campuses acche hai. In teeno mein agar aapko like budget aapka kam hai, pehle main aapko dekh ke batata hu ki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Lovely Professional University.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Best best kaun sa rahega?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Main aapko batata hu, ek minute line pe rahiyega please.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sabse pehle na hum budget dekh lete hai LPU ka.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Inka agar B.A. LL.B. hai to inka 14.5 lakh rupees tak ka jaata hai poore paanch saal ka course.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Lovely Professional University ki baat kar raha hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur agar hum C.U. B.A. LL.B. ki fees dekhe to ye slightly kam rehti hai, inki 11 lakh 25,000 tak jaati hai approximately.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aapke liye ye do fees ka structure comfortable hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Hai to sir par mere liye best kaun sa hoga? Kyunki aapko pata hi hai na sab confuse hote hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aap matlab, agar jaise, nahi nahi main aapko batata hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho best na kuch aisa nahi hota ki aapne na apply, ek college mein aap gaye aur aapne apply kar diya aur wahi pe admission bhi le liya.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Criteria different rehta hai, understand this thing ki agar aap apply karoge na university ke andar to wahan pe aapko na ek single university ka kabhi bhi chance nahi lena, aapko lena hai at least teen, matlab cut to cut teen colleges ke liye to aapko dekhna hi dekhna hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aap teen jagah apply karte ho, aapne jaise LPU mein apply kiya aur C.U. mein apply kiya aur ek extra college jaise CGC Mohali rakh lete hai, wo bhi bahut accha campus hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan ji haan ji.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: In teen campuses mein aapne apply kiya, aapne teeno ki application form fees pay ki, 1-1000 rupees teeno ki each hai.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai sir. Jab aap yahan pe apply kar dete ho to fir jab aap entrance test nikalte ho, ab LPU mein for example aapko 50% scholarship mil gayi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur C.U. mein aapko mili 40% aur CGC Mohali mein aapko 90% scholarship mil gayi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To definitely aap CGC Mohali mein jaoge na?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To aap na teen jagah apply karo, teeno hi acche campuses hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Mere ko concern ye hai ki teeno hi acche campuses hai, teeno mein hi profitable hai kaam aapka B.A. LL.B. jahan pe zyada aapka scholarship aa jaye wo aapke aur aapke mama ji ke liye bilkul perfect rahega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Jo mujhe lagta hai.

turns.text: Sir ek baat puchni thi, meri sister hai matlab unka na matlab mere sath hi padi hai lekin unka gap year hai, paanch saal ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Achha.

turns.text: Achha theek hai.

turns.text: Theek hai, ab 26 chal raha hai, four year ka gap year hai uska. Agar wo matlab aise karna chahe to wo kar sakti hai na?

turns.text: To mujhe pehle ye janna padega ki wo unka gap kyu aaya itna lamba?

turns.text: Gap sir uske matlab ghar pe financial problem thi, uski mummy theek nahi rehti.

turns.text: Isliye wo matlab hai problem, usne matlab li thi graduation ke liye ki thi matlab wo usme kharab ho gaya tha sab kuch.

turns.text: Nahi nahi apply kar sakte ho, don't worry.

turns.text: Kyunki usne pucha tha na, mujhe pata nahi tha, main kaha chal main puch ke aaungi fir main tujhe bata dungi.

turns.text: Nahi nahi aap apply kar sakte ho, usme koi issue scenario nahi hai, aisa nahi hai ki aap nahi kar sakte ho, bilkul kar sakte ho aap apply.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai sir. Sir aap ek, aap se ek, kya baat, kya bolna hai, please aap mujhe wo bhej do, WhatsApp pe send kar do agar aapko issue na ho to.

turns.text: Haan sir, haan ji haan ji sir.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: To main aapko fir voucher bhi dilwa deta hu aur cashback facility bhi aapko Shiksha ki taraf se dilwa deta hu.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Agar aap teen jagah apply kar rahe ho jaise ki to Chandigarh University mein 200 rupees cashback hai, LPU mein bhi 200 rupees cashback hai aur CGC Mohali ka to main apne end se aapko voucher dilwa dunga.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: But na humein agar like basically na hum ek verified counselling karte hai, hai na, kuch bhi hum unauthorized basis pe nahi karte.

turns.text: Hum aapka voucher aur cashback tabhi dilwa sakte hai jab aap karna shuru kar rahe ho, right? Aur uske baad aap jab call pe reh ke jaise hum aapko guide kar rahe hai apply karane ke liye to tabhi main aapko voucher aur cashback facility dilwa sakta hu.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay sir.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Kyunki students kabhi kabhi na kisi aur ko share kar dete hai, khud se nahi karte to wo hamara ek naya rule hamari company ne organize kiya hai ki aap on call reh ke apply kar sakte ho abhi to main aapko apply karwa deta hu voucher aur cashback.

turns.text: Sir iski last date waise kab hai?

turns.text: 29 se pehle pehle apply.

turns.text: Dekho 29, main soch rahi hu main kal exam de du fir main aage kar lungi agar 27 ya 28 ko koi issue na ho to.

turns.text: Exam dene ke baad result aane mein to time hi hai.

turns.text: Haan ji 13, 13 ya 15 ko hai shayad.

turns.text: To baat to same hi baithi.

turns.text: To fir jab tak result nahi aayega tab tak pata nahi chalega na aapko ki aapka kya criteria rahega.

turns.text: Aur achha bhi jaata hai tab bhi baccho ko option to tab bhi, aisa nahi rakh sakte na ki sir main de kar aa jati hu to mujhe pata lag jayega ki mere kitne percentage hai.

turns.text: Kyunki uska list cut off pe nikalta hai, right?

turns.text: Haan ji haan ji bilkul.

turns.text: To agar aapka nahi nikla to fir wo bhi issue hai.

turns.text: Matlab kab tak soch rahe ho aap apply karne ke liye?

turns.text: Sir main soch rahi thi main after exam matlab jo kal ka exam hai na main uske baad sochungii kyunki mera abhi burden hai mere sir pe, maine padhna hai isliye.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, koi baat nahi.

turns.text: Waise application form agar ye isliye nahi kar rahe ki aapke paas time nahi hai to main bata deta hu ki teeno ka form ko fill karane mein 10 minutes se zyada ka samay nahi lagega, I can help you out.

turns.text: But fir bhi aapka ye hai ki nahi sir mujhe pehle exam dena hai to koi issue nahi hai, aap de do, kal mere khayal se 26 hai.

turns.text: Haan ji haan ji.

turns.text: Haan ji.

turns.text: Uske baad kal ya parso mein apply, matlab kal tak kar hi do kyunki kya hai na last ke dino mein na jo websites hoti hai usme bahut bacche apply karte hai to website crash ho jaati hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai sir, theek hai.

turns.text: Theek hai ji?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai sir.

turns.text: And main aapko details WhatsApp kar deta hu, C.U., LPU aur CGC Mohali ke liye.

turns.text: Thank you so much.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay ji, take care.

full_text:
[00:00 - 00:01] User: Hello.
[00:01 - 00:02] Counsellor: Hello.
[00:02 - 00:03] User: Haan ji.
[00:03 - 00:06] Counsellor: A very good morning, Gurbeer Kaur se baat ho rahi hai meri?
[00:06 - 00:07] User: Haan ji haan ji, good morning sir.
[00:07 - 00:08] Counsellor: Good morning Gurbeer.
[00:08 - 00:09] User: Haan ji sir.
[00:09 - 00:12] Counsellor: Actually main na Abhay baat kar raha hu Shiksha.com ki taraf se Gurbeer.
[00:12 - 00:15] User: Haan ji haan ji sir. I feel aap colleges ko leke search kar rahe ho admissions lene ke liye.
[00:15 - 00:20] User: Haan ji sir, pehle mera kal entrance exam hai uske baad dekho kya banta hai.
[00:20 - 00:21] Counsellor: Kis cheez ka entrance exam hai aapka?
[00:21 - 00:23] User: B.A. LL.B. ka.
[00:23 - 00:25] Counsellor: Kahan par de rahe ho aap entrance exam?
[00:25 - 00:27] User: University, Punjab University mein.
[00:27 - 00:31] Counsellor: P.U. ka de rahe ho aap. To abhi aapne kahan kahan apply kar liya universities ke andar?
[00:33 - 00:38] User: Sir abhi to maine socha hi nahi kuch, pehle maine socha pehle ye de du fir dekhte hai.
[00:38 - 00:42] Counsellor: Actually aapka ye B.A. B.A. LL.B. ke liye na ye aapka counselling call hai, theek hai?
[00:42 - 00:45] User: Okay sir.
[00:45 - 00:49] Counsellor: To beta sabse pehle aap please mujhe apne academics bataiye. Like current basis ke liye aapne 11th mein kitna score kiya hua hai?
[00:49 - 00:51] User: 11th mein?
[00:51 - 00:51] Counsellor: Haan ji.
[00:52 - 00:55] User: 11th mein sir mujhe yaad to nahi par maine plus two mein 92 liye the.
[00:55 - 00:58] Counsellor: Achha 92, aapka plus two ka result aa chuka hai kya?
[00:58 - 01:03] User: Haan sir, sir mujhe matlab gap year hai na mera, main saal ho gaya mujhe.
[01:03 - 01:06] Counsellor: Achha 2025 mein aapka plus two complete hua tha.
[01:06 - 01:06] User: Haan ji haan ji gap year hai mera.
[01:06 - 01:08] Counsellor: Theek hai, theek hai, nice.
[01:08 - 01:10] Counsellor: Abhi current basis ke liye aap rehne wale kahan se ho?
[01:10 - 01:12] User: Ludhiana.
[01:12 - 01:13] Counsellor: Ludhiana se ho aap.
[01:13 - 01:15] User: Theek hai. Ludhiana mein kahan se ho aap?
[01:15 - 01:18] Counsellor: Ludhiana mein Shimlapuri, Lohara side.
[01:18 - 01:20] User: Mohara ke side mein ho, theek hai.
[01:20 - 01:25] Counsellor: So current basis ke liye bacche colleges aapko sirf Punjab University dekh rahe ho ya private universities bhi dekh sakte ho?
[01:26 - 01:29] User: Sir dono hi dekh rahi hu, jahan ghar wale bolenge.
[01:29 - 01:36] Counsellor: Kyunki honestly agar dekha jaye na to Punjab University na aap kar rahe ho, it's well and good hai, apna aaj preparation acche se karo aur do.
[01:36 - 01:41] Counsellor: Lekin aapko bhi pata hai ki Punjab University mein aap akele apply nahi kar rahe, aapke sath laakhon bacche baith ke test denge.
[01:41 - 01:41] User: Haan ji bilkul bilkul.
[01:41 - 01:53] Counsellor: Kyunki uska na test thoda easy nahi hai, us college ki entry easy nahi hai, wo bahut famous campus hai to aapke neighbor state Haryana ho gaya, Himachal ho gaya, wahan ke bacche bhi wahan pe apply karte hai aur B.A. LL.B. ke liye 100-150 se zyada seat nahi hai unke paas.
[01:54 - 01:54] User: Okay sir.
[01:54 - 01:56] Counsellor: Apply karne wale bacche laakhon mein hai.
[01:57 - 02:02] Counsellor: To in case agar aapka Punjab University mein nahi hota hai, aapke paas backup plan koi ready hai?
[02:02 - 02:03] User: Nahi sir.
[02:03 - 02:10] Counsellor: Jaise ki, jaise ki Chandigarh University ho gaya aapka, Lovely Professional University ho gaya, aise kuch criteria?
[02:10 - 02:13] User: Nahi sir, maine socha hi nahi pehle.
[02:14 - 02:14] Counsellor: Okay.
[02:15 - 02:26] Counsellor: Dekho honestly basis pe na apna backup plan bhi create karke rakho aur backup plan create karne ka matlab mera yahan pe aisa hai ki aap Lovely Professional University ya C.U. inpe apply karna shuru karke rakho.
[02:27 - 02:29] Counsellor: Kyunki na colleges ki seats har jagah limited hoti hai.
[02:29 - 02:32] User: Sir lekin without entrance to wo bhi nahi hoga na?
[02:32 - 02:37] Counsellor: Nahi nahi hota, unka entrance hota hai lekin unka khud ka entrance hai jo itna mushkil nahi hoga jitna Punjab University ka mushkil hota hai.
[02:38 - 02:39] User: Achha theek hai.
[02:39 - 02:45] Counsellor: Agar aap jaise Chandigarh University ke andar apply karte ho to wahan pe aapko dena hota hai CUCET ka entrance test.
[02:45 - 02:46] User: Haan ji.
[02:46 - 02:50] Counsellor: Hai na? Aur usme bhi up to 100% tak ki scholarship milti hai aapko.
[02:50 - 02:50] User: Haan ji.
[02:50 - 02:55] Counsellor: Aur agar aap LPU mein apply karte ho to aapko entrance test dena hota hai LPU NEST ka.
[02:55 - 02:56] User: Theek hai sir.
[02:56 - 02:59] Counsellor: Theek hai? Usme bhi up to 100% tak ki scholarship hai.
[02:59 - 03:01] Counsellor: CGC Mohali bhi dekh sakte ho aap Gurbeer.
[03:02 - 03:08] Counsellor: Budget ke regarding depend karti hai kuch cheezein na, main aapko agar colleges bataunga to on the basis of goodness aur unka budget criteria kya hai.
[03:08 - 03:12] Counsellor: Sabse pehle aap mujhe budget bataiye, aapka budget kitna invest karne ko ready ho aap B.A. LL.B. ke liye?
[03:13 - 03:23] User: Sir, sir main aapko to be honest batau, main na actually main nani house rehti hu, main ghar pe nahi rehti apne, so mere mamme ki jo salary hai na wo 18 hai total.
[03:24 - 03:25] Counsellor: 18,000?
[03:25 - 03:26] User: Haan ji.
[03:26 - 03:29] Counsellor: Achha ji. To matlab mere khayal se budget ka issue rahega.
[03:29 - 03:33] User: Haan ji haan ji bilkul, par lekin wo kar denge, mujhe pata hai wo kar denge.
[03:33 - 03:39] Counsellor: Haan koi baat nahi, agar aap kar sakte ho to main aapko fees bata deta hu, accordingly bataiye ki kiske liye aap zyada interested ho.
[03:39 - 03:43] Counsellor: Ye teeno hi campuses acche hai. In teeno mein agar aapko like budget aapka kam hai, pehle main aapko dekh ke batata hu ki.
[03:47 - 03:50] Counsellor: Lovely Professional University.
[03:50 - 03:50] User: Best best kaun sa rahega?
[03:50 - 03:51] Counsellor: Main aapko batata hu, ek minute line pe rahiyega please.
[03:52 - 03:54] Counsellor: Sabse pehle na hum budget dekh lete hai LPU ka.
[03:54 - 03:55] User: Haan ji.
[03:59 - 04:04] Counsellor: Inka agar B.A. LL.B. hai to inka 14.5 lakh rupees tak ka jaata hai poore paanch saal ka course.
[04:04 - 04:06] Counsellor: Lovely Professional University ki baat kar raha hu.
[04:06 - 04:07] User: Okay sir.
[04:07 - 04:08] Counsellor: Theek hai?
[04:08 - 04:14] Counsellor: Aur agar hum C.U. B.A. LL.B. ki fees dekhe to ye slightly kam rehti hai, inki 11 lakh 25,000 tak jaati hai approximately.
[04:14 - 04:16] User: Okay sir.
[04:16 - 04:19] Counsellor: To aapke liye ye do fees ka structure comfortable hai?
[04:20 - 04:25] User: Hai to sir par mere liye best kaun sa hoga? Kyunki aapko pata hi hai na sab confuse hote hai.
[04:25 - 04:28] Counsellor: Agar aap matlab, agar jaise, nahi nahi main aapko batata hu.
[04:28 - 04:34] Counsellor: Dekho best na kuch aisa nahi hota ki aapne na apply, ek college mein aap gaye aur aapne apply kar diya aur wahi pe admission bhi le liya.
[04:34 - 04:35] User: Haan ji haan ji.
[04:35 - 04:50] Counsellor: Criteria different rehta hai, understand this thing ki agar aap apply karoge na university ke andar to wahan pe aapko na ek single university ka kabhi bhi chance nahi lena, aapko lena hai at least teen, matlab cut to cut teen colleges ke liye to aapko dekhna hi dekhna hai.
[04:51 - 04:52] User: Theek hai sir.
[04:52 - 05:00] Counsellor: Agar aap teen jagah apply karte ho, aapne jaise LPU mein apply kiya aur C.U. mein apply kiya aur ek extra college jaise CGC Mohali rakh lete hai, wo bhi bahut accha campus hai.
[05:00 - 05:02] User: Haan ji haan ji.
[05:02 - 05:06] Counsellor: In teen campuses mein aapne apply kiya, aapne teeno ki application form fees pay ki, 1-1000 rupees teeno ki each hai.
[05:06 - 05:07] User: Theek hai.
[05:07 - 05:13] Counsellor: Theek hai sir. Jab aap yahan pe apply kar dete ho to fir jab aap entrance test nikalte ho, ab LPU mein for example aapko 50% scholarship mil gayi.
[05:14 - 05:19] Counsellor: Aur C.U. mein aapko mili 40% aur CGC Mohali mein aapko 90% scholarship mil gayi.
[05:19 - 05:21] Counsellor: To definitely aap CGC Mohali mein jaoge na?
[05:22 - 05:23] User: Theek hai sir.
[05:23 - 05:26] Counsellor: To aap na teen jagah apply karo, teeno hi acche campuses hai.
[05:26 - 05:36] Counsellor: Mere ko concern ye hai ki teeno hi acche campuses hai, teeno mein hi profitable hai kaam aapka B.A. LL.B. jahan pe zyada aapka scholarship aa jaye wo aapke aur aapke mama ji ke liye bilkul perfect rahega.
[05:36 - 05:37] Counsellor: Jo mujhe lagta hai.
[05:38 - 05:45] User: Sir ek baat puchni thi, meri sister hai matlab unka na matlab mere sath hi padi hai lekin unka gap year hai, paanch saal ka.
[05:45 - 05:45] Counsellor: Achha.
[05:45 - 05:48] User: Five years ka sorry. Haan ji matlab usne plus two kiya hai 2022 mein kiya hai.
[05:48 - 05:49] Counsellor: Achha theek hai.
[05:49 - 05:55] User: Theek hai, ab 26 chal raha hai, four year ka gap year hai uska. Agar wo matlab aise karna chahe to wo kar sakti hai na?
[05:55 - 05:58] Counsellor: To mujhe pehle ye janna padega ki wo unka gap kyu aaya itna lamba?
[05:58 - 06:03] User: Gap sir uske matlab ghar pe financial problem thi, uski mummy theek nahi rehti.
[06:03 - 06:04] Counsellor: Haan kar sakti hai.
[06:04 - 06:12] User: Isliye wo matlab hai problem, usne matlab li thi graduation ke liye ki thi matlab wo usme kharab ho gaya tha sab kuch.
[06:12 - 06:14] Counsellor: Nahi nahi apply kar sakte ho, don't worry.
[06:15 - 06:19] User: Kyunki usne pucha tha na, mujhe pata nahi tha, main kaha chal main puch ke aaungi fir main tujhe bata dungi.
[06:19 - 06:24] Counsellor: Nahi nahi aap apply kar sakte ho, usme koi issue scenario nahi hai, aisa nahi hai ki aap nahi kar sakte ho, bilkul kar sakte ho aap apply.
[06:24 - 06:33] User: Theek hai sir. Sir aap ek, aap se ek, kya baat, kya bolna hai, please aap mujhe wo bhej do, WhatsApp pe send kar do agar aapko issue na ho to.
[06:33 - 06:35] Counsellor: Haan haan main aapko application links WhatsApp kar deta hu.
[06:35 - 06:39] User: Haan ji haan ji WhatsApp pe kar do. Matlab aap kab tak discuss karke apply kar doge isme?
[06:39 - 06:42] Counsellor: Sir main abhi kar dungi waise to.
[06:42 - 06:47] User: Abhi agar aap karna chahte ho to main aapko bata deta hu. Matlab teeno ke liye aap ready ho apply karne ke liye, ye kehna chah rahe ho?
[06:47 - 06:49] Counsellor: Haan sir, haan ji haan ji sir.
[06:49 - 06:53] User: To main aapko fir voucher bhi dilwa deta hu aur cashback facility bhi aapko Shiksha ki taraf se dilwa deta hu.
[06:53 - 07:03] User: Agar aap teen jagah apply kar rahe ho jaise ki to Chandigarh University mein 200 rupees cashback hai, LPU mein bhi 200 rupees cashback hai aur CGC Mohali ka to main apne end se aapko voucher dilwa dunga.
[07:03 - 07:10] User: But na humein agar like basically na hum ek verified counselling karte hai, hai na, kuch bhi hum unauthorized basis pe nahi karte.
[07:11 - 07:23] User: Hum aapka voucher aur cashback tabhi dilwa sakte hai jab aap karna shuru kar rahe ho, right? Aur uske baad aap jab call pe reh ke jaise hum aapko guide kar rahe hai apply karane ke liye to tabhi main aapko voucher aur cashback facility dilwa sakta hu.
[07:23 - 07:24] Counsellor: Okay sir.
[07:24 - 07:36] User: Kyunki students kabhi kabhi na kisi aur ko share kar dete hai, khud se nahi karte to wo hamara ek naya rule hamari company ne organize kiya hai ki aap on call reh ke apply kar sakte ho abhi to main aapko apply karwa deta hu voucher aur cashback.
[07:36 - 07:38] Counsellor: Sir iski last date waise kab hai?
[07:38 - 07:41] User: 29 se pehle pehle apply.
[07:41 - 07:45] Counsellor: Dekho 29, main soch rahi hu main kal exam de du fir main aage kar lungi agar 27 ya 28 ko koi issue na ho to.
[07:45 - 07:47] User: Exam dene ke baad result aane mein to time hi hai.
[07:48 - 07:50] Counsellor: Haan ji 13, 13 ya 15 ko hai shayad.
[07:50 - 07:52] User: To baat to same hi baithi.
[07:54 - 08:00] User: To fir jab tak result nahi aayega tab tak pata nahi chalega na aapko ki aapka kya criteria rahega.
[08:01 - 08:08] User: Aur achha bhi jaata hai tab bhi baccho ko option to tab bhi, aisa nahi rakh sakte na ki sir main de kar aa jati hu to mujhe pata lag jayega ki mere kitne percentage hai.
[08:08 - 08:10] User: Kyunki uska list cut off pe nikalta hai, right?
[08:10 - 08:11] Counsellor: Haan ji haan ji bilkul.
[08:11 - 08:13] User: To agar aapka nahi nikla to fir wo bhi issue hai.
[08:14 - 08:17] User: Waise aap apply kab tak matlab soch rahe ho, plan kya hai aapka?
[08:18 - 08:19] Counsellor: Samjhi nahi sir main.
[08:19 - 08:22] User: Matlab kab tak soch rahe ho aap apply karne ke liye?
[08:22 - 08:29] Counsellor: Sir main soch rahi thi main after exam matlab jo kal ka exam hai na main uske baad sochungii kyunki mera abhi burden hai mere sir pe, maine padhna hai isliye.
[08:29 - 08:31] User: Theek hai, koi baat nahi.
[08:31 - 08:40] User: Waise application form agar ye isliye nahi kar rahe ki aapke paas time nahi hai to main bata deta hu ki teeno ka form ko fill karane mein 10 minutes se zyada ka samay nahi lagega, I can help you out.
[08:40 - 08:46] User: But fir bhi aapka ye hai ki nahi sir mujhe pehle exam dena hai to koi issue nahi hai, aap de do, kal mere khayal se 26 hai.
[08:46 - 08:47] Counsellor: Haan ji haan ji.
[08:47 - 08:49] User: Hai na? 26 April hai.
[08:49 - 08:50] Counsellor: Haan ji.
[08:50 - 08:56] User: To aap aisa karo ki kal exam do, mujhe call back karo, pehle to batao ki kaisa gaya aapka exam, confidence kaisa hai aapka.
[08:56 - 09:05] User: Uske baad kal ya parso mein apply, matlab kal tak kar hi do kyunki kya hai na last ke dino mein na jo websites hoti hai usme bahut bacche apply karte hai to website crash ho jaati hai.
[09:06 - 09:10] User: Bahut baccho ke payment atak jaate hai to apna smoothly apply karke rakhoge to better rahega.
[09:12 - 09:13] Counsellor: Theek hai sir, theek hai.
[09:13 - 09:14] User: Theek hai ji?
[09:14 - 09:15] Counsellor: Theek hai sir.
[09:15 - 09:18] User: And main aapko details WhatsApp kar deta hu, C.U., LPU aur CGC Mohali ke liye.
[09:18 - 09:19] Counsellor: Okay sir.
[09:19 - 09:20] User: Okay. Chalo theek hai.
[09:20 - 09:23] User: Teeno ko beta check zaroor karna, khud se bhi research karna.
[09:23 - 09:23] Counsellor: Theek hai.
[09:23 - 09:24] User: Wish you best of luck.
[09:24 - 09:25] Counsellor: Thank you so much.
[09:25 - 09:25] User: Thank you sir.
[09:25 - 09:26] Counsellor: Okay ji, take care.

turns.speaker: Counsellor

turns.text: Good morning.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: I tried you like, I counselled you for the Amity once, like that. I hope you remember now.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: How are you Ashwi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am good.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so basically I have sent you the details regarding Bennett University. I feel you have seen that detail, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Even I arranged a call for you for the Bennett. Maybe you have received the call.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I I did not really like Bennett. I did go through the site and everything and brochure also.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And I did not really I did not really feel like it is

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so you did not like that.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: you did not like it.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so have you searched for any other locations or for any other colleges like?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am very hopeful that I can I will be able to get SRM so I am thinking of holding it to that.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes, I have applied for SRM.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: For which campus, SRM?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I have applied on the main portal so it will be on counselling sir.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, okay, okay, no issues, no issues.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Actually I am able to see Mukesh Patel, NMIMS, you have also applied for NMIMS, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Sorry, in which?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You have already applied for NMIMS.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No, I have not.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: You have not applied for that campus also.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: What about Manipal?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I was thinking about it but then I backed out of it too.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Thinking about but you did not apply for that. May I know the reason why?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Because it is a very good campus you can look at it accordingly, no?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: What is the reason why you have not searched for Manipal?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Because this is come on the one of the most famous university.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah, but

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then why you have not searched right now?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I was like thinking about all colleges but I really want to go to Thapar or SRM.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To Thapar, SRM. Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: So have you applied for Thapar?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yes, I have.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: When you applied for Thapar?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I have applied in first week of April.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, good.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, so you are not going for Manipal location, right?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Yeah.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay Ashwi. Still you can look out more options and if you feel like right now you are willing to find more colleges or like it is enough?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: I am thinking of applying when the JoSAA counselling will open. I am thinking of applying to JoSAA as well.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: And JAC Chandigarh too.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: CU, Chandigarh University?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: JAC Chandigarh, JAC Chandigarh counselling for PEC and UIET.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Just let me know if you found one of the good campuses and if you want to willing to apply.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Okay, we will help you out accordingly.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Any other help I can do for you Ashwi?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: No, it will be fine. If I will have any queries I will call you back.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: And if we will going to find a good college we will definitely going to recommend you by this number, from this number, no?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Sure. Thank you so much. Have a nice day.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Thank you. Have a nice day.

[00:39 - 00:44] User: And I did not really I did not really feel like it is

turns.text: Theek hai?

turns.text: Jisme na aapka government, government se aapko university ka jo hai na woh tag mile matlab ki government ki jo aapko degree jo mile woh government ki mile.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aise to Amity bhi hai, aapka LPU hai, Galgotia hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur aapka Greater Noida Institute of Technology ye bhi hai aapka, right?

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To bahut saare aise to college bahut saare hain.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar aap comfortable ho Noida, Gurgaon jaane ke liye to main aapko wahan ka bata sakta hoon.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Haan sir haan haan bataiye aap bataiye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To Noida mein hai college, haan Noida mein college hai KCC Institute of Technology and Management ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai, ye jo college hai iska jo degree provide karta hai ye, ye aapne suna hoga AKTU, Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye government university hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Uska isko affiliation matlab college ko mila hua hai, bahut achha college hai engineering ke liye.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur isko jo hai aapko degree jo milegi chaar saal baad woh government ki milegi AKTU ki.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur college rahega aapka Greater Noida mein.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan fees jo hai chaar lakh assi hazaar padegi aapko chaar saal ki yahan pe.

turns.text: Aur sir kya naam bataya tha aapne?

turns.text: Aur isme JEE jaise attempt kiya hoga na, JEE attempt ke base pe milta hai yahan pe.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Agar JEE attempt nahi kiya hoga aapne to UPTAC ka exam dena padta hai isme.

turns.text: Koi usse koi farak nahi padega bas aapne attempt, usme woh ye bolte hain ki bas attempt bachhe ne kiya ho JEE ek baar.

turns.text: Ki JEE mein bachha baitha ho.

turns.text: To woh lagani padti hai admission ke time pe.

turns.text: Kyunki ye kya hai ye apni khud ki koi aisi degree nahi hai jo deta hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Ye government se tie up hai to uske liye government jo AKTU bahut badi university hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To woh kya karti hai jo practical exposure hai uska bahut achha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Kyunki wahan pe jab jo practical seekhoge na KCC mein B.Tech CS ka jab to aapko zyada samajh mein aayega.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.text: Isme bhi isme bhi top companies aati hain, isme kam se kam 800 plus recruiters companies hain, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To isme saari.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Achha.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Dekho average aap iska bataun to iska niklega aapka chheh se saat lakh rupaye ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Chheh lakh ka to minimum maan ke chalo average aapko milna hi milna hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur isme ye maan lijiye ki aur upar bhi jaise isme na ek aur college hai jo IP university aapko pata hoga Guru Gobind IP university.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Usse bhi isko affiliation mila hua hai isi college ko matlab iske andar do university ka tie up hai kyunki college bahut achha hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To isliye yahan pe jab koi banda BBA bhi karna chahta hai na BBA to usko BBA karega to usko bhi government university IP university ki hi degree milegi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Aur jo B.Tech karega usko AKTU ki degree ki aapko milti hai isme.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To do university se tie up hai, A grade hai iska iska NAAC se.

turns.text: Haan BBA ke liye bhi hai, MBA ke liye bhi hai, M.Tech bhi hai, B.Tech bhi hai saare courses hain isme.

turns.text: Haan agar aap aage padhna chahte hain to aur bhi hain.

turns.text: Aur isme bhi ye maan lijiye 4.1 ki rating hai.

turns.text: Aur abhi isme kya hai main aapko iska fee structure bata deta hoon to aapko thoda sa idea ho jayega ki kitna fee structure aapko padega usme.

turns.text: Isme bahut saare courses hain B.Tech mechanical bhi hai.

turns.text: Theek hai.

[05:48 - 05:50] User: Theek hai.

[05:54 - 05:56] User: Nahi sir yehi theek hai.

turns.text: To bete ka number se kar denge, taaki beti ke number ka yahi isi se isi se ho jayega mere number se hi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To agar jaise aap abhi free ho na to aap mujhe abhi bata do, mere paas actually iska coupon code hai, main abhi isme registration aapka free karwa dungi.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: To jaise hi registration ho jayega, aapka fir Monday tak aapko call aa jayega baccho ke paas, to unka interview hoga uske baad isme process start ho jata hai admission wagera ka.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Then aapka jaise CUET ka abhi exam hoga, then result aayega, aap ye cheez usme mention kar dena.

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan, agar jaise guidance bhi chahiye to main aapko guide kar dungi, agar aap abhi comfortable ho to main abhi karwa deti hoon, mere paas abhi coupon code available hai iska.

turns.speaker: User

turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai, theek hai aap karwa lijiyega.

turns.text: Mera ye number WhatsApp pe hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Haan haan main na aapko WhatsApp pe apna number message kar de rahi hoon, aap ye bhi number de sakte ho aur wo wala bhi de do aur unse bol dijiyega call kar le, main abhi hoon yahan par, call pick karke main unko help kar deti hoon in sab cheezon mein, theek hai?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Theek hai, theek hai.

turns.speaker: Counsellor
turns.text: Theek hai sir main aapko message kar de rahi hoon.

[07:09 - 07:15] Counsellor: Nahi aap registration kar sakte ho, aap ghar baithe bhi registration kar sakte ho, iski free of cost registration hai.
[07:16 - 07:22] Counsellor: Jaise, waise baccho ke number alag alag hai ya aap apne number se hi karoge, if in case agar karte ho main aapko guide kar dungi isme kaise karna hai.

[07:27 - 07:28] Counsellor: Okay.

[07:35 - 07:41] Counsellor: To agar jaise aap abhi free ho na to aap mujhe abhi bata do, mere paas actually iska coupon code hai, main abhi isme registration aapka free karwa dungi.
[07:41 - 07:50] Counsellor: To jaise hi registration ho jayega, aapka fir Monday tak aapko call aa jayega baccho ke paas, to unka interview hoga uske baad isme process start ho jata hai admission wagera ka.
[07:51 - 07:56] Counsellor: Then aapka jaise CUET ka abhi exam hoga, then result aayega, aap ye cheez usme mention kar dena.
[07:56 - 07:57] User: Theek.
[07:57 - 08:04] Counsellor: Haan, agar jaise guidance bhi chahiye to main aapko guide kar dungi, agar aap abhi comfortable ho to main abhi karwa deti hoon, mere paas abhi coupon code available hai iska.
[08:05 - 08:08] User: Abhi kitna time lagega isme?
[08:09 - 08:13] Counsellor: Isme agar ek bacche ka fill karoge to 10 se 15 minute lagegi.
[08:14 - 08:18] Counsellor: Waise detail to same hi hoga kyunki home address wagera sab kuch same hi hoga.

[08:19 - 08:22] Counsellor: Haan bas bacche ka naam change karna hoga dono ka aur marksheet change karni hogi bas.

[08:40 - 08:43] Counsellor: Theek hai, theek hai, theek hai aap karwa lijiyega.

[08:48 - 08:50] User: Haan, bete ka alag se hoga.
[08:50 - 08:53] Counsellor: Bete ka uske number se ho jayega.
[08:54 - 08:57] Counsellor: Haan theek hai, to aap ek kaam kariye ye wala number aapka WhatsApp pe hai?

[09:01 - 09:11] Counsellor: Haan haan main na aapko WhatsApp pe apna number message kar de rahi hoon, aap ye bhi number de sakte ho aur wo wala bhi de do aur unse bol dijiyega call kar le, main abhi hoon yahan par, call pick karke main unko help kar deti hoon in sab cheezon mein, theek hai?
[09:11 - 09:12] User: Theek hai, theek hai.
[09:12 - 09:14] Counsellor: Theek hai sir main aapko message kar de rahi hoon.
[09:14 - 09:15] User: Okay.
[09:15 - 09:16] Counsellor: Theek hai, theek hai sir.

[07:11 - 07:12] User: Haan.
